---
title: "Pseudotime Cluster"
subtitle: "Marmoset"
doc_type: 作業報告書
author: 株式会社ダイナコム 久世、佐藤、江端
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y年%m月%d日')`"
output:
    html_document:
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 4
        toc_float:    # 目次は固定にしない
          collapsed: false
        number_section: true
        pandoc_args: ["--from", "markdown+autolink_bare_uris+tex_math_single_backslash-implicit_figures"]
        self_contained: False
---

```{=html}
<!-- 
sample1
sample1
merge
Integrate

QC & preprocess
PCA / UMAP / Cluster/ CellCycle / FeatureGene / DEG

-->
```
<!-- 画像をクリックすると拡大表示するjs -->

```{js echo=FALSE}
$(function(){
  $("img:not(.lb-image)").wrap(function() {
    return "<a href='" + $(this).attr("src") + "' data-lightbox='" + $(this).attr("scr") + "'></a>";
  });
});
```

## Load Library

```{r setup, include=F ,echo =T}
setwd("/Analysis/work/")

# ライブラリ読み込み先を指定
.libPaths()
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

# BioInfo Toll
library(Seurat)
library(SeuratData)
library(SeuratWrappers)
library(Signac)
library(GenomicRanges)
library(BSgenome.Cjacchus.UCSC.calJac4)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(GeneOverlap)
library(Pando)
library(BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38)
library(chromVAR)
library(motifmatchr)
library(SummarizedExperiment)
library(escape)

# R utilitu
library(magrittr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(yaml)
library(DT)
library(igraph)
library(ggraph)
library(gridExtra)
library(tidygraph)
library(openxlsx)

# Plotting
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)
library(Polychrome)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(colorRamp2)
library(scCustomize)
library(viridis)
library(scales)
library(ggnewscale)

library(ggforce)
library(ggnewscale)
library(ape)
library(ggtree)
library(ggtext)

library(scatterpie)
library(grid)
library(gtable)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggseqlogo)


set.seed(1234)
options(future.globals.maxSize = 1e12)
```

## Read YAML

Parmeterを記載したYAMLファイルの読み込み

```{r ReadYAML, include=FALSE, echo =F}
# 引数で指定できるように
yaml_file = "/Analysis/work/work_kuze/conf/Trajectory_Combined_Rezvani_2022_P5_Pando_260616.yaml"
param <- yaml.load_file(yaml_file)


#ディレクトリマップ
dir_map <- param$directories

# 各ファイルのフルパスを構築
file_paths <- lapply(param$files, function(f) {
  fs::path(dir_map[[f$dir]], f$name)
})

out_paths <- lapply(param$outfiles, function(f) {
  fs::path(dir_map[[f$dir]], f$name)
})

# 名前付きリストに変換
names(file_paths) <- names(param$files)
names(out_paths) <- names(param$outfiles)

param$files <- file_paths
param$outfiles <- out_paths

# outdirがなければ作成
dir_path <- param$directories$outdir
# ディレクトリの存在を確認し、存在しない場合は作成
if (!dir.exists(dir_path)) {
  dir.create(dir_path, recursive = TRUE)
  message("ディレクトリを作成しました: ", dir_path)
} else {
  message("output ディレクトリは既に存在します: ", dir_path)
}

# outdirのsubdirも作成
for( i in c(1:length(param$outdir_list))) {
  param$outdir_list[i] <- paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/",param$outdir_list[i] )
  d = param$outdir_list[i] %>% unlist
  if (!dir.exists(d)) {
    dir.create(d, recursive = TRUE)
    message("ディレクトリを作成しました: ", d)
  } 
}

if (!is.null(param$pca_ndim)){
  param$pca_ndim <-  eval(parse(text = param$pca_ndim)) 
}
param$outdir <- param$directories$outdir
print(param)


palettedt <- readRDS( param$colerPalet)
names(palettedt) <- NULL
# カラーパレットを表示
print(palettedt)
# カラーパレットを視覚的に確認するためのプロット
swatch(palettedt)

```


## Common Function
``` {r function,include=TRUE ,height = 15,  width  =15}
source(param$files$Function)
standardt_obj_list <- c("standardt_obj_list","param","cluster_pallete", "palettedt")
cluster_pallete <- palettedt[1:20]
names(cluster_pallete) <- c(0:19 )
bincoloer <- viridis(10)
```

# [DEG Detection]

## Function
```{r}


prep_gene_list <- function( allgeneset,species ,deg_list,TF_list ,Cluster_exp_pct ,group_col , c_id){
  
  gene_deg_type <- allgeneset %>% 
    as.data.frame() %>% 
    rename(gene =1) %>% 
    mutate(
      tfflag =  if_else(gene %in% TF_list , "TF", "Not") ,
      exp_pct = Cluster_exp_pct[ paste0(species,"_", c_id), gene ],
      updeg = gene %in% ( deg_list%>%
                           filter(type =="up" & .data[[group_col]]  == c_id) %>%
                           pull(gene)  ),
      downdeg = gene %in% (deg_list%>%
                           filter(type =="down"&  .data[[group_col]]== c_id) %>%
                           pull(gene)  ),
      noexp = exp_pct < 10
    ) 
   
  gene_deg_summary <-gene_deg_type %>%  
    mutate( DEGtype = 
              if_else( updeg , "up",
                  if_else( downdeg, "down",
                      if_else( noexp, "NOEXP","NoDEG")
                  )
              )
    ) %>% 
    group_by(DEGtype) %>% 
    summarize(n=n()) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from  = DEGtype,  values_from = n)
     
  return( list( gene_deg_type = gene_deg_type , gene_deg_summary = gene_deg_summary  ) )
}

check_tf_tgs_pair_deg <- function(pando_grn ,gene_deg_type , species , c_id ){
   pando_grn %>% 
     select( tf,target ,n_genes,estimate) %>%
     mutate(Regulate = if_else( estimate > 0,"active","negative") ) %>%
     group_by(tf,Regulate ) %>%
     mutate( Regcount= n()) %>% 
     ungroup() %>%
     left_join( . , gene_deg_type ,by =c("tf" = "gene")  )%>% 
     left_join( . , gene_deg_type ,by =c("target" = "gene") ,suffix =c(".tf",".target") )%>% 
      mutate(
        spe = species ,
        cluster = c_id,
        category = case_when(
          updeg.target  ~ "UpTarget",
          downdeg.target  ~ "DownTarget",          
          TRUE~ "nochange"
        )
      ) %>% return()
}

check_tf_overlap_stats <- function(pando_overlap  ,gene_deg_summary){
  
  mod_dat <- pando_overlap%>% 
    filter( !is.na(updeg.tf) ) %>%
    group_by(tf,updeg.tf,downdeg.tf, Regulate ,spe ,cluster ,n_genes) %>%
    summarise(
      n_targets_sep = n(),
      N_UpTarget = sum(category == "UpTarget"),
      N_DownTarget = sum(category == "DownTarget"),
      .groups = "drop"
    )%>% 
    rename( "n_targets" = "n_genes" ) %>%  
    group_by(tf, cluster) %>% 
    complete(Regulate = c("active", "negative"))  %>%
    mutate(
      across(
        c(updeg.tf, downdeg.tf, spe,n_targets,),
        ~ ifelse(
          is.na(.x),
          .x[!is.na(.x)][1],
          .x
          )
        ),
        across( 
          c(n_targets_sep, N_UpTarget , N_DownTarget),
          ~ ifelse(is.na(.x),0,.x)
        )
    )%>%
    ungroup() %>% 
    mutate( DegFlag = if_else( updeg.tf, "UpDEG", if_else(downdeg.tf , "DownDEG","NonDEG" )),
            N_targets_active = if_else(Regulate  =="active", n_targets_sep ,n_targets - n_targets_sep),
            N_targets_negative = if_else(Regulate  =="negative",n_targets_sep ,n_targets - n_targets_sep)
            )%>% 
    select( -c( updeg.tf ,downdeg.tf ,n_targets_sep) ) %>%
    rename( "TotalTargets" = "n_targets") %>%
    group_by( tf,cluster,spe,TotalTargets,DegFlag ,N_targets_active , N_targets_negative) %>%
    summarize(N_UpTarget = sum(N_UpTarget ),
              N_DownTarget = sum(N_DownTarget ) ) %>%
    ungroup( ) %>%
    mutate( 
            Overlaprate_avtive = N_UpTarget / TotalTargets ,
            Overlaprate_negative = N_DownTarget / TotalTargets ,
            UpDEG   = gene_deg_summary$up,
            DownDEG = gene_deg_summary$down
            )%>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(
        # DEG 数（up + down）
        #clusterid = .data[["cluster"]] ,
        Deg_total = UpDEG + DownDEG ,
        Overlap = N_UpTarget  + N_DownTarget  ,
#       Overlap = N_DEG_active  + N_DEG_negative  ,
        Overlap_rate = Overlap / TotalTargets 
      ) %>% 
    arrange(-Overlap )
  
    return(mod_dat)
  
}

ADDexp_and_Rank <- function( tf_pg_sum , long_ClusterAverageEXP,  cluster_levels, addcol = NULL,
                    joinkey = c( "tf" ="tf" , "spe"="species","clusterid"="clusterid"  )
                      ){
 
  tf_pg_sum %>% 
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(clusterid = .data[["cluster"]] ) %>%
    left_join( . , long_ClusterAverageEXP ,by=joinkey ) %>%
    group_by( tf) %>%
    mutate(
      Max_overlap = if_else( 
            any(DegFlag == "UpDEG") ,# TRUEが1つでもある
            max(Overlap[DegFlag == "UpDEG"], na.rm = TRUE),  # TRUE行だけでmax
            0                                               # 全部FALSE(またはTRUE無し)なら0
          ) %>% as.numeric()
    )%>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(rank = dense_rank( dplyr::desc(Max_overlap) ) ,
           cluster = factor(cluster , levels = cluster_levels)
           ) %>% 
    return()
}

########
#  Rank Plot Function
#########


rankplot_commonGene <- function( humandata ,marmosetdata,
                                 overlap_threshold = 10 , selectnum = 10){
  flaged_genedf <- rbind( humandata , marmosetdata  )%>%
    select(tf , cluster , DegFlag  , Overlap ,spe , Chromvar_deviation)  %>%
    filter( Overlap > overlap_threshold & DegFlag == "UpDEG"  ) %>%
    distinct() %>%
    group_by(cluster, spe)%>%
    arrange(desc(Overlap), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(overlap_flag_top10 = row_number() <= selectnum) %>%
    arrange(desc(Chromvar_deviation), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(chromvar_flag_top10 = row_number() <= selectnum) %>%    
    ungroup() %>%
    group_by( tf , cluster ) %>%
    mutate( common = if_else(n()>1 ,TRUE, FALSE ) ) %>% 
    select(tf , cluster,spe, overlap_flag_top10 ,chromvar_flag_top10 ,common)
    
  common_geme <- flaged_genedf %>% 
    filter( common ) %>%
    select(tf , cluster) %>%
    distinct() %>%
    group_by(cluster) %>% 
    summarise(tf = list(tf) %>% unique(), .groups = "drop") %>% 
    tibble::deframe()
  
  human_flg_gene <- flaged_genedf %>% 
    filter( spe == "human" & (overlap_flag_top10 | chromvar_flag_top10 )  ) %>%
    group_by(cluster) %>% 
    summarise(tf = list(tf) %>% unique(), .groups = "drop") %>% 
    tibble::deframe()
  
  marmoset_flg_gene <- flaged_genedf %>% 
    filter( spe == "marmoset" & (overlap_flag_top10 | chromvar_flag_top10 )  ) %>%
    group_by(cluster) %>% 
    summarise(tf = list(tf) %>% unique(), .groups = "drop") %>% 
    tibble::deframe()
  
  return( list(common_geme = common_geme , human =  human_flg_gene , marmoset = marmoset_flg_gene ) )
}

TFrankPlot_scatter <- function(
    plot_data ,
    common_tf = NULL ,
    plot_tf = NULL ,
    plot_tf_Limit = 20  ,
    overlaplimit = 10,
    textsize =12,
    psize = 3,
    force_pull_val= 1,# legend 
    min_seg_length = 0.4,
    force_val = 3 # legend 
    ){
  
  clusterTFlist <- plot_data %>%
    select(tf , cluster , DegFlag , Overlap  )  %>% 
    filter( Overlap > overlaplimit & DegFlag == "UpDEG" ) %>% 
    arrange( - Overlap ) %>%
    select(tf ,cluster) %>%
    distinct() %>%
    group_by(cluster) %>% 
    summarise(tf = list(tf) %>% unique(), .groups = "drop") %>% 
    tibble::deframe()
  
  #plotcluster= "Differentiation"
  plot_cluster_list <- plot_data$cluster %>% levels()
  plotlist <-setNames(vector("list", length(plot_cluster_list)), plot_cluster_list)
  min_color_range <- 5  
  plotTFnullFlag = F
  if( is.null(plot_tf)){plotTFnullFlag = T}

  for ( plotcluster in plot_cluster_list ){
    
    if( plotTFnullFlag ){
      plot_tf_list <- clusterTFlist[[plotcluster]]
      if( plot_tf_Limit <= length(plot_tf_list) ){
        plot_tf_list <-plot_tf_list[0:plot_tf_Limit]
      } 
      #plot_tf <- plot_tf[ !plot_tf %in% use_common_tf ]
    } else{
      plot_tf_list <- plot_tf[[plotcluster]]
    }
    print(plot_tf_list)
        
    if( is.null(common_tf) | !plotcluster %in% names(common_tf)  ){
      use_common_tf <- NULL
    } else{
      use_common_tf <- intersect( common_tf[[plotcluster]] ,plot_tf_list)
    }
    

    forPlot_statics_data <- plot_data  %>% 
      select( tf , DegFlag , cluster , TotalTargets , N_UpTarget , N_DownTarget,Chromvar_deviation) %>%
      rename( "Active" = "N_UpTarget","Negative"="N_DownTarget"  ) %>%
      mutate( diff_overlap = Active - Negative,
              total_overlap =   Active + Negative,
              tf_highlight = if_else(tf %in% plot_tf_list , tf, "" ) )%>%
      filter( cluster == plotcluster &  tf %in% clusterTFlist[[plotcluster]] )  %>%
      mutate(tf_highlight  = case_when(
              tf %in% use_common_tf ~ "red",   # 赤
              tf %in% plot_tf_list ~ "black",     # 黒
              TRUE     ~ "ns"      # 非表示
            ))
    
    col_lim <- forPlot_statics_data %>%
      summarise(
        max_abs = max(abs(diff_overlap), na.rm = TRUE)
      ) %>%
      pull(max_abs)
    col_lim <- max(col_lim, min_color_range)
    
    highlight <- filter(forPlot_statics_data , tf_highlight != "ns")
    
    plotlist[[plotcluster]] <- forPlot_statics_data %>%
      ggplot() + 
        geom_point(aes(x = total_overlap,y = Chromvar_deviation , colour = diff_overlap),size = psize) +
        scale_color_gradient2( 
          low = "#2166AC",   # 濃い青
          mid = "white",
          high = "#B2182B",  # 濃い赤
          midpoint = 0,
          limits = c(-col_lim, col_lim),
          trans = scales::pseudo_log_trans(base = 10),
          name = "Diff_overlap"
        )+
      ## --- common_tf 以外：黒ラベル ---
      geom_text_repel(
        data          = highlight,
        aes(x = total_overlap,
            y = Chromvar_deviation,
            label = tf ,
            color = I(tf_highlight)),
    
        # ── 重なり防止の調整 ──────────────────────────────
        size              = 3,
        max.overlaps      = Inf,      # 全ラベルを強制表示
        force             = force_val,        # 反発力（大きいほど広がる）
        force_pull        = force_pull_val,      # 点への引力
        box.padding       = 1,      # テキストボックス周囲の余白
        point.padding     = 0.2,      # 点周囲の余白
        min.segment.length = min_seg_length,     # 引き出し線の最小長
        segment.color     = "gray50",
        segment.size      = 0.4,
        seed              = 42        # 再現性のため
      ) +
      #scale_y_continuous(limits = c( y_min, y_max )) + 
      labs(title = plotcluster, x = "Number of overlap", y = "Chromvar Diviation")+
      theme_classic() +
      theme(
        #text = element_text(size = textsize),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(size = textsize),
        axis.text.x  = element_text(size = textsize ) ,
        axis.title.y =  element_text(size = textsize ),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = textsize ),
        legend.position = "right")
  }
  return(plotlist)

}


########
#  Bubble Plot Function
#########

heatmapLegend<- function(reg_col , border_col){
   fill_sector <- function(cx, cy, a, b, ang1, ang2, col, n = 400) {
    t <- seq(ang1, ang2, length.out = n)
    polygon(c(cx, cx + a * cos(t), cx),
            c(cy, cy + b * sin(t), cy),
            col = col, border = NA)
  }
  
  ellipse_outline <- function(cx, cy, a, b, col = "black", lwd = 2, n = 400) {
    t <- seq(0, 2 * pi, length.out = n)
    lines(cx + a * cos(t), cy + b * sin(t), col = col, lwd = lwd)
  }
  
  sector_line <- function(cx, cy, a, b, ang, col = "white", lwd = 2) {
    segments(cx, cy, cx + a * cos(ang), cy + b * sin(ang), col = col, lwd = lwd)
  }
  
  par(mar = c(1, 1, 1, 1), bg = "white", xpd = NA)
  plot(NULL, xlim = c(-10, 30), ylim = c(1, 20),
       asp = 1, axes = FALSE, xlab = "", ylab = "")

  # ── セクター境界角度（数学角: 12時 = pi/2）───────────────────────────
  # 12時(pi/2) → 4時(-pi/6) → 8時(-5pi/6) → 12時（一周）
  S12 <-  pi / 2       # 12時
  S4  <- -pi / 6       # 4時  (Active | Negative 境界)
  S8  <- -5 * pi / 6   # 8時  (Negative | White 境界)
      
  # =====================================================================
  # 1. Up-regulated TF  (large, thick black outline)
  # =====================================================================
  CX1 <- 3.5; CY1 <- 13.5; A1 <- 2; B1 <- 2
    
  fill_sector(CX1, CY1, A1, B1, S4, S12,        reg_col["active_uptf"] )      # Active  (12→4時)
  fill_sector(CX1, CY1, A1, B1, S8, S4,         reg_col["negative_uptf"])  # Negative(4→8時)
  fill_sector(CX1, CY1, A1, B1, S8, S12 - 2*pi, reg_col["notoverlap "])   # Non-overlap(8→12時、時計回り)
  
  for (ang in c(S12, S4, S8)) sector_line(CX1, CY1, A1, B1, ang)
  ellipse_outline(CX1, CY1, A1, B1, col = border_col["UpDEG"], lwd = 7)
  text(8, CY1, "Up regulated TF", font = 2, cex = 5, adj = 0)
  
  # =====================================================================
  # 2. Non DEG TF  (smaller, light purple/blue outline)
  # =====================================================================
  CX2 <- 3.2; CY2 <- 8.7; A2 <- 2; B2 <- 2
  
  fill_sector(CX2, CY2, A2, B2, S4, S12,        reg_col["active_nondeg"] )      # Active  (12→4時)
  fill_sector(CX2, CY2, A2, B2, S8, S4,         reg_col["negative_nondeg"])  # Negative(4→8時)
  fill_sector(CX2, CY2, A2, B2, S8, S12 - 2*pi, reg_col["notoverlap "])   # Non-overlap(8→12時、時計回り)
  
  
  for (ang in c(S12, S4, S8)) sector_line(CX2, CY2, A2, B2, ang)
  ellipse_outline(CX2, CY2, A2, B2, col = border_col["NonDEG"], lwd = 7)
  text(8, CY2, "Non DEG TF", font = 2, cex = 5, adj = 0)
    
  
  # =====================================================================
  # 3.  Down-regulated TF  (gray outline, no fill, centre line only)
  # =====================================================================
  CX3 <- 3.2; CY3 <- 4.0; A3 <- 2; B3 <- 2
  
  fill_sector(CX3, CY3, A3, B3, S4, S12,        reg_col["active_downtf"] )      # Active  (12→4時)
  fill_sector(CX3, CY3, A3, B3, S8, S4,         reg_col["negative_downtf"])  # Negative(4→8時)
  fill_sector(CX3, CY3, A3, B3, S8, S12 - 2*pi, reg_col["notoverlap "])   # Non-overlap(8→12時、時計回り)
  
  for (ang in c(S12, S4, S8)) sector_line(CX3, CY3, A3, B3, ang)
  ellipse_outline(CX3, CY3, A3, B3, col = border_col["DownDEG"], lwd = 7)
  text(8, CY3, "Down regulated TF", font = 2, cex = 5, adj = 0)
  
  # =====================================================================
  # Annotations with arrows
  # =====================================================================
  
  # "DEG Overlap of Active Regulate Target" (upper right) --------------
  AX <- 9.2; AY <- 17
  text(AX, AY, "Up Regulate DEG\n", cex = 3, adj = 0.5)
  
  arrow_ax <- AX - 1.5; arrow_ay <- AY - 1.5
  
  # → UpDEG sector in top ellipse (~45°)
  arrows(arrow_ax, arrow_ay,
         CX1 + A1 * cos(pi / 4) * 0.62,
         CY1 + B1 * sin(pi / 4) * 0.62,
         length = 0.09, lwd = 4)
  
  # → NonDEG sector in middle ellipse (~18°)
  arrows(arrow_ax, arrow_ay,
         CX2 + A2 * cos(pi / 10) * 0.8 + 0.15,
         CY2 + B2 * sin(pi / 10) * 0.5,
         length = 0.09, lwd = 4)
  
  # → DownDEG sector in middle ellipse (~18°)
  arrows(arrow_ax, arrow_ay,
         CX3 + A3 * cos(pi / 16) * 0.8 + 0.15,
         CY3 + B3 * sin(pi / 16) * 0.5,
         length = 0.09, lwd = 4)
  
  # "DEG Overlap of Negative Regulate Target" (left side) --------------
  NX <- -9; NY <- 10.8
  text(NX, NY, "Down\nRegulate DEG", cex = 3, adj = 0)
  
  arrow_nx <- NX + 7; arrow_ny <- NY + 0.2
  
  # → UpDEG sector in top ellipse (~225°)
  arrows(arrow_nx, arrow_ny,
         CX1 + A1 * cos(5 * pi / 4) * 0.62,
         CY1 + B1 * sin(5 * pi / 4) * 0.62,
         length = 0.09, lwd = 4)
  
  # → Non DEG sector in middle ellipse (~210°)
  arrows(arrow_nx, arrow_ny,
         CX2 + A2 * cos(7 * pi / 6) * 0.52,
         CY2 + B2 * sin(7 * pi / 6) * 0.52,
         length = 0.09, lwd = 4)
  # → DonDEG sector in middle ellipse (~210°)
  arrows(arrow_nx, arrow_ny,
         CX3 + A3 * cos(9 * pi / 8) * 0.52,
         CY3 + B3 * sin(9 * pi / 8) * 0.52,
         length = 0.09, lwd = 4)
  
}


plot_all_complexheatmap <- function(
  plot_all,
  common_tf = character(0),
  tf_order_df = NULL ,
  kclust = 8,
  bubble_ratio = 10 ,
  top_ratio    = 1 ,
  tf_colratio = 1/3 ,
  textsize = 12,
  genetxtsize = 12 ,
  Max_overlap = 10,
  Ranking_within = 50,
  reg_col = list( uptf = c( active ="red",negative = "blue"  ) , 
                   downtf = c(active ="#FFB6C1",negative = "#00FFFF" )),
  border_col = c( up = "black" , down = "#6A5ACD", flat ="#CDC9C9"  ),
  flat_fill = FALSE
){
  
  plot_all <- plot_all %>%
    filter( Max_overlap >=overlap_threshold_upper &rank  <= Ranking_within) 
  numofTF = plot_all$tf %>% unique %>% length()
  if( is.null(numofTF)){
    print("numofTF is null , Errer")
    return(0)
    # kclust = if_else( numofTF < 10 ,numofTF , as.integer(numofTF/2) )
    #print( paste0 ( "kclust: " , kclust  ))
  }else if( numofTF < kclust  ){
    print("kclust over numver  of TF")
    kclust = numofTF
    print( paste0 ( "kclust: " , kclust  ))
  }
  
  # =========================================================
  # 1) TF clustering
  # =========================================================
  if ( is.null(tf_order_df)) {
    clust_mat <- plot_all %>%
      select(tf, cluster, DegFlag , EXP, Overlaprate_avtive ,Overlaprate_negative ) %>%
      # mutate( updeg.tf = updeg.tf %>% as.integer()) %>%
      pivot_longer(cols = c(EXP,Overlaprate_avtive, Overlaprate_negative),
                   names_to = "feature", values_to = "val") %>%
      unite(type, "cluster", "feature", sep = "-", remove = FALSE) %>%
      select(tf, type, val) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = "type", values_from = "val") %>%
      tibble::column_to_rownames("tf") %>%
      as.matrix()
    
    hc <- hclust(dist(clust_mat), method = "ward.D2")
    tf_cluster <- cutree(tree = hc , k = kclust)
    tf_order <- rownames(clust_mat)[hc$order]
    tf_order_df <- tf_cluster %>% 
      as.data.frame() %>% 
      rename("tf_group"=".") %>% 
      rownames_to_column(var = "gene") %>% 
      rowwise() %>%
      mutate( order = which(tf_order == gene)) %>% 
      arrange( order)
  } else {
    stopifnot(all(c("gene","order") %in% colnames(tf_order_df)))
    tf_order_df <- tf_order_df %>% arrange(order)
    tf_order <- tf_order_df$gene
    # tf_cluster <- setNames(tf_order_df$cluster, tf_order_df$gene)
  }
  # =========================================================
  # 2) cluster 順序（列順）を固定
  # =========================================================
  cluster_levels <- plot_all %>%
    pull(cluster) %>%
    as.factor() %>%
    levels()

  # =========================================================
  # top bar  number of deg
  # =========================================================  
  barplot_dt <- plot_all %>% 
    filter( Deg_total >0)  %>%
    select(cluster , UpDEG , DownDEG) %>% 
    distinct()%>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(clevel = which(cluster_levels == cluster)) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c( "UpDEG" , "DownDEG" ), names_to = "Regulate" , values_to = "Deg_total" ) %>%
    mutate(Regulate = factor( Regulate , levels = c("UpDEG", "DownDEG")) )
  
  top_bar <- ggplot(barplot_dt , aes(x = clevel, y = Deg_total, fill = Regulate)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
    scale_fill_manual( values = c("UpDEG"="red" ,"DownDEG"= "blue") ) +
    
    labs(title = "Total DEG", x = "cluster", y = "Number of DEG") +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(axis.text.x  = element_blank(),
          axis.text.y  = element_text(size = textsize ) ,
          axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_blank(),
          legend.position = "none")

  # =========================================================
  # tf-bar number of tf target gene  
  # =========================================================  
  tf_barplot_dt <- plot_all %>% 
    select(tf, N_targets_active, N_targets_negative ) %>% 
    rename( "Active"= "N_targets_active", "Negative"="N_targets_negative" ) %>%
    distinct()%>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate( #tf = factor(tf , levels = rev(tf_order)),
            tf_oder = which(tf_order == tf)[1]
            #label_col = if_else( tf %in% common_tf , "red" ,"black" ),
            ) %>% 
    pivot_longer( cols = c( "Active", "Negative"  )  , names_to = "Regulate" , values_to = "n_targets_sep")
  
    # 動的に色を決める関数
    color_labels <- function(tf,common_tf) {
      sapply(tf, function(v) {
        col <- if ( v %in% common_tf ) "red" else "black"
        sprintf("<span style='color:%s'>%s</span>", col, v)
      })
    }
  
  tf_bar <- ggplot(tf_barplot_dt , aes(x = tf_oder, y = n_targets_sep, fill = Regulate)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
    scale_fill_manual( values = c("Active"="red" ,"Negative"= "blue") ) +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_x_reverse(
      breaks = 0:length(tf_order),
      #labels = c("", (tf_order)),
      labels = c("",color_labels(tf_order,common_tf)),
      position = "top"
    ) +
    labs(title = "", x = "TF", y = "Number of Targets") +
    theme_classic()+    
    theme(
          axis.text.y = element_markdown(size = genetxtsize),
          axis.text.x = element_text(
              size = textsize,
              angle = 45,      # 回転角度
              hjust = 1,       # 水平方向の位置調整
              vjust = 1        # 垂直方向の位置調整（必要に応じて）
          ),
          axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_blank(),
          
          legend.position = "none")

  # =========================================================
  # 3) bubble 用データ整形（tf x cluster のセルに active/negative を集約）
  # =========================================================
  # updeg.tf が plot_all に無いケースも考慮
  # has_updeg <- "updeg.tf" %in% colnames(plot_all)

  dat <- plot_all %>% 
    select(tf ,cluster , DegFlag ,EXP , Overlaprate_avtive , Overlaprate_negative ) %>%
    #pivot_wider( names_from = "Regulate",values_from = "overlap_rate") %>%
    mutate( notoverlap = 1 - Overlaprate_avtive -Overlaprate_negative ) %>%
    #rename("active_uptf"  = "active", "negative_uptf" = "negative" ) %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate( "active_uptf"  = if_else(DegFlag =="UpDEG" , Overlaprate_avtive , 0),
            "negative_uptf"  = if_else(DegFlag =="UpDEG" , Overlaprate_negative , 0),
            "active_downtf" = if_else(DegFlag =="DownDEG" , Overlaprate_avtive , 0) ,
            "negative_downtf" = if_else(DegFlag =="DownDEG" , Overlaprate_negative , 0) ,
            "active_nondeg" = if_else(DegFlag =="NonDEG" , Overlaprate_avtive , 0) ,
            "negative_nondeg" = if_else(DegFlag =="NonDEG" , Overlaprate_negative , 0) ,
            notoverlap = 1 - Overlaprate_avtive -Overlaprate_negative ,
            clevel = which(cluster_levels == cluster),
            EXP = EXP*0.1,
            #DEGflag = if_else( updeg.tf , "Up", if_else( downdeg.tf ,"Down" , "Non-DEG") )
            ) %>% 
    left_join( . , tf_order_df ,by =c("tf"="gene")) %>%
    unite( key , tf, cluster ,sep ="::",remove = F)

  #> plot_all $DegFlag %>% unique()
  #[1] "UpDEG"   "NonDEG"  "DownDEG"
  
  r01 <- plot_all %>%
      #filter(Regulate == "active") %>%
      select(tf, cluster, EXP) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = "cluster", values_from = "EXP") %>%
      rowwise() %>%
      mutate(across(all_of(cluster_levels), ~{
        row <- c_across(all_of(cluster_levels))
        rmax <- suppressWarnings(max(row, na.rm = TRUE))
        if (!is.finite(rmax) || rmax <= 0 || !is.finite(.x) || .x <= 0) 0 else .x / rmax
      })) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      pivot_longer(-tf, names_to="cluster", values_to="r01") %>%
      unite( keys  ,"tf","cluster" , sep ="::",remove=T)%>%
      column_to_rownames(var ="keys")
  dat$radius = r01[ dat$key, 1] *0.5

  legend_bubule_p <- ggplot() + 
    geom_scatterpie(aes(x=clevel , y=order ,  r= radius ,  color =DegFlag ),
                    data=dat, 
                    key_glyph = "point",
                    legend_name = "Regulate" ,
                    cols=c("active_uptf","negative_uptf",
                           "active_downtf","negative_downtf",
                           "active_nondeg","negative_nondeg",
                           "notoverlap")
                    ) + 
    coord_equal()+
    scale_fill_manual( values =reg_col ,
                       labels = c(active_uptf = "Active UpTF",
                                  negative_uptf = "Negative UpTF",
                                  active_downtf = "Active DownTF",
                                  negative_downtf = "Negative DownTF",
                                  active_nondeg = "Active NonDEG",
                                  negative_nondeg = "Negative NonDEG",
                                  notoverlap  = "Not overlap") 
                       ) +
    scale_color_manual( values =border_col ,
                        labels = c(UpDEG = "Up DEG",
                                   DownDEG = "Down DEG" ,
                                   "NonDEG" = "Non-DEG" )
                        )+ 
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = 1:length(cluster_levels),
      labels =  cluster_levels,
    ) +
    scale_y_reverse()+

    guides(
      fill = guide_legend(
        override.aes = list(
          shape = 21,   # 円
          size  = 5     # 円の大きさ（調整可）
        )
      ) ,
      color = guide_legend(
        override.aes = list(
          shape = 21,   # 円
          size  = 5     # 円の大きさ（調整可）
        )
      )
    )+
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = element_text(
        size = textsize,
        angle = 45,      # 回転角度
        hjust = 1,       # 水平方向の位置調整
        vjust = 1        # 垂直方向の位置調整（必要に応じて）
      ),
      legend.justification = "center",
      legend.box.just = "center"
    )
  bubule_p <-legend_bubule_p+ NoLegend()
  

  ## functioon
  get_legend_grob <- function(p) {
    g <- ggplotGrob(p)
    legend_index <- which(sapply(g$grobs, function(x) x$name) == "guide-box")
    g$grobs[[legend_index]]
  }

  legend_grob <- get_legend_grob(legend_bubule_p)
  gm <- ggplotGrob(bubule_p)
  gt <- ggplotGrob(top_bar)
  gr <- ggplotGrob(tf_bar)

  # panel位置を取得
  pm <- gm$layout[gm$layout$name == "panel", c("t","l","b","r")]
  pt <- gt$layout[gt$layout$name == "panel", c("t","l","b","r")]
  pr <- gr$layout[gr$layout$name == "panel", c("t","l","b","r")]
  
  # 1) 上図の「panel幅」をメインの panel幅に合わせる（= x軸が揃う）
  gt$widths[pt$l:pt$r] <- gm$widths[pm$l:pm$r]
  ## 上図の縦幅をした図の制御後の1/3になるようにする
  #gt$heights[pt$l:pt$r] <- gm$widths[pm$l:pm$r]
  # 2) 右図の「panel高さ」をメインの panel高さに合わせる（= y軸が揃う）
  gr$heights[pr$t:pr$b] <- gm$heights[pm$t:pm$b]
 
  #==================
  # panel 行インデックス
  bubble_rows <- pm$t:pm$b
  top_rows    <- pt$t:pt$b
  
  # null 比率
  #bubble_ratio <- bubble_ratio
  #top_ratio    <- top_ratio    
  
  # bubule_p panel（基準）
  gm$heights[bubble_rows] <- unit(length(bubble_rows), "null") * bubble_ratio
  
  # top_bar panel（常に 1/3）
  gt$heights[top_rows] <- unit(length(top_rows), "null") * top_ratio
  #==================
  # panel 行インデックス
  bubble_cols <- pm$l:pm$r
  tf_cols    <- pr$l:pr$r
  gr$widths[tf_cols] <- unit(length(tf_cols), "null") * tf_colratio
  #==================
  
  # 3-1) メインの上に top を積む（高さは  に固定）
  #    ここで top の「全体高さ」を top_height にしたい場合、panel以外の上下マージンも含むので
  #    見た目で微調整してください（top_heightを変える）
  g_top_main <- gtable_rbind(gt, gm, size = "first")
  
  # 3-2) 左右結合するために「行数」を合わせる
  nr_left  <- length(g_top_main$heights)
  nr_right <- length(gr$height)
  
  if (nr_right < nr_left) {
    # 右が少ない → 上に不足分の行を足す（ゼロ高さ）
    gr <- gtable_add_rows(gr, unit(rep(0, nr_left - nr_right), "pt"), pos = 0)
  } else if (nr_right > nr_left) {
    # 左が少ない → 左に不足分の行を足す（ゼロ高さ）
    g_top_main <- gtable_add_rows(g_left, unit(rep(0, nr_right - nr_left), "pt"), pos = 0)
  }

  # 4) 右に right を足す（幅は right_width に固定）
  g_all <- gtable_cbind(g_top_main, gr, size = "first")

  grid.newpage()
  grid.draw(g_all)
  
  return( list( plot = g_all , tflist = tf_order_df ) )
  #invisible(g_final)

}






########
#  Peak
#########

get_peaks_per_gene <- function(gr_resized, peak_rownames) {
  # peak rownames → GRanges (例: "chr1-10000-11000" 形式)
  peak_gr <- StringToGRanges(peak_rownames)  # Signac関数
  gr_string <- GRangesToString(gr_resized)
  # overlap: gr_resized(gene単位) × peaks
  hits <- findOverlaps(gr_resized, peak_gr)
  # gene_id → peaks list
  gene_ids <- gr_resized$gene_id[queryHits(hits)]
  peaks_hit <- peak_rownames[subjectHits(hits)]
  #result <- split(peaks_hit, gene_ids)
  hits %>% 
    as.data.frame()%>% 
    mutate( query_region = peak_rownames[subjectHits] ,
            gene_name = gr_resized$gene_name[queryHits] ,
            closest_region = gr_string[queryHits] ,
            gene_id = gr_resized$gene_id[queryHits],
            transcript_id =gr_resized$transcript_id[queryHits] ) %>%
    select(-queryHits , -subjectHits) %>% 
    distinct() %>%
  return()  # named list: gene_id → character vector of peak names
}

########
#  GO 
#########

### Make GO enrich 
###
### @input : gene_list
### @return : 
MakeGOenrich_DT <- function(gene_list, outdir) {
  library(data.table)
  # 1. 全遺伝子を一括で SYMBOL → ENTREZID に変換
  all_genes <- unique(unlist(gene_list))
  gene_map <- as.data.table(bitr(all_genes, fromType="SYMBOL", toType="ENTREZID", OrgDb="org.Hs.eg.db"))
  
  # 2. enrichGO 結果を格納するリスト
  ego_list <- list()
  
  # 3. 各モジュール × カテゴリで enrichGO 実行
  for (module_name in names(gene_list)) {
    use_module <- gene_list[[module_name]]
    eg <- gene_map[SYMBOL %in% use_module]
    
    for (cate in c("BP", "MF", "CC")) {
      ego <- enrichGO(
        gene = eg$ENTREZID,
        OrgDb = "org.Hs.eg.db",
        ont = cate,
        pAdjustMethod = "BH",
        pvalueCutoff = 0.01,
        qvalueCutoff = 0.05,
        readable = TRUE
      )
      ego_list[[paste0(module_name, "_", cate)]] <- ego
    }
  }
  
  # 4. 結果のフィルタと保存・プロット
  for (module_name in names(gene_list)) {
    miniplot_list <- vector("list", 3)
    n <- 1
    
    for (cate in c("BP", "MF", "CC")) {
      geo_name <- paste0(module_name, "_", cate)
      ego_result <- ego_list[[geo_name]]
      filtered_res <- as.data.table(ego_result@result)[p.adjust < 0.01 & qvalue < 0.05]
      
      if (nrow(filtered_res) > 0) {
        output.degfile <-  paste0(outdir,"/GO_list_GGMmodule_", geo_name, "_list.txt" )
        fwrite(filtered_res, file = output.degfile, sep = "\t", quote = FALSE)
        miniplot_list[[n %% 3 + 1]] <- dotplot(ego_result, title = geo_name)
      } else {
        miniplot_list[[n %% 3 + 1]] <- ggplot() + theme_void()
      }
      n <- n + 1
    }
    
    output.file <-paste0(outdir,"/Module_GOplot_GeneCluster", module_name , "_GGMmodule.pdf" )
    ggsave(wrap_plots(miniplot_list, ncol = 3), file = output.file, height = 10, width = 20)
  }
}



```


## Pre Process ATAC
```{r atac chormvar prep}

param$outdir <- paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/chromvar_obj/")
if (!dir.exists(param$outdir)) {
  dir.create(param$outdir, recursive = TRUE)
  message("ディレクトリを作成しました: ", param$outdir)
} else {
  message("output ディレクトリは既に存在します: ", param$outdir)
}

data('motifs')
data('motif2tf')

genomeName_list <- list( marmoset ="BSgenome.Cjacchus.UCSC.calJac4",
                    human = "BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38")

chromvarobj_dev_list <- list( human = NULL , marmoset = NULL )
pando_dir <- paste0(param$directories$outdir, "/Pando/")

#+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
# setup background peak info
#+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

spe_list <- c("human", "marmoset")
for (spe in spe_list) {

  filtered_peak<-  readRDS(file.path(pando_dir, sprintf("%s_filtered_peak.rds", spe)))
  muo_data <- readRDS(file.path(pando_dir, sprintf("%s_seuratLINKED_afPando.rds", spe)))
  # grn regions と raw peak の対応表（grn_range バグ修正）
  gr <- muo_data@grn@regions@ranges
  grn_region <- paste0(as.character(seqnames(gr)), ":", start(gr), "-", end(gr))

  pando_region2Peak <- data.frame(
    grn_data = grn_region,
    raw = rownames(muo_data@data)[muo_data@grn@regions@peaks],
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  # filtered_peak を Pando内のrawピークに合わせて絞る
  keep <- unique(pando_region2Peak$raw)
  filtered_peak <- filtered_peak[filtered_peak %in% keep]

  DefaultAssay(muo_data@data) <- "ATAC"
  atac_counts <- GetAssayData(muo_data@data, assay = "ATAC", layer = "counts")[filtered_peak, , drop = FALSE]

  rowRanges <- StringToGRanges(filtered_peak)
  chromvarobj <- SummarizedExperiment(
    assays = list(counts = atac_counts),
    rowRanges = rowRanges,
    colData = muo_data@data@meta.data
  )

  # motif match は species ごとに 1回
  motif_ix <- matchMotifs(motifs, chromvarobj, genome = genomeName_list[[spe]])
  motif_mat <- assays(motif_ix)[[1]]  # peak x motif か motif x peak はパッケージ実装依存

  # GC bias と background も species ごとに 1回
  chromvarobj_gc <- addGCBias(chromvarobj, genome = genomeName_list[[spe]])
  bg_peak <- getBackgroundPeaks(chromvarobj_gc, niterations = 100)
  
  chromvar_data <- list(
    seuratobj = muo_data,
    obj = chromvarobj,
    motif_ix = motif_ix,
    chromvarobj_gc = chromvarobj_gc,
    bg_peak = bg_peak 
  )
  saveRDS(chromvar_data,file = file.path(param$outdir, paste0("motif_ix_", spe, ".rds")))
}

#paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/chromvar_obj/","motif_ix_", spe, ".rds")

rm_list <- GetRmObjList (ls() , standardt_obj_list =  standardt_obj_list)
rm( list = rm_list)
gc()


```

## DEG.1 Speceis DEG
### DEG Detection
```{r}
## function
#########################################################
# Load Data
#########################################################
total_day = param$Info$Prediction$total_day +1
bin_day= param$Info$Prediction$bin
fitting_result <-readRDS(paste0( param$outdir_list$Pseudotime , "GAM_fittigGeneExp_addInfo.rds"))
combinedOBJ <- readRDS(  paste0( param$directories$outdir , "/Updateded_CombinedOBJ.rds") )

param$outdir <- paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/SpeciesDEG_pando/")
if (!dir.exists(param$outdir)) {
  dir.create(param$outdir, recursive = TRUE)
  message("ディレクトリを作成しました: ", param$outdir)
} else {
  message("output ディレクトリは既に存在します: ", param$outdir)
}

pandodir = paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/Pando/")
humanPandoRes <- read.table(  paste0(pandodir, "/human_pando_module.txt")   )
marmosetPandoRes <- read.table(  paste0(pandodir, "/marmoset_pando_module.txt")   )
pandores <- list(human = humanPandoRes ,
                 marmoset = marmosetPandoRes )

pando_predictedTF <- list(human =  pandores$human$tf %>% unique() ,
                          marmoset =  pandores$marmoset$tf %>% unique() )


#########################################################
# Make Pabndo result Sheet ここはPandoのとこに移す
#########################################################

wb_tf <- createWorkbook()
customStyle <- createStyle(
  fontName = "Arial",
  fontSize = 11,halign = "center",valign = "center"
  #textDecoration = "bold"
)

# --- シート1: opness.bin ---
sheet <- paste0("Human_Pando_results")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data <- pandores$human %>% 
  mutate( Regulate = if_else( estimate >= 0,"active","negative"  ) ) %>% 
  select( tf , target ,Regulate ) %>% 
  group_by(tf, Regulate) %>% 
  summarize( Total_targes = n() , Target_genes = paste0(target,collapse = ",") ) %>% 
  pivot_wider(  names_from = "Regulate", 
                values_from = c(Total_targes,Target_genes) ,
                values_fill = list(Total_targes = 0, Target_genes = "")
                ) 

writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

sheet <- paste0("Marmoset_Pando_results DEG")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<- pandores$marmoset %>% 
  mutate( Regulate = if_else( estimate >= 0,"active","negative"  ) ) %>% 
  select( tf , target ,Regulate ) %>% 
  group_by(tf, Regulate) %>% 
  summarize( Total_targes = n() , Target_genes = paste0(target,collapse = ",") ) %>% 
  pivot_wider(  names_from = "Regulate", 
                values_from = c(Total_targes,Target_genes) ,
                values_fill = list(Total_targes = 0, Target_genes = "")
                ) 
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)



outfile  = paste0( param$outdir , "/Pando_result_ForTable.xlsx" )
saveWorkbook(wb_tf, file =outfile, overwrite = TRUE)



##########################################################
# conserved cell type markers & DEG
###########################################################
commonGene <- fitting_result[["marmoset"]]$seuratobj %>% rownames()
# SSC のみ
# 全クラスタ
# の2パターンで作成

Idents(combinedOBJ) <- "seurat_clusters"
cluster_list <- combinedOBJ$seurat_clusters %>% unique() %>% unlist
species_deg_list <- c()

data('motifs')
data('motif2tf')

TF_list <- motif2tf$tf %>% unique

## Marmoset独自のクラスタ7用
combinedOBJ$c_7and6 <- combinedOBJ$seurat_clusters %>% as.character()
combinedOBJ$c_7and6[!combinedOBJ$c_7and6 %in% c(6,7)] <- "Other"
combinedOBJ$c_7and6[combinedOBJ$c_7and6 == 6 & combinedOBJ$species == "marmoset"] <- "Other"

ClusterAverageEXP <- AverageExpression( combinedOBJ,group.by = c("species","seurat_clusters"), assays = "RNA"  )$RNA %>% as.data.frame
tmpClusterAverageEXP2 <- AverageExpression( subset(combinedOBJ , seurat_clusters %in% c(7,6)),group.by ="species", assays = "RNA"  )$RNA %>% as.data.frame
ClusterAverageEXP[,"human_6and7"] <- tmpClusterAverageEXP2[ ,"human"]
ClusterAverageEXP[,"marmoset_6and7"] <- tmpClusterAverageEXP2[ ,"marmoset"]


log2fc_limit = 1.5
log2fc_tf_limit = 1.5

#+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
# Overall Species DEG
#+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
overall_spe_deg <- FindMarkers(combinedOBJ, ident.1 = "human", ident.2 = "marmoset", 
                               group.by = "species" , verbose = FALSE)  %>%
  mutate( State = if_else( avg_log2FC > 0 ,"HumanHigh","MarmosetHigh") ) %>%
  filter( p_val_adj  < 0.05 )

overall_spe_deg.filter <- overall_spe_deg %>% 
  mutate( diff_pct =  abs(pct.1-pct.2) ) %>% 
  filter( diff_pct > 0.2 )%>%
  mutate( gene = rownames(.),
          TF = if_else(gene %in% TF_list , "TF", "Not") ,
          HumanTF =  if_else(gene %in% pando_predictedTF$human , "TF", "Not") ,
          MarmosetTF =if_else(gene %in% pando_predictedTF$marmoset , "TF", "Not") 
          ) %>%
  filter(  (TF == "TF" &  abs(avg_log2FC) > log2fc_tf_limit) |  # TF fiter
           (TF == "Not" &  abs(avg_log2FC) > log2fc_limit )) %>% # Non -tf fiter
  left_join( . , rownames_to_column(ClusterAverageEXP,var="gene"  ),by="gene")
output.file = paste0( param$outdir , "/overall_spe_deg_list.txt" )
write.table( overall_spe_deg.filter  , file =output.file , 
               quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)

overall_spe_deg_summary <- rbind(
  overall_spe_deg.filter %>%
    group_by( State) %>% 
    summarize( n = n()) %>% 
    mutate( TF ="allgene") %>%
    as.data.frame ,
  overall_spe_deg.filter %>%
    filter(TF == "TF") %>%
    group_by( State) %>% 
    summarize( n = n()) %>% 
     mutate( TF ="TF Only") %>%
    as.data.frame ,
  overall_spe_deg.filter %>%
    filter(HumanTF == "TF") %>%
    group_by( State) %>% 
    summarize( n = n()) %>% 
     mutate( TF ="HumanTF") %>%
    as.data.frame,
  overall_spe_deg.filter %>%
    filter(MarmosetTF == "TF") %>%
    group_by( State) %>% 
    summarize( n = n()) %>% 
     mutate( TF ="MarmosetTF") %>%
    as.data.frame
)
output.file = paste0( param$outdir , "/overall_spe_deg_summary.txt" )
write.table( overall_spe_deg_summary  , file =output.file , 
               quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)

#+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
# conserved & cluster  Species DEG
#+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
species_deg_list <- c()

Idents(combinedOBJ) <- "seurat_clusters"
for( select_clsuter in cluster_list){
  if(  select_clsuter == "11" ){
    next
  }
  print( select_clsuter)

  # Differential in Cluster
  deg.markers <- FindMarkers(combinedOBJ, ident.1 = "human", ident.2 = "marmoset", group.by = "species" ,
                             subset.ident = select_clsuter, verbose = FALSE)
  deg.markers$cluster <- select_clsuter
  deg.markers$gene <- rownames(deg.markers)
  species_deg_list <- rbind(species_deg_list , deg.markers)
}

# human 6とmarmosetの7を比較
Idents(combinedOBJ) <- "c_7and6"
deg.markers <- FindMarkers(combinedOBJ, ident.1 = "human", ident.2 = "marmoset", group.by = "species" ,
                             subset.ident = c(6,7), verbose = FALSE)
deg.markers$cluster <- "6and7"
deg.markers$gene <- rownames(deg.markers)
species_deg_list <- rbind(species_deg_list , deg.markers)

species_deg_list.filtered <- species_deg_list %>%
  filter( p_val_adj  < 0.05 ) %>%
  mutate( State = if_else( avg_log2FC > 0 ,"HumanHigh","MarmosetHigh") ,
          diff_pct =  abs(pct.1-pct.2) ,
          OverallDEG = if_else( gene %in% overall_spe_deg.filter$gene , "OverallDEG","Not" ),
          TF = if_else(gene %in% TF_list , "TF", "Not") ,
          HumanTF =  if_else(gene %in% pando_predictedTF$human , "TF", "Not") ,
          MarmosetTF =if_else(gene %in% pando_predictedTF$marmoset , "TF", "Not") 
          ) %>% 
  filter( diff_pct > 0.2 )%>%
  filter(  TF == "TF" &  abs(avg_log2FC) > log2fc_tf_limit |  # tf fiter
          (TF == "Not" &  abs(avg_log2FC) > log2fc_limit ))  # Non -tf fiter


species_deg_summary <- rbind(
  species_deg_list.filtered %>%
    group_by( State,cluster,OverallDEG) %>% 
    summarize( n = n()) %>% 
    pivot_wider(  names_from= "cluster",values_from="n" ) %>%
    mutate( TF ="allgene") %>%
    as.data.frame ,
  species_deg_list.filtered %>%
    filter(TF == "TF") %>%
    group_by( State,cluster,OverallDEG) %>% 
    summarize( n = n()) %>% 
    pivot_wider(  names_from= "cluster",values_from="n" ) %>%
     mutate( TF ="TF Only") %>%
    as.data.frame ,
  species_deg_list.filtered %>%
    filter(HumanTF == "TF") %>%
    group_by( State,cluster,OverallDEG) %>% 
    summarize( n = n()) %>% 
    pivot_wider(  names_from= "cluster",values_from="n" ) %>%
     mutate( TF ="HumanTF Only") %>%
    as.data.frame ,
  species_deg_list.filtered %>%
    filter(MarmosetTF == "TF") %>%
    group_by( State,cluster,OverallDEG) %>% 
    summarize( n = n()) %>% 
    pivot_wider(  names_from= "cluster",values_from="n" ) %>%
     mutate( TF ="MarmosetTF Only") %>%
    as.data.frame 
)

output.file = paste0( param$outdir , "/species_deg_summary.txt" )
write.table( species_deg_summary  , file =output.file , 
               quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)

species_deg_list.mod <- species_deg_list.filtered %>%
  add_otheceClusterDEG %>%
  make_gene_by_cluster_status() %>%
  mutate(across(contains("Cluster"),
                ~ recode(.x,
                         "DOWN" = "MarmosetHigh",
                         "UP"   = "HumanHigh"))) %>% 
  left_join( . , rownames_to_column(ClusterAverageEXP,var="gene"  ),by="gene")


output.file = paste0( param$outdir, "/species_deg_list.txt" )
write.table( species_deg_list.mod , file =output.file , 
               quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)


saveobj <- list(  
                  nonfiltered.deglist = species_deg_list,
                  deglist =species_deg_list.filtered ,
                  overall_spe_deg.filter= overall_spe_deg.filter,
                  species_deg_summary = species_deg_summary,
                  overall_spe_deg_summary = overall_spe_deg_summary ,
                  ClusterAverageEXP = ClusterAverageEXP
                )
output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/DEGlist.rds")
saveRDS(saveobj ,output.file )

## barplot
clusterLevle <- c( "1","5","3","6and7","8","2","4","0","10"  )
numDEG_baplot_data <- species_deg_list.filtered %>% 
  group_by( cluster , State , TF  ) %>% 
  filter( cluster %in% clusterLevle) %>%
  summarise( n = n()) %>% 
  ungroup() %>%
  pivot_wider( names_from ="TF",values_from = "n" ) %>% 
  mutate( Total = TF + Not ,
          Label = paste0( Total ,"(",TF,")" ),
          cluster = factor(cluster , levels = c(clusterLevle) ),
          State = if_else( State == "HumanHigh", "DEG(Human up)", "DEG(Marmoset up)" )
          ) %>% 
  group_by( cluster ) %>% 
  mutate( sum = sum(Total) ) %>%
  ungroup()



top_bar <- ggplot(numDEG_baplot_data , aes(x = cluster, y = Total, fill = State)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = c("DEG(Human up)" = "red", "DEG(Marmoset up)" = "blue"),
      labels = c(
        "DEG(Human up)"   = "<span style='color:red'>DEG(Human up)</span>",
        "DEG(Marmoset up)" = "<span style='color:blue'>DEG(Marmoset up)</span>"
      )
    )+
    
    labs(title = "# of speceis-specific DEGs(# of TFs)\n",
         x = "Cluster", y = "Number of DEGs", fill =NULL) +
    geom_text(
      data = numDEG_baplot_data %>% filter(State == "DEG(Human up)"),
      aes(y = sum , label = Label),  # bar上部
      vjust = -0.3, size = 8
    ) +
    geom_text(
      data = numDEG_baplot_data %>% filter(State == "DEG(Marmoset up)"),
      aes(y = 0, label = Label),  # x軸直下
      vjust = 1 , size = 8
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off")+

    theme_classic() +
    theme(plot.margin = margin(t=10, r=10, b=10, l=10))+  # 下マージン確保
    theme(
      text = element_text(size = 30),          # 全体基本サイズ
      axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 30 ),
      axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 30 ) ,
      axis.title.x =  element_text(size = 30 ),
      axis.title.y =  element_blank(),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 30),   # legend
      plot.title = element_text(size = 30),     # title
      legend.position = "right") +
    theme(legend.text = element_markdown())

output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/Num_of_Speceis_DEG_BarPlot" )
wggplot( top_bar , file = output.file ,width = 20, height = 10 )



####################

wb_tf <- createWorkbook()
customStyle <- createStyle(
  fontName = "Arial",
  fontSize = 11,halign = "center",valign = "center"
  #textDecoration = "bold"
)

# 
sheet <- paste0("DEGSummary")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
all_summary_plot <- overall_spe_deg_summary %>% 
  filter( TF %in% c("allgene","TF Only")  ) %>%
  pivot_wider( names_from = "TF",values_from = "n") %>%
  rowwise()%>% 
  mutate(DEG = paste0( allgene, "(" , `TF Only`,")" ) ) %>%
  select( State , DEG) %>% 
  rename("Species" = "DEG" , "DEG(TF)" = "DEG")

species_deg_summary_plot <- species_deg_summary %>% 
  pivot_longer( ! c( State, OverallDEG,TF),names_to = "clsuter",  values_to = "n") %>%
  group_by( State , clsuter,TF) %>% 
  mutate( total = if_else( OverallDEG == "Not" , sum(n) , n ) ) %>% 
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-n) %>%
  filter( TF %in% c("allgene","TF Only")  ) %>%
  pivot_wider( names_from = "TF",values_from = "total") %>%
  rowwise()%>% 
  mutate(DEG = paste0( allgene, "(" , `TF Only`,")" ) ) %>%
  select( State,OverallDEG , clsuter , DEG) %>% 
  pivot_wider( names_from = "clsuter" , values_from = "DEG") %>%
  mutate( OverallDEG = if_else( OverallDEG == "Not" , "Cluster DEGs" ,
                                "Overlap with total DEGs " ) ,
          ) %>% 
  rename( "Species" = "State", "DEG" = "OverallDEG" ) %>%
  select( Species , DEG , "0","1","2","3","4","5","6","6and7","7","8","9","10","12")


writeData(wb_tf, sheet, all_summary_plot)
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, species_deg_summary_plot, startRow = nrow(all_summary_plot) +3)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, rows = 1:100, cols = 1:20, gridExpand = TRUE)

sheet <- paste0("Overall SpeciesDEG")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-overall_spe_deg.filter
colnames(write_data) <-  colnames(write_data) %>% str_to_title()
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

sheet <- paste0("Cluster SpeceiesDEG")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<- species_deg_list.mod
colnames(write_data) <-  colnames(write_data) %>% str_to_title()
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)
outfile  = paste0( param$outdir , "/SpeciesDEGlist_260617.xlsx" )
saveWorkbook(wb_tf, file =outfile, overwrite = TRUE)



```

### Chromvar
```{r}
#motif_back
#paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/chromvar_obj/","motif_ix_", spe, ".rds")
combinedOBJ$seurat_clusters_67 <- combinedOBJ$seurat_clusters
combinedOBJ$seurat_clusters_67[ combinedOBJ$seurat_clusters_67 %in% c(6,7) ] <- "6and7"
cellLabel = paste0(combinedOBJ@meta.data$species, "_",
                   combinedOBJ@meta.data$seurat_clusters_67 )
names(cellLabel) <- rownames(combinedOBJ@meta.data)

selecet_range <- 5000
deg_cluster_list <-  c( "1","5","3","6and7","8","2","4","0","10"  )
group_col="cluster"

chromvar_result <- c( human = NULL ,marmoset = NULL)

for(species in c("human","marmoset")){
  chromvar_result_species <- setNames( vector("list", length(deg_cluster_list)) , deg_cluster_list)
  chormvar_obj_list <- readRDS(paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/chromvar_obj/","motif_ix_", species, ".rds"))
  annotations <- Annotation(chormvar_obj_list$seuratobj@data[["ATAC"]])
  peak_region <- rownames(chormvar_obj_list$seuratobj@data[["ATAC"]])
  transcript_annotation <- annotations[mcols(annotations)$type == "transcript", ]
  gr_resized <- resize_by_strand_with_region_string(transcript_annotation, up = selecet_range, down = selecet_range)
  gene_closest_peak <- get_peaks_per_gene(gr_resized ,peak_region  )

  state =  if_else(species == "marmoset", "MarmosetHigh","HumanHigh" )
  select_col <- c( "p_val" ,"avg_log2FC","pct.1","pct.2","p_val_adj",
             "cluster","gene","State","diff_pct","OverallDEG","TF")
  tmp_deg_list <- species_deg_list.mod %>%
    select( all_of(select_col)) %>%
    mutate( type = if_else(  State == state, "up", "down" ),
            #clusterid = cluster,
            spe = species) %>%
    filter( type == "up" )
  
  for(cluster_id in deg_cluster_list ){
    # ここで geneの情報を取得、転写開始点の周辺peakを抽出する
    cluster_gene <- tmp_deg_list %>% filter( .data[[group_col]] == cluster_id ) %>% select(gene , TF, type)
    TF_deg <- cluster_gene %>% filter( TF =="TF") %>% pull(gene)
    deg_gene_around_peak <- gene_closest_peak %>% filter( gene_name %in%  cluster_gene$gene ) %>% pull(query_region)
    
    # DEG around Peak 以外は FALSE にする
    motif_mat <- assays(chormvar_obj_list$motif_ix)[[1]]  # motif x peak
    motif_mat_deg <- motif_mat
    motif_mat_deg[,] <- FALSE
    motif_mat_deg[rownames(motif_mat_deg) %in% deg_gene_around_peak, ] <-
        motif_mat[rownames(motif_mat) %in% deg_gene_around_peak, ]
    
    # computing deviations
    chromvarobj_dev <- computeDeviations(object = chormvar_obj_list$obj, 
                                         background_peaks =  chormvar_obj_list$bg_peak ,
                                         annotations = motif_mat_deg)
    deviations_matrix = deviationScores(chromvarobj_dev) %>% 
      as.data.frame %>% 
      mutate( motif = rownames(.),) %>% 
      left_join( . , motif2tf %>% select(motif,tf)) %>% 
      select(motif,tf, everything())
    
    average_deviation <- deviations_matrix %>% 
      pivot_longer(cols = - c(motif,tf) ,names_to = "Cell",values_to = "score") %>%
      mutate( cluster = cellLabel[Cell] ) %>% 
      group_by(cluster,motif,tf) %>%
      summarise( average = mean(score,na.rm = TRUE) ) %>% 
      ungroup() %>%
      group_by(cluster,tf) %>%
      summarise( average_score = sum(average) ) %>% 
      ungroup() %>%
      mutate( speceis = gsub("_.*", "" , cluster),
              cluster_id = gsub("human_|marmoset_", "" , cluster)
              ) 
      
      #separate( cluster ,into =c("species","cluster_id") , sep = "_" )
    chromvar_result_species[[cluster_id]] = average_deviation
  }
  chromvar_result[[species]] = chromvar_result_species
}

# 6and7のバグ対処
for(species in c("human","marmoset")){
  for(cluster_id in deg_cluster_list ){
    chromvar_result[[species]] [[cluster_id]] <- chromvar_result[[species]] [[cluster_id]] %>% 
      mutate( 
        cluster = if_else( cluster == paste0(species,"_NA"),  paste0(species,"_6and7") , cluster) ,
        cluster_id = if_else( cluster_id =="NA" ,  "6and7" , cluster_id)
        )
  }
}


output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/Chromvar_deviation_resultrds")
saveRDS(chromvar_result ,output.file )
# chromvar_result <- readRDS(paste0( param$outdir  ,"/Chromvar_deviation_resultrds"))

merged_chromvar_data_list <- c( human = NULL ,marmoset = NULL)

for ( speceis in c("human","marmoset")){
  #forPlotData[[species]][,"chromvar"] = NA
  merged_chromvar_data = NULL
  for(select_cluster_id in deg_cluster_list ){
    chromvar_dev <- chromvar_result[[speceis]][[select_cluster_id]]
    cid = select_cluster_id
    cluster_chromvar_dev <- chromvar_dev %>% 
      filter( cluster_id == cid ) %>% 
      mutate( cluster = select_cluster_id )
    merged_chromvar_data <- rbind(merged_chromvar_data , cluster_chromvar_dev)
  }
  merged_chromvar_data <- merged_chromvar_data %>% 
    select( tf ,average_score, cluster) %>%
    rename( "Chromvar_deviation" = "average_score" )
  merged_chromvar_data_list[[speceis]] = merged_chromvar_data
}


output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/merged_chromvar_data_list.rds")
saveRDS(merged_chromvar_data_list ,output.file )

rm(chromvar_result )
gc()

```


### pando overrlap

```{r}

merged_chromvar_data_list <- readRDS( paste0(param$outdir  ,"/merged_chromvar_data_list.rds"))

#=========================
## Overlap Pando
#===========================

cellLabel = paste0(combinedOBJ@meta.data$species, "_",
                   combinedOBJ@meta.data$seurat_clusters )
names(cellLabel) <- rownames(combinedOBJ@meta.data)
Cluster_exp_pct <- GetExpRate(combinedOBJ , assay="RNA" ,layer="counts", cellLabel  )


Cluster_exp_pct <- rbind(Cluster_exp_pct , 
      human_6and7 = Cluster_exp_pct["human_6",],
      marmoset_6and7 = Cluster_exp_pct["marmoset_7",]
)

long_ClusterAverageEXP <- ClusterAverageEXP[ intersect(TF_list,rownames(ClusterAverageEXP)) , ]%>%
  rownames_to_column(var="tf") %>% 
  pivot_longer( cols = -tf ,names_to = "group",values_to = "EXP") %>%
  separate_wider_delim( group ,delim = "_" ,names = c("species","clusterid")) %>% 
  filter( clusterid != 11 ) %>%
  mutate(clusterid = gsub("-","_",clusterid) )


allgeneset <- rownames(combinedOBJ )
deg_cluster_list <- unique( species_deg_list.mod$cluster )
group_col="cluster" 
#spe = "human"

#clusterLevle <- c(  "1","5","3","6","7","6and7","8","2","4","0","9","10","12"  )
clusterLevle <- c( "1","5","3","6and7","8","2","4","0","10"  )
pando_overlap_list <- list( human = NULL ,marmoset = NULL , human_To_marmoset = NULL)
pando_overlap_summary_list <-list( human = NULL ,marmoset = NULL, human_To_marmoset = NULL)
#pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg <-list( human = NULL ,marmoset = NULL, human_To_marmoset = NULL)

for ( species_type in c("human","marmoset","human_To_marmoset")){
  pando_spe <- if_else(species_type == "human_To_marmoset", "marmoset",species_type )
  species <- if_else(species_type == "human_To_marmoset", "human",species_type )
  
  state =  if_else(species == "marmoset", "MarmosetHigh","HumanHigh" )
  pando_grn <- pandores[[pando_spe]]
  select_col <- c( "p_val" ,"avg_log2FC","pct.1","pct.2","p_val_adj",
             "cluster","gene","State","diff_pct","OverallDEG","TF")
  tmp_deg_list <- species_deg_list.mod %>%
    select( all_of(select_col)) %>%
    mutate( type = if_else(  State == state, "up", "down" ),
            #clusterid = cluster,
            spe = species)
  
  pando_overlap_list_spe <- c()
  pando_overlap_summary_list_spe <-c()
  
  for(cluster_id in clusterLevle ){
    
    gene_datasete  <-  prep_gene_list( allgeneset,species ,tmp_deg_list ,TF_list , 
                                       Cluster_exp_pct ,group_col="cluster" , cluster_id)
    gene_deg_type = gene_datasete$gene_deg_type
    gene_deg_summary =  gene_datasete$gene_deg_summary
     
    pando_overlap <-check_tf_tgs_pair_deg(pando_grn ,gene_deg_type , species,cluster_id)
    pando_overlap_summary <- check_tf_overlap_stats (pando_overlap  ,gene_deg_summary  )
  
    pando_overlap_list_spe <- rbind(pando_overlap_list_spe,pando_overlap)
    pando_overlap_summary_list_spe <-rbind(pando_overlap_summary_list_spe,pando_overlap_summary)
  }
  
  output.file = paste0( param$outdir, "/roundCluster_DEG_GRNoverlap_TF-TargetPair",species_type,".txt" )
  write.table( pando_overlap_list_spe , file =output.file , 
                 quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)
  output.file = paste0( param$outdir, "/roundCluster_DEG_GRNoverlap_TFsummary",species_type,".txt" )
  write.table( pando_overlap_summary_list_spe , file =output.file , 
                 quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)

  pando_overlap_list[[species_type]] <- pando_overlap_list_spe
  pando_overlap_summary_list[[species_type]]  <- ADDexp_and_Rank( pando_overlap_summary_list_spe,
                                            long_ClusterAverageEXP,clusterLevle,addcol = NULL,
                                            c( "tf" ="tf" , "spe"="species","clusterid"="clusterid"  )
                                            )
}


plotClsuter <- c( "1","5","3","6and7","8","2","4","0","10"  )
forPlotData <- pando_overlap_summary_list

for(speceis in names(pando_overlap_summary_list )) {
  speceis_cat <- if_else( speceis == "human_To_marmoset" , "human", speceis)
  forPlotData[[speceis]] <-forPlotData[[speceis]] %>% 
    filter( clusterid  %in% plotClsuter)%>%
    mutate(  clusterid = factor( clusterid ,levels=plotClsuter )) %>%
    left_join(. , merged_chromvar_data_list[[speceis_cat]] ) %>%
        mutate(  
             cluster = factor(  paste0( "Cluster" , cluster) ,levels= paste0( "Cluster" , plotClsuter) )
             )
}


#++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
# TF rnakPlot
#++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
#common_tf_rankplot <- select_common_gene( forPlotData[["human"]] ,forPlotData[["marmoset"]],  overlap_threshold = 10)
common_tf_data <- rankplot_commonGene( forPlotData[["human"]] ,forPlotData[["marmoset"]], selectnum = 10)


spe ="human"
plot_data <- forPlotData[[spe]]
statics_data <- forStatsdata[[spe]]
human_plot <-  TFrankPlot_scatter(plot_data ,statics_data ,
                                  common_tf = common_tf_data$common_geme ,
                                  plot_tf = common_tf_data[[spe]],
                                  overlaplimit = 10,
                                  textsize =15, plot_tf_Limit = 10,
                                  
                                  psize = 2 )

output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/TF_RankplotChromvar_",spe )
wggplot( p =   wrap_plots(human_plot,ncol = 3) , file = output.file ,width = 15, height = 12 )


spe ="marmoset"
plot_data <- forPlotData[[spe]]
statics_data <- forStatsdata[[spe]]
matmoset_plot  <- TFrankPlot_scatter(plot_data ,statics_data ,
                                  common_tf = common_tf_data$common_geme ,
                                  plot_tf = common_tf_data[[spe]],
                                  overlaplimit = 10,
                                  force_val =30,min_seg_length = 0.2 ,
                                  textsize =15, plot_tf_Limit = 10,
                                  psize = 2 )

output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/TF_RankplotChromvar_",spe )
wggplot( p =   wrap_plots(matmoset_plot,ncol = 3) , file = output.file ,width = 15, height = 12 )



common_tf_rankplot_mpd <- select_common_gene( forPlotData[["human_To_marmoset"]] ,forPlotData[["marmoset"]],  overlap_threshold = 10)

spe ="human_To_marmoset"
plot_data <- forPlotData[[spe]]
statics_data <- forStatsdata[[spe]]
human_plot <-  TFrankPlot_scatter(plot_data ,statics_data ,
                                  common_tf = common_tf_rankplot_mpd ,
                                  plot_tf = common_tf_rankplot_mpd[[spe]],
                                  overlaplimit = 10,
                                  force_val =30,min_seg_length = 0.2 ,
                                  textsize =15, plot_tf_Limit = 10,
                                  psize = 2 )

output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/TF_RankplotChromvar_",spe,"_marmosetPando" )
wggplot( p =   wrap_plots(human_plot,ncol = 3) , file = output.file ,width = 15, height = 12  )

spe ="marmoset"
plot_data <- forPlotData[[spe]]
statics_data <- forStatsdata[[spe]]
matmoset_plot  <- TFrankPlot_scatter( plot_data ,statics_data ,
                                  common_tf = common_tf_rankplot_mpd ,
                                  plot_tf = common_tf_rankplot_mpd[[spe]],
                                  overlaplimit = 10,
                                  force_val =30,min_seg_length = 0.2 ,
                                  textsize =15, plot_tf_Limit = 10,
                                  psize = 2)

output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/TF_RankplotChromvar_",spe,"_marmosetPando"  )
wggplot( p =   wrap_plots(matmoset_plot,ncol = 3) , file = output.file ,width = 15, height = 12  )


#++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
# Overlap Bubble Plot
#++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
#plotClsuter <- c( "1","5","3","6and7","8","2","4","0","10"  )
#forPlotData <- pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg
for(i in names(pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg )) {
  forPlotData[[i]] <-forPlotData[[i]] %>% 
    filter( clusterid  %in% plotClsuter)%>%
    mutate(  clusterid = factor( clusterid ,levels=plotClsuter ),
              cluster = factor( cluster ,levels=plotClsuter )
             #cluster = factor(  paste0( "Cluster" , cluster) ,levels= paste0( "Cluster" , plotClsuter) )
             )
}

updeg_conditions <- TRUE
overlap_threshold_upper <- 20
Ranking_within <- 100

common_tf1 <- intersect(forPlotData[["human"]] %>% 
                         filter( rank <= Ranking_within & Max_overlap >=overlap_threshold_upper) %>% pull(tf) %>% unique(), 
                       forPlotData[["marmoset"]] %>% 
                         filter( rank <= Ranking_within & Max_overlap >=overlap_threshold_upper) %>% pull(tf) %>% unique()
                       )

common_tf_marmoPando <- intersect(forPlotData[["human_To_marmoset"]] %>% 
                         filter( rank <= Ranking_within & Max_overlap >=overlap_threshold_upper) %>% pull(tf) %>% unique(), 
                       forPlotData[["marmoset"]] %>% 
                         filter( rank <= Ranking_within & Max_overlap >=overlap_threshold_upper) %>% pull(tf) %>% unique() 
                       )

reg_col = c( "active_uptf"  = "#FF0000","negative_uptf" = "#0000FF" ,
             "active_nondeg" ="#FF7E7E", "negative_nondeg" = "#008BFF" ,
             "active_downtf" ="#FFE8EC", "negative_downtf" = "#00FFFF" ,
             "notoverlap" = "white"
             )

reg_col = c( "active_uptf"  = "#FF0000","negative_uptf" = "#0000FF" ,
             "active_nondeg" ="#FF8700", "negative_nondeg" = "#008BFF" ,
             "active_downtf" ="#FF0082", "negative_downtf" = "#00FFFF" ,
             "notoverlap" = "white"
             )

border_col = c( "UpDEG" = "#000000" , "DownDEG" = "#6A5ACD", "NonDEG" ="#D3D3D3")




output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/bubblePlot_Legend.pdf")
pdf( output.file , height = 8,width = 18)
heatmapLegend(reg_col , border_col)
dev.off()




c(
  Max_overlap = overlap_threshold_upper,
  Ranking_within = Ranking_within,
  test
)

spe = "human_To_marmoset"
p<- plot_all_complexheatmap(
  plot_all = forPlotData[[spe]],
  common_tf = common_tf_marmoPando,
  kclust = 8,
  bubble_ratio = 10 ,
  top_ratio    = 1 ,
  tf_colratio = 1/3 ,
  reg_col = reg_col,
  border_col = border_col ,
    Max_overlap = overlap_threshold_upper,
  Ranking_within = Ranking_within,
  flat_fill = F
)

output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/TF_Overlap_DotPLot_",spe ,"_marmosetPando.pdf")
pdf( output.file , height = 10,width = 6)
plot(p$plot)
dev.off()

p$tflist$gene[! p$tflist$gene %in% new_order ]

new_order <- c( "CTCFL","RUNX1","GLIS3","MYT1L","ZFPM2","AEBP2","PRDM6","TRERF1","ST18","ESR1","POU6F2","TFEC","EBF3","ZBTB7C","SOX6","TOX","ESR2","ZNF521","NFIB","FOXP2","HIVEP3","ETV1","TBX18","THRB","ID4","SOX5","SMAD9","HIVEP1","TRPS1","ZNF217","ZNF280C","ZNF462","L3MBTL3","NFAT5","PBX3"

)
mod_list <- p$tflist %>% 
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate( order = which( new_order == gene) )
  
pmod<- plot_all_complexheatmap(
  plot_all = forPlotData[[spe]],
  common_tf = common_tf_marmoPando,
  tf_order_df = mod_list,
  kclust = 8,
  bubble_ratio = 10 ,
  top_ratio    = 1 ,
  tf_colratio = 1/3 ,
  reg_col = reg_col,
  border_col = border_col ,
  Max_overlap = overlap_threshold_upper,
  Ranking_within = Ranking_within,
  flat_fill = F
)

output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/TF_Overlap_DotPLot_",spe ,"_marmosetPando_reorder.pdf")
pdf( output.file , height = 10,width = 6)
plot(pmod$plot)
dev.off()

#####################
# Marmoset Matmoset Pand
#####################
spe = "marmoset"
p<- plot_all_complexheatmap(
  plot_all = forPlotData[[spe]],
  common_tf = common_tf_marmoPando,
  kclust = 8,
  bubble_ratio = 10 ,
  top_ratio    = 1 ,
  tf_colratio = 1/3 ,
  reg_col = reg_col,
  border_col = border_col ,
  Max_overlap = overlap_threshold_upper,
  Ranking_within = Ranking_within,
  flat_fill = F
)

output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/TF_Overlap_DotPLot_",spe ,"_marmosetPando.pdf")
pdf( output.file , height = 10,width = 7)
plot(p$plot)
dev.off()

new_order <- c("MEOX2","MAF",
  "EGR2","PLAGL1","EBF1","TFAP2A","WT1","ESRRG","EGR1","ZNF217","EBF2","TOX3","NR2F1","SOX4","SMAD7",
  "ZNF395","ZNF536","ASCL1","ASCL2","SALL4",
  "ZBTB16","RHOXF1","MLLT10","ZNF521","HMGB2","BCL11A","ZNF669","NPAS3","HMGA2"
)

#p$tflist$gene[! p$tflist$gene %in% new_order ]

mod_list <- p$tflist %>% 
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate( order = which( new_order == gene) )
pmod<- plot_all_complexheatmap(
  plot_all = forPlotData[[spe]],
  common_tf = common_tf_marmoPando,
  tf_order_df = mod_list,
  kclust = 8,
  bubble_ratio = 10 ,
  top_ratio    = 1 ,
  tf_colratio = 1/3 ,
  reg_col = reg_col,
  border_col = border_col ,
  Max_overlap = overlap_threshold_upper,
  Ranking_within = Ranking_within,
  flat_fill = F
)

output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/TF_Overlap_DotPLot_",spe ,"_marmosetPando_reorder.pdf")
pdf( output.file , height = 10,width = 6)
plot(pmod$plot)
dev.off()


#####################
# Human Pand
#####################
spe = "human"
p<- plot_all_complexheatmap(
  plot_all = forPlotData[[spe]],
  Max_overlap = overlap_threshold_upper,
  Ranking_within = Ranking_within,
  common_tf = common_tf1,
  kclust = 8,
  bubble_ratio = 2 ,
  top_ratio    = 1 ,
  tf_colratio = 1/3,
  reg_col = reg_col,
  border_col = border_col ,
  flat_fill = F
)
output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/TF_Overlap_DotPLot_",spe ,".pdf")
pdf( output.file , height = 4,width = 8)
plot(p$plot)
dev.off()


new_order <- c(
  
  "HMGA1","ZFPM2","PRDM6","NFIB","ZNF521","ZNF516","HIVEP1","THRB","ZNF280C","ZNF217","HMGB1")
#　　p$tflist$gene[! p$tflist$gene %in% new_order ]

mod_list <- p$tflist %>% 
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate( order = which( new_order == gene) )
pmod<- plot_all_complexheatmap(
  plot_all = forPlotData[[spe]],
  Max_overlap = overlap_threshold_upper,
  Ranking_within = Ranking_within,
  common_tf = common_tf1,
  tf_order_df = mod_list,
  kclust = 8,
  bubble_ratio = 2 ,
  top_ratio    = 0.5 ,
  tf_colratio = 1/3 ,
  reg_col = reg_col,
  border_col = border_col ,
  flat_fill = F
)

output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/TF_Overlap_DotPLot_",spe ,"_reorder.pdf")
pdf( output.file , height = 6,width = 6)
plot(pmod$plot)
dev.off()

#####################
# Marmoset Pand
#####################

spe = "marmoset"
p<- plot_all_complexheatmap(
  plot_all = forPlotData[[spe]],
  Max_overlap = overlap_threshold_upper,
  Ranking_within = Ranking_within,
  common_tf = common_tf1,
  kclust = 8,
  bubble_ratio = 10 ,
  top_ratio    = 1 ,
  tf_colratio = 1/3 ,
  reg_col = reg_col,
  border_col = border_col ,
  flat_fill = F
)
output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/TF_Overlap_DotPLot_",spe ,".pdf")
pdf( output.file , height = 10,width = 7)
plot(p$plot)
dev.off()

new_order <- c("MEOX2","MAF",
  "EGR2","PLAGL1","EBF1","TFAP2A","WT1","ESRRG","EGR1","ZNF217","EBF2","TOX3","NR2F1","SOX4","SMAD7",
  "ZNF395","ZNF536","ASCL1","ASCL2","SALL4",
  "ZBTB16","RHOXF1","MLLT10","ZNF521","HMGB2","BCL11A","ZNF669","NPAS3","HMGA2"
)

#p$tflist$gene[! p$tflist$gene %in% new_order ]

mod_list <- p$tflist %>% 
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate( order = which( new_order == gene) )
pmod<- plot_all_complexheatmap(
  plot_all = forPlotData[[spe]],
  Max_overlap = overlap_threshold_upper,
  Ranking_within = Ranking_within,
  common_tf = common_tf1,
  tf_order_df = mod_list,
  kclust = 8,
  bubble_ratio = 10 ,
  top_ratio    = 1 ,
  tf_colratio = 1/3 ,
  reg_col = reg_col,
  border_col = border_col ,
  flat_fill = F
)

output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/TF_Overlap_DotPLot_",spe ,"_reorder.pdf")
pdf( output.file , height = 10,width = 6)
plot(pmod$plot)
dev.off()

saveobj <- list(  tf_tgs_pair= pando_overlap_list[[species]] ,
  tf_spe_summ = pando_overlap_summary_list[[species]]
  #tf_spe_summ = pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg[[species]]
  )
output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/TF_Overlap_DotPLot_v2.rds")
saveRDS(saveobj ,output.file )

####################

wb_tf <- createWorkbook()
customStyle <- createStyle(
  fontName = "Arial",
  fontSize = 11,halign = "center",valign = "center"
  #textDecoration = "bold"
)

# --- シート1: opness.bin ---
sheet <- paste0("DEGSummary")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
all_summary_plot <- overall_spe_deg_summary %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = "TF" ,values_from = "n") %>% 
  rename( "Not-TF DEG" = "allgene" , "TF" = "TF Only" )

species_deg_summary_plot <- species_deg_summary %>% 
  pivot_longer( ! c( State, OverallDEG,TF),names_to = "clsuter",  values_to = "n") %>%
  group_by( State , clsuter,TF) %>% 
  mutate( total = if_else( OverallDEG == "Not" , sum(n) , n ) ) %>% 
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-n) %>%
  pivot_wider( names_from = "clsuter" , values_from = "total") %>%
  mutate( OverallDEG = if_else( OverallDEG == "Not" , "Total" , "OverallDEG" ) ,
          TF = if_else( TF == "allgene","Not-TF DEG", TF )
          ) %>% 
  rename( "species" = "State" ) %>%
  filter(OverallDEG  == "Total"  )


writeData(wb_tf, sheet, all_summary_plot)
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, species_deg_summary_plot, startRow = nrow(all_summary_plot) +3)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, rows = 1:100, cols = 1:20, gridExpand = TRUE)

sheet <- paste0("Overall SpeciesDEG")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-overall_spe_deg.filter
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

sheet <- paste0("Speceies DEG")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<- species_deg_list.mod
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)


sheet <- paste0("Human_GRNoverlap")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-pando_overlap_summary_list$human%>% 
  select( tf,cluster,spe ,DegFlag, TotalTargets,
             N_targets_active,N_targets_negative,N_UpTarget,N_DownTarget,
             Overlaprate_avtive,Overlaprate_negative,EXP,Max_overlap,rank)%>% 
  rename(
        "TF" ="tf", "Cluster" ="cluster" , "Species" = "spe","Expression" = "EXP"
             )


writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

sheet <- paste0("Marmoset_GRNoverlap")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-pando_overlap_summary_list$marmoset%>% 
  select( tf,cluster,spe ,DegFlag, TotalTargets,
             N_targets_active,N_targets_negative,N_UpTarget,N_DownTarget,
             Overlaprate_avtive,Overlaprate_negative,EXP,Max_overlap,rank)%>% 
  rename(
        "TF" ="tf", "Cluster" ="cluster" , "Species" = "spe","Expression" = "EXP"
             )


writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

sheet <- paste0("HumanDEG_MarmosetGRNoverlap")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-pando_overlap_summary_list$human_To_marmoset%>% 
  select( tf,cluster,spe ,DegFlag, TotalTargets,
             N_targets_active,N_targets_negative,N_UpTarget,N_DownTarget,
             Overlaprate_avtive,Overlaprate_negative,EXP,Max_overlap,rank)%>% 
  rename(
        "TF" ="tf", "Cluster" ="cluster" , "Species" = "spe","Expression" = "EXP"
             )

writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

outfile  = paste0( param$outdir , "/SpeciesDEGlist_v3.xlsx" )
saveWorkbook(wb_tf, file =outfile, overwrite = TRUE)

```



### GO 

```{r}

#############
# GO
#############
forGO_species_deg_list.mod <- species_deg_list.mod %>%
  unite("State_cluster", State, cluster ,  sep = "_", remove = FALSE) %>%
  group_by(State_cluster) %>%
  summarise(gene = list(gene)) %>%
  tibble::deframe()   # → 名前付きリストに変換

go_dir = paste0( param$outdir ,"/SpeciesDEG_GO/" ) 
if (!dir.exists(go_dir)) {
  dir.create(go_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  message("ディレクトリを作成しました: ", go_dir)
} else {
  message("output ディレクトリは既に存在します: ", go_dir)
}

gores <- MakeGOenrich_DT( forGO_species_deg_list.mod, outdir = go_dir  )

#go_dir  = paste0( param$outdir ,"/SubclusterDEG_GO/" ) 
#go_dir = paste0( param$outdir ,"/SpeciesDEG_GO/" ) 
#module_name = names(forGO_branch_deg_list)[17]
#cate = "BP"

pando_grn_comb <- rbind( pandores[["marmoset"]] %>% mutate(spe = "marmoset"),
                        pandores[["human"]] %>% mutate(spe = "human") ) %>% 
  mutate(
    type = case_when(
                      estimate > 0 & spe == "human" ~ "HumanHigh",
                      estimate < 0  &spe == "human" ~ "MarmosetHigh",
                      estimate > 0 & spe == "marmoset" ~ "MarmosetHigh",
                      estimate < 0  &spe == "marmoset" ~  "HumanHigh",
                      TRUE ~ NA # デフォルト値
                      ))
    #type = if_else( estimate > 0 ,"HumanHigh", "MarmosetHigh" ) ) 

alldeg_list <- list()  # ここに各 gores を入れていく
i <- 1
merge_dt <-c()

for (module_name in names(forGO_species_deg_list.mod)) {
  split_data  <- str_split(module_name, "_") %>% unlist()
  cluster_name  <- split_data[2]
  speces <- split_data[1]
  
  for (cate in c("BP", "MF", "CC")) {
    
    geo_name <- paste0(module_name, "_", cate)
    go_file  <- file.path(go_dir, paste0("GO_list_GGMmodule_", geo_name, "_list.txt"))
    if (!file.exists(go_file)) next
    
    gores <- read.delim(go_file, sep = "\t")
    godt <- gores
    godt$sep = speces
    godt$category = cate
    godt$cluster = cluster_name
    
    merge_dt <- rbind(merge_dt ,godt)
    
    gores <- gores %>% 
      mutate(Genes = geneID) %>%
```
