```{r}
      separate_longer_delim(geneID, delim = "/") %>% 
      mutate(tf = if_else(geneID %in% TF_list, "TF", "Not")) %>%
      filter(tf == "TF") 
    
    if(nrow(gores) > 0 ){
      for ( pando_spe in c( "human","marmoset") ) {
        # rev_speces <- if_else( speces == "HumanHigh" ,"MarmosetHigh" ,"HumanHigh" )
        rev_speces = case_when(
                                speces == "HumanHigh" & pando_spe == "human" ~ "HumanHigh",
                                speces == "HumanHigh" & pando_spe == "marmoset" ~ "MarmosetHigh",
                                speces == "MarmosetHigh" & pando_spe == "marmoset" ~ "MarmosetHigh",
                                speces == "MarmosetHigh" & pando_spe == "human" ~ "HumanHigh",
                                TRUE ~ "D" # デフォルト値
                                )
        gores_spe <- gores %>%
          select(ID, Description,pvalue,p.adjust, qvalue,
                 geneID, tf, Count,GeneRatio,BgRatio,Genes ) %>% # select( -gene_list)
          rowwise() %>%
          mutate(
            n_DEG_genes = Count ,
            GO_size = unlist(str_split(BgRatio, "/"))[1],
            tf_targets = intersect(
              unlist(str_split(Genes, "/")),
              (pando_grn_comb %>% 
                 filter(tf == geneID, type == rev_speces, spe == pando_spe) %>% 
                 pull(target))
            ) %>% paste( . , collapse = ",") ,
            n_overlap = if_else( tf_targets == "", 
                                       0,
                                       unlist(str_split(tf_targets, ",")) %>% length()
                                       ),
            tf = paste0(geneID,"(",n_overlap,")"),
            targets = paste0(tf,"->",tf_targets)
          ) %>% 
          ungroup() %>%  # rowwise の解除（重要）
          filter(  n_overlap > 0) %>%
          #arrange(ID,desc(n_overlap)) %>%
          arrange(ID,desc(n_overlap)) %>%
          group_by(ID) %>%
          summarise(
            n_overlap = paste0( tf_targets , collapse = "," ) %>%
              str_split(., ",") %>% 
              unlist()%>% 
              unique() %>% 
              length() ,
            #n_overlap = sum(n_overlap),
            TF_list =paste0( tf , collapse = "," ),
            TF_targets =paste0( targets , collapse = ";" ),
            across(everything(), first),
            .groups = "drop"
          ) %>% 
          select(ID, Description,pvalue,p.adjust, qvalue,
                 n_overlap ,n_DEG_genes,GO_size,Genes,TF_list ,TF_targets) %>%
          mutate(
            Overlap_ratio = as.integer(n_overlap) / as.integer(GO_size) ,
            Cluster = cluster_name,
            pando_species = pando_spe ,
            Regulation = speces,
            Category = cate
          )
        # リストに保存
        alldeg_list[[i]] <- gores_spe
        i <- i + 1
      }
    }
    
    if(0){
    gores <- gores %>% 
      mutate(gene_list = geneID) %>%
      separate_longer_delim(geneID, delim = "/") %>% 
      mutate(tf = if_else(geneID %in% TF_list, "TF", "Not")) %>%
      filter(tf == "TF") 
    
    if(nrow(gores) > 0 ){
      gores <- gores %>%
        select(ID, Description, geneID, tf, Count,GeneRatio,BgRatio,gene_list ) %>% # select( -gene_list)
        rowwise() %>%
        mutate(
          n_DEG_genes =unlist(str_split(GeneRatio, "/"))[2],
          go_size = unlist(str_split(BgRatio, "/"))[1],
          tf_targets = intersect(
            unlist(str_split(gene_list, "/")),
            (pando_grn_comb %>% 
               filter(tf == geneID, type == speces) %>% 
               pull(target))
          ) %>% paste( . , collapse = ",") ,
          n_overlap = if_else( tf_targets == "", 
                                     0,
                                     unlist(str_split(tf_targets, ",")) %>% length()
                                     ),
          tf = paste0(geneID,"(",n_overlap,")"),
          targets = paste0(tf,"->",tf_targets)
          
        ) %>% 
        ungroup() %>%  # rowwise の解除（重要）
        filter(  n_overlap > 0) %>%
        #arrange(ID,desc(n_overlap)) %>%
        arrange(ID,desc(n_overlap)) %>%
        group_by(ID) %>%
        summarise(
          n_overlap = sum(n_overlap),
          TF_list =paste0( tf , collapse = "," ),
          TF_targets =paste0( targets , collapse = ";" ),
          across(everything(), first),
          .groups = "drop"
        ) %>% 
        select(ID, Description, n_overlap ,n_DEG_genes,go_size,gene_list,TF_list ,TF_targets , Count) %>%
        mutate(
          Overlap_ratio = as.integer(n_overlap) / as.integer(go_size) ,
          Cluster = cluster_name,
          Regulation = speces,
          Category = cate
        )
      # リストに保存
      alldeg_list[[i]] <- gores
      i <- i + 1
    }
    }
  }
}

# 最後に一括で結合
alldeg.filt <- bind_rows(alldeg_list)
#alldeg.filt <- alldeg %>% filter( tf == "TF" ) %>%  filter( go_target_human >0 | go_target_marmoset  >0 ) 


output.file = paste0( go_dir , "/BranchCluster_DEG_GO_Tflist_filtered.txt" )
write.table( alldeg.filt , file =output.file , 
               quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)

output.file = paste0( go_dir , "/Merged_GO_list.txt" )
write.table( merge_dt , file =output.file , 
               quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)


wb_tf <- createWorkbook()
customStyle <- createStyle(
  fontName = "Arial",
  fontSize = 11,halign = "center",valign = "center"
  #textDecoration = "bold"
)

# --- シート1: opness.bin ---
sheet <- paste0("DEGSummary")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
all_summary_plot <- overall_spe_deg_summary %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = "TF" ,values_from = "n") %>% 
  rename( "Not-TF DEG" = "allgene" , "TF" = "TF Only" )

species_deg_summary_plot <- species_deg_summary %>% 
  pivot_longer( ! c( State, OverallDEG,TF),names_to = "clsuter",  values_to = "n") %>%
  group_by( State , clsuter,TF) %>% 
  mutate( total = if_else( OverallDEG == "Not" , sum(n) , n ) ) %>% 
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-n) %>%
  pivot_wider( names_from = "clsuter" , values_from = "total") %>%
  mutate( OverallDEG = if_else( OverallDEG == "Not" , "Total" , "OverallDEG" ) ,
          TF = if_else( TF == "allgene","Not-TF DEG", TF )
          ) %>% 
  rename( "species" = "State" )


writeData(wb_tf, sheet, all_summary_plot)
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, species_deg_summary_plot, startRow = nrow(all_summary_plot) +3)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, rows = 1:100, cols = 1:20, gridExpand = TRUE)

sheet <- paste0("Overall SpeciesDEG")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-overall_spe_deg.filter
colnames(write_data) <-  colnames(write_data) %>% str_to_title()
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

sheet <- paste0("Speceies DEG")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<- species_deg_list.mod
colnames(write_data) <-  colnames(write_data) %>% str_to_title()
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)


sheet <- paste0("Human_GRNoverlap")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-pando_overlap_summary_list$human%>% 
  select( tf,cluster,spe ,DegFlag, TotalTargets,
             N_targets_active,N_targets_negative,N_DEG_active,N_DEG_negative,
             Overlaprate_avtive,Overlaprate_negative,EXP,Max_overlap,rank)%>% 
  rename(
        "TF" ="tf", "Cluster" ="cluster" , "Species" = "spe","Expression" = "EXP"
             )


writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

sheet <- paste0("Marmoset_GRNoverlap")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-pando_overlap_summary_list$marmoset%>% 
  select( tf,cluster,spe ,DegFlag, TotalTargets,
             N_targets_active,N_targets_negative,N_DEG_active,N_DEG_negative,
             Overlaprate_avtive,Overlaprate_negative,EXP,Max_overlap,rank)%>% 
  rename(
        "TF" ="tf", "Cluster" ="cluster" , "Species" = "spe","Expression" = "EXP"
             )


writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

sheet <- paste0("HumanDEG_MarmosetGRNoverlap")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-pando_overlap_summary_list$human_To_marmoset%>% 
  select( tf,cluster,spe ,DegFlag, TotalTargets,
             N_targets_active,N_targets_negative,N_DEG_active,N_DEG_negative,
             Overlaprate_avtive,Overlaprate_negative,EXP,Max_overlap,rank)%>% 
  rename(
        "TF" ="tf", "Cluster" ="cluster" , "Species" = "spe","Expression" = "EXP"
             )

writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

sheet <- paste0("go_list")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<- merge_dt
colnames(write_data) <-  colnames(write_data) %>% str_to_title()
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

sheet <- paste0("go_tf_Pando_overlap")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-alldeg.filt
colnames(write_data) <-  colnames(write_data) %>% str_to_title()
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)


outfile  = paste0( param$outdir , "/SpeciesDEGlist_addGO_v2.xlsx" )
saveWorkbook(wb_tf, file =outfile, overwrite = TRUE)

rm_list <- GetRmObjList (ls() , standardt_obj_list =  standardt_obj_list)
rm( list = rm_list)
gc()



```




## DEG.2 SSC roeund DEG

### DEG detection
```{r}

## function
#########################################################
# Load Data
#########################################################
total_day = param$Info$Prediction$total_day +1
bin_day= param$Info$Prediction$bin
fitting_result <-readRDS(paste0( param$outdir_list$Pseudotime ,
                                 "GAM_fittigGeneExp_addInfo.rds"))
                                 #"GAM_fittigGeneExp_addInfo_addATAC-TF_summary.rds"))
combinedOBJ <- readRDS(  paste0( param$directories$outdir , "/Updateded_CombinedOBJ.rds") )

param$outdir <- paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/roundDEG_pando/")
if (!dir.exists(param$outdir)) {
  dir.create(param$outdir, recursive = TRUE)
  message("ディレクトリを作成しました: ", param$outdir)
} else {
  message("output ディレクトリは既に存在します: ", param$outdir)
}

pandodir = paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/Pando/")
humanPandoRes <- read.table(  paste0(pandodir, "/human_pando_module.txt")   )
marmosetPandoRes <- read.table(  paste0(pandodir, "/marmoset_pando_module.txt")   )
pandores <- list(human = humanPandoRes ,
                 marmoset = marmosetPandoRes )

pando_predictedTF <- list(human =  pandores$human$tf %>% unique() ,
                          marmoset =  pandores$marmoset$tf %>% unique() )


##########################################################
# conserved cell type markers & DEG
###########################################################
commonGene <- fitting_result[["marmoset"]]$seuratobj %>% rownames()
Idents(combinedOBJ) <- "seurat_clusters"

data('motifs')
data('motif2tf')

TF_list <- motif2tf$tf %>% unique

combinedOBJ$round_cluster <- combinedOBJ$seurat_clusters %>% as.character()
combinedOBJ$round_cluster[combinedOBJ$seurat_clusters%in% c(6,7)] <- "6_7"

round_cluster_pallet <-  cluster_pallete
names(round_cluster_pallet)[7] <- "6_7"

combinedOBJ$round_cluster_foplot <- factor(combinedOBJ$round_cluster ,
                                           levels = c("1","0",2:5,"6_7",8:12 ))
p<-DimPlot(combinedOBJ , split.by = "species", group.by = "round_cluster_foplot",  cols = round_cluster_pallet)
output.file <- paste0(param$outdir,"/Cluster1_splited_umap", sep = "")
wggplot( p  , output.file , height = 5,width = 12 ) 


ClusterAverageEXP <- AverageExpression( combinedOBJ,group.by = c("species","round_cluster"), assays = "RNA"  )$RNA %>% as.data.frame

# 1 -> 5 -> 3 -> 6&7 -> 1
DEGtest_pair_list <- list(
  c( "1","5") ,
  c( "5","3") ,
  c( "3","6_7") ,
  c( "6_7","1") 
)

log2fc_limit = 0.5
log2fc_tf_limit = 0.5


BranchCluster_deg_list <- list( human = NULL ,marmoset = NULL)
for( spe in c("human","marmoset")){
  tmp_deglist <- c()
  extractOBJ <- subset(combinedOBJ , species == spe  )
  spe_Branch_deg_list <- c()
  for ( DEGtest_pair in DEGtest_pair_list){
    tmp_deglist <- FindMarkers( extractOBJ,assay = "RNA", min.pct = 0.1,
                                logfc.threshold=0.1,
                                ident.1 = DEGtest_pair[2] ,ident.2=DEGtest_pair[1],
                                group.by = "round_cluster" ) 
    
    tmp_deglist.filter <- tmp_deglist %>% 
      filter( p_val_adj  < 0.05 ) %>%
       mutate( diff_pct =  abs(pct.1-pct.2) ,
               gene = rownames(.),
               combination = paste0(DEGtest_pair[1] ,"_vs_",ident.2=DEGtest_pair[2] ) ,
               type = if_else(avg_log2FC > 0,"up","down" )  ,
               spe = spe,
               TF = if_else(gene %in% TF_list , "TF", "Not") 
            ) %>% 
      filter(  (TF == "TF" &  abs(avg_log2FC) > log2fc_tf_limit) |  # TF fiter
           (TF == "Not" &  abs(avg_log2FC) > log2fc_limit )) %>% # Non -tf fiter
      left_join( . , rownames_to_column(ClusterAverageEXP,var="gene"  ),by="gene")
    spe_Branch_deg_list <- rbind(spe_Branch_deg_list , tmp_deglist.filter )
  }
  BranchCluster_deg_list[[spe]] =  spe_Branch_deg_list
  output.file = paste0( param$outdir, "/roundDEG_",spe,".txt" )
  write.table( spe_Branch_deg_list , file =output.file , 
               quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)
}

# common feature
commonDEG_flag <- rbind(BranchCluster_deg_list[["human"]],BranchCluster_deg_list[["marmoset"]])%>%
  mutate( type = if_else(avg_log2FC > 0,"up","down" ) )  %>%
  group_by( gene , combination, TF , type) %>% 
  mutate( common = if_else(n()>1 ,"Common","Not" ) )  %>%
   ungroup() 

commonDEG_summary <- commonDEG_flag %>% 
  filter(common == "Common") %>%
  select(gene,combination , TF ,type) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  group_by(combination , TF, type)  %>% 
  summarize( n = n()) %>%
  arrange( TF)%>% 
  unite( "TF_type" , TF,type ,sep = "_" )  %>% 
  pivot_wider( names_from = "TF_type",values_from = "n")%>%
  mutate( Not_down = Not_down + TF_down ,
          Not_up = Not_up + TF_up 
          )
  

commonDEG_list <-  commonDEG_flag %>% 
  filter(common == "Common")

output.file = paste0( param$outdir , "/roundCluster_common_deg.txt" )
write.table( commonDEG_list  , file =output.file , 
               quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)

output.file = paste0( param$outdir , "/roundCluster_common_deg_summary.txt" )
write.table( commonDEG_summary  , file =output.file , 
               quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)



Branch_deg_deg_summary <- commonDEG_flag %>% 
  select(gene,combination,spe , TF ,type) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  group_by(combination ,spe , TF, type)  %>% 
  summarize( n = n()) %>%
  arrange( TF)%>% 
  unite( "TF_type" , TF,type ,sep = "_" )  %>% 
  pivot_wider( names_from = "TF_type",values_from = "n")%>%
  mutate( Not_down = Not_down + TF_down ,
          Not_up = Not_up + TF_up 
          ) %>% arrange(spe)
  

output.file = paste0( param$outdir , "/BranchCluster_deg_deg_summary.txt" )
write.table( Branch_deg_deg_summary  , file =output.file , 
               quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)


saveobj <- list(
  commonDEG_summary =commonDEG_summary,
  Branch_deg_deg_summary= Branch_deg_deg_summary,
  BranchCluster_deg_list = BranchCluster_deg_list,
  commonDEG_list = commonDEG_list ,
  deglist =BranchCluster_deg_list ,
  ClusterAverageEXP = ClusterAverageEXP
  )
output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/DEGlist.rds")
saveRDS(saveobj ,output.file )


```


### Chromvar
```{r}
#motif_back
#paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/chromvar_obj/","motif_ix_", spe, ".rds")

cellLabel = paste0(combinedOBJ@meta.data$species, "_",
                   combinedOBJ@meta.data$round_cluster )
names(cellLabel) <- rownames(combinedOBJ@meta.data)

selecet_range <- 5000
deg_cluster_list <- unique( BranchCluster_deg_list[["marmoset"]]$combination )
group_col="combination" 

chromvar_result <- c( human = NULL ,marmoset = NULL)

for(species in c("human","marmoset")){
  chromvar_result_species <- setNames( vector("list", length(deg_cluster_list)) , deg_cluster_list)
  chormvar_obj_list <- readRDS(paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/chromvar_obj/","motif_ix_", species, ".rds"))
  annotations <- Annotation(chormvar_obj_list$seuratobj@data[["ATAC"]])
  peak_region <- rownames(chormvar_obj_list$seuratobj@data[["ATAC"]])
  transcript_annotation <- annotations[mcols(annotations)$type == "transcript", ]
  gr_resized <- resize_by_strand_with_region_string(transcript_annotation, up = selecet_range, down = selecet_range)
  gene_closest_peak <- get_peaks_per_gene(gr_resized ,peak_region  )
  
  select_col <- c( "p_val" ,"avg_log2FC","pct.1","pct.2","p_val_adj",
             "combination","gene","diff_pct","TF")
  tmp_deg_list <-  BranchCluster_deg_list[[species]]%>%
    select( any_of(select_col)) %>%
    mutate( type = if_else(  avg_log2FC  >0, "up", "down" ),
            cluster = gsub( ".*_vs_", "", combination ),
            spe = species)

  for(cluster_id in deg_cluster_list ){
    # ここで geneの情報を取得、転写開始点の周辺peakを抽出する
    cluster_gene <- tmp_deg_list %>% filter( .data[[group_col]] == cluster_id ) %>% select(gene , TF, type)
    TF_deg <- cluster_gene %>% filter( TF =="TF") %>% pull(gene)
    deg_gene_around_peak <- gene_closest_peak %>% filter( gene_name %in%  cluster_gene$gene ) %>% pull(query_region)
    
    # DEG around Peak 以外は FALSE にする
    motif_mat <- assays(chormvar_obj_list$motif_ix)[[1]]  # motif x peak
    motif_mat_deg <- motif_mat
    motif_mat_deg[,] <- FALSE
    motif_mat_deg[rownames(motif_mat_deg) %in% deg_gene_around_peak, ] <-
        motif_mat[rownames(motif_mat) %in% deg_gene_around_peak, ]
    
    # computing deviations
    chromvarobj_dev <- computeDeviations(object = chormvar_obj_list$obj, 
                                         background_peaks =  chormvar_obj_list$bg_peak ,
                                         annotations = motif_mat_deg)
    deviations_matrix = deviationScores(chromvarobj_dev) %>% 
      as.data.frame %>% 
      mutate( motif = rownames(.),) %>% 
      left_join( . , motif2tf %>% select(motif,tf)) %>% 
      select(motif,tf, everything())
    
    average_deviation <- deviations_matrix %>% 
      pivot_longer(cols = - c(motif,tf) ,names_to = "Cell",values_to = "score") %>%
      mutate( cluster = cellLabel[Cell] ) %>% 
      group_by(cluster,motif,tf) %>%
      summarise( average = mean(score,na.rm = TRUE) ) %>% 
      ungroup() %>%
      group_by(cluster,tf) %>%
      summarise( average_score = sum(average) ) %>% 
      ungroup() %>%
      mutate( speceis = gsub("_.*", "" , cluster),
              cluster_id = gsub("human_|marmoset_", "" , cluster)
              ) 
      
      #separate( cluster ,into =c("species","cluster_id") , sep = "_" )
    chromvar_result_species[[cluster_id]] = average_deviation
  }
  chromvar_result[[species]] = chromvar_result_species
}


output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/Chromvar_deviation_resultrds")
saveRDS(chromvar_result ,output.file )

#chromvar_result <- readRDS(paste0( param$outdir  ,"/Chromvar_deviation_resultrds")  )

merged_chromvar_data_list <- c( human = NULL ,marmoset = NULL)

for ( speceis in c("human","marmoset")){
  #forPlotData[[species]][,"chromvar"] = NA
  merged_chromvar_data = NULL
  for(select_cluster_id in deg_cluster_list ){
    chromvar_dev <- chromvar_result[[speceis]][[select_cluster_id]]
    cid = gsub(".*_vs_","",select_cluster_id)
    cluster_chromvar_dev <- chromvar_dev %>% 
      filter( cluster_id == cid ) %>% 
      mutate( cluster = select_cluster_id )
    merged_chromvar_data <- rbind(merged_chromvar_data , cluster_chromvar_dev)
  }
  merged_chromvar_data <- merged_chromvar_data %>% 
    select( tf ,average_score, cluster) %>%
    rename( "Chromvar_deviation" = "average_score" )
  merged_chromvar_data_list[[speceis]] = merged_chromvar_data
}


output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/merged_chromvar_data_list.rds")
saveRDS(merged_chromvar_data_list ,output.file )



```


### pando overlap

```{r}
merged_chromvar_data_list <- readRDS( paste0(param$outdir  ,"/merged_chromvar_data_list.rds"))

#=========================
## Overlap Pando 
#===========================

cellLabel = paste0(combinedOBJ@meta.data$species, "_",
                   combinedOBJ@meta.data$round_cluster )
names(cellLabel) <- rownames(combinedOBJ@meta.data)
Cluster_exp_pct <- GetExpRate(combinedOBJ , assay="RNA" ,layer="counts", cellLabel  )


long_ClusterAverageEXP <- ClusterAverageEXP[ intersect(TF_list,rownames(ClusterAverageEXP)) , ]%>%
  rownames_to_column(var="tf") %>% 
  pivot_longer( cols = -tf ,names_to = "group",values_to = "EXP") %>%
  separate_wider_delim( group ,delim = "_" ,names = c("species","clusterid")) %>% 
  filter( clusterid != 11 ) %>%
  mutate(clusterid = gsub("-","_",clusterid) )

 BranchCluster_deg_list[[spe]]

allgeneset <- rownames(combinedOBJ )
deg_cluster_list <- unique( BranchCluster_deg_list[["human"]]$combination )
group_col="combination" 
#spe = "human"

# clusterLevle <- c(  "1_vs_5" ,  "5_vs_3"  , "3_vs_6_7" ,"6_7_vs_1"  )

clusterLevle <- c(  "6_7_vs_1" ,"1_vs_5" ,  "5_vs_3"  , "3_vs_6_7"  )
pando_overlap_list <- list( human = NULL ,marmoset = NULL , human_To_marmoset = NULL)
pando_overlap_summary_list <-list( human = NULL ,marmoset = NULL, human_To_marmoset = NULL)
# pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg <-list( human = NULL ,marmoset = NULL, human_To_marmoset = NULL)

for ( species_type in c("human","marmoset","human_To_marmoset")){
  pando_spe <- if_else(species_type == "human_To_marmoset", "marmoset",species_type )
  species <- if_else(species_type == "human_To_marmoset", "human",species_type )
  
  pando_grn <- pandores[[pando_spe]]
  select_col <- c( "p_val" ,"avg_log2FC","pct.1","pct.2","p_val_adj",
             "combination","gene","diff_pct","TF")
  tmp_deg_list <-  BranchCluster_deg_list[[species]]%>%
    select( any_of(select_col)) %>%
    mutate( type = if_else(  avg_log2FC  >0, "up", "down" ),
            cluster = gsub( ".*_vs_", "", combination ),
            spe = species)
  
  pando_overlap_list_spe <- c()
  pando_overlap_summary_list_spe <-c()
  #pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg_spe <-c()
  
  for(cluster_id in deg_cluster_list ){
    gene_datasete  <-  prep_gene_list( allgeneset,species ,tmp_deg_list ,TF_list , 
                                       Cluster_exp_pct ,group_col= "cluster" , gsub( ".*_vs_", "", cluster_id ) )
    gene_deg_type = gene_datasete$gene_deg_type
    gene_deg_summary =  gene_datasete$gene_deg_summary
     
    pando_overlap <-check_tf_tgs_pair_deg(pando_grn ,gene_deg_type , species,cluster_id)
    pando_overlap_summary <- check_tf_overlap_stats (pando_overlap  ,gene_deg_summary  )
  
    pando_overlap_list_spe <- rbind(pando_overlap_list_spe,pando_overlap)
    pando_overlap_summary_list_spe <-rbind(pando_overlap_summary_list_spe,pando_overlap_summary)        
    
    #######
    #gene_datasete  <-  prep_gene_list( allgeneset,species ,tmp_deg_list ,TF_list ,
    #                                   Cluster_exp_pct ,group_col= "cluster" , gsub( ".*_vs_", "", cluster_id ))
    #gene_deg_type = gene_datasete$gene_deg_type
    #gene_deg_summary =  gene_datasete$gene_deg_summary
     
    #pando_overlap <-check_tf_tgs_pair_deg(pando_grn ,gene_deg_type , species,cluster_id)
    #pando_overlap_summary_pn <-  check_tf_summary_pos_neg(pando_overlap  ,gene_deg_summary  )
    #pando_overlap_summary <-check_tf_summary(pando_overlap  ,gene_deg_summary  )
  
    #pando_overlap_list_spe <- rbind(pando_overlap_list_spe,pando_overlap)
    #pando_overlap_summary_list_spe <-rbind(pando_overlap_summary_list_spe,pando_overlap_summary)
    #pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg_spe <- rbind(pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg_spe,pando_overlap_summary_pn)
  }
  
  output.file = paste0( param$outdir, "/roundCluster_DEG_GRNoverlap_TF-TargetPair",species_type,".txt" )
  write.table( pando_overlap_list_spe , file =output.file , 
                 quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)
  output.file = paste0( param$outdir, "/roundCluster_DEG_GRNoverlap_TFsummary",species_type,".txt" )
  write.table( pando_overlap_summary_list_spe , file =output.file , 
                 quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)

  #pando_overlap_summary_list_spe %>% mutate( cid = gsub( ".*_vs_", "", cluster ))
  pando_overlap_summary_list_spe$cid <- gsub( ".*_vs_", "", pando_overlap_summary_list_spe$cluster )
  pando_overlap_list[[species_type]] <- pando_overlap_list_spe
  pando_overlap_summary_list[[species_type]]  <- ADDexp_and_Rank( pando_overlap_summary_list_spe,
                                            long_ClusterAverageEXP,clusterLevle,addcol =c("cid"),
                                            c( "tf" ="tf" , "spe"="species","cid"="clusterid"  )
                                            )
  ###########
  #output.file = paste0( param$outdir, "/roundCluster_DEG_GRNoverlap_TF-TargetPair",species_type,".txt" )
  #write.table( pando_overlap_list_spe , file =output.file , 
  #               quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)
  #output.file = paste0( param$outdir, "/roundCluster_DEG_GRNoverlap_TFsummary",species_type,".txt" )
  #write.table( pando_overlap_summary_list_spe , file =output.file , 
  #               quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)
  #output.file = paste0( param$outdir, "/roundCluster_DEG_GRNoverlap_TF-summaly_splitPosNeg_",species_type,".txt" )
  #write.table( pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg_spe,
  #            file =output.file ,  quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)
  
  #pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg_spe %>% mutate( cid = gsub( ".*_vs_", "", cluster ))
  #pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg_spe$cid <- gsub( ".*_vs_", "", pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg_spe$cluster )
  #pando_overlap_list[[species_type]] <- pando_overlap_list_spe
  #pando_overlap_summary_list[[species_type]] <-pando_overlap_summary_list_spe
  #pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg[[species_type]]  <- ADDexp( pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg_spe,
  #                                          long_ClusterAverageEXP,clusterLevle,addcol = c("cid"),
  #                                          c( "tf" ="tf" , "spe"="species","cid"="clusterid"  )
  #                                          )
  
}



forPlotData <- pando_overlap_summary_list

for ( speceis in c("human","marmoset")){
  forPlotData[[speceis]] <- left_join(forPlotData[[speceis]] , merged_chromvar_data_list[[speceis]]  ) %>% 
    mutate(cluster = factor(cluster , levels = clusterLevle))
}
forPlotData[["human_To_marmoset"]] <- 
  left_join(forPlotData[["human_To_marmoset"]] , merged_chromvar_data_list[["human"]]  ) %>% 
    mutate(cluster = factor(cluster , levels = clusterLevle))


#forPlotData <- pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg
#forStatsdata<-pando_overlap_summary_list

updeg_conditions <- TRUE
overlap_threshold_upper <- 20
Ranking_within <- 50


common_tf1 <- intersect(forPlotData[["human"]] %>% 
                         filter( rank <= Ranking_within & Max_overlap >=overlap_threshold_upper) %>% pull(tf) %>% unique(), 
                       forPlotData[["marmoset"]] %>% 
                         filter( rank <= Ranking_within & Max_overlap >=overlap_threshold_upper) %>% pull(tf) %>% unique()
                       )

common_tf_marmoPando <- intersect(forPlotData[["human_To_marmoset"]] %>% 
                         filter( rank <= Ranking_within & Max_overlap >=overlap_threshold_upper) %>% pull(tf) %>% unique(), 
                       forPlotData[["marmoset"]] %>% 
                         filter( rank <= Ranking_within & Max_overlap >=overlap_threshold_upper) %>% pull(tf) %>% unique() )

marmoset_split_res <- readRDS(paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/roundDEG_marmoset_6_7split/TF_Overlap_DotPLot.rds"))

common_tf_split <- intersect(forPlotData[["human"]] %>% 
                         filter( rank <= Ranking_within & Max_overlap >=overlap_threshold_upper) %>% pull(tf) %>% unique(), 
                       marmoset_split_res$tf_summ%>% 
                         filter( rank <= Ranking_within & Max_overlap >=overlap_threshold_upper) %>% pull(tf) %>% unique()
                       )

#++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
# TF rnakPlot
#++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
#common_tf_rankplot <- select_common_gene( forPlotData[["human"]] ,forPlotData[["marmoset"]],  overlap_threshold = 10)

#for ( speceis in c("human","marmoset")){
#  forStatsdata[[speceis]] <- left_join(forStatsdata[[speceis]] , merged_chromvar_data_list[[speceis]]  )
#}
#forStatsdata[["human_To_marmoset"]] <- left_join(forStatsdata[["human_To_marmoset"]] , merged_chromvar_data_list[["human"]]  )



## 6 , 7split  deg
marmoset_split_res <- readRDS(paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/roundDEG_marmoset_6_7split/TF_Overlap_DotPLot.rds"))
marmoset_split_chromvar <- readRDS(paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/roundDEG_marmoset_6_7split//merged_chromvar_data_list.rds"))
marmoset_split_res  <-  left_join(marmoset_split_res$tf_summ , marmoset_split_chromvar[["marmoset"]]  )

common_tf_data <- rankplot_commonGene( forPlotData[["human"]] ,marmoset_split_res, selectnum = 10)


spe ="human"
plot_data <- forPlotData[[spe]]
human_plot <-  TFrankPlot_scatter(plot_data , 
                                  common_tf = common_tf_data$common_geme,
                                  plot_tf = common_tf_data[[spe]] ,
                                  overlaplimit = 10,
                                  textsize =15, plot_tf_Limit = 20,
                                  psize = 2 )
output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/TF_RankplotChromvar_",spe )
wggplot( p =   wrap_plots(human_plot,ncol = 4) , file = output.file ,width = 20, height = 4 )

# common_tf_data_marmo <- rankplot_commonGene( forStatsdata[["human"]] ,forStatsdata[["marmoset"]], selectnum = 10)

spe ="marmoset"
plot_data <- forPlotData[[spe]]
matmoset_plot  <- TFrankPlot_scatter( plot_data ,
                                  common_tf = common_tf_data$common_geme,
                                  plot_tf = common_tf_data[[spe]] ,
                                  overlaplimit = 10,
                                  textsize =15, plot_tf_Limit = 20,
                                  psize = 2 )

output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/TF_RankplotChromvar_",spe )
wggplot( p =   wrap_plots(matmoset_plot,ncol = 4) , file = output.file ,width = 20, height = 4 )



#####################
reg_col = c( "active_uptf"  = "#FF0000","negative_uptf" = "#0000FF" ,
             "active_nondeg" ="#FF8700", "negative_nondeg" = "#008BFF" ,
             "active_downtf" ="#FF0082", "negative_downtf" = "#00FFFF" ,
             "notoverlap" = "white"
             )

border_col = c( "UpDEG" = "#000000" , "DownDEG" = "#6A5ACD", "NonDEG" ="#D3D3D3")



################
spe = "human"
#plot_data <- Refining_Plot_Conditions(forPlotData[[spe]],TRUE)
p<- plot_all_complexheatmap(
  plot_all = forPlotData[[spe]],
  Max_overlap = overlap_threshold_upper,
  Ranking_within = Ranking_within,
  common_tf = common_tf1,#common_tf_split,
  kclust = 8,
  bubble_ratio = 12 ,
  top_ratio    = 1 ,
  tf_colratio = 1/4 ,
  textsize = 12,
  genetxtsize = 16,
  reg_col = reg_col,
  border_col = border_col ,
  flat_fill = F
)
output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/TF_Overlap_DotPLot_",spe ,".pdf")
pdf( output.file , height = 20,width = 6)
plot(p$plot)
dev.off()

p$tflist %>% as.data.frame()
new_order <- c(
  "NR6A1","ZNF518A","ZNF462","RELB","FOS","FOSB","ETV6","SOX4","HIVEP1",
  "HMGB2","RFX4","POU6F2","SMAD9","ESR1","ZBTB43","EBF1","EGR4","PGR","RARB",
  "CREB5","ESRRG","DACH2","MECOM","POU3F1","MXD4","TSHZ2","AHR","THRB","TCF3",
  "NPAS3","HNF4G","GRHL2","EBF2","HMGA2","NR5A2","ZNF423","MEIS2","AR","ZNF536","HMGA1",
  "PRDM6","SOX5","SATB2","SOX6" ,"ZNF516","SP3","SMAD2","HES1","DMRT1","RREB1","TCF12","JUN","MAZ"
)

#  p$tflist$gene[ !p$tflist$gene %in% new_order]
#  setdiff( p$tflist$gene , new_order)

mod_list <-data.frame(gene = new_order  , tf_group = 1,order = 1:length(new_order))
  
pmod<- plot_all_complexheatmap(
  plot_all = forPlotData[[spe]],
  Max_overlap = overlap_threshold_upper,
  Ranking_within = Ranking_within,
  common_tf = common_tf_split,
  tf_order_df = mod_list,
  kclust = 8,
  bubble_ratio = 12 ,
  top_ratio    = 1 ,
  tf_colratio = 2/3 ,
  textsize = 12,
  genetxtsize = 16,
  reg_col = reg_col,
  border_col = border_col ,
  flat_fill = F
)

output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/TF_Overlap_DotPLot_",spe ,"_reorder.pdf")
pdf( output.file , height = 20,width = 5)
plot(pmod$plot)
dev.off()

################
spe = "marmoset"
#plot_data <- Refining_Plot_Conditions(forPlotData[[spe]],TRUE)
p<- plot_all_complexheatmap(
  plot_all = forPlotData[[spe]],
  Max_overlap = overlap_threshold_upper,
  Ranking_within = Ranking_within,
  common_tf = common_tf1,
  kclust = 8,
  bubble_ratio = 12 ,
  top_ratio    = 1 ,
  tf_colratio = 1/4 ,
  textsize = 12,
  genetxtsize = 16,
  reg_col = reg_col,
  border_col = border_col ,
  flat_fill = F
)
output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/TF_Overlap_DotPLot_",spe ,".pdf")
pdf( output.file ,  height = 20,width = 6)
plot(p$plot)
dev.off()

p$tflist %>% as.data.frame()
new_order <- c("BNC2","SP3","EGR1","WT1","SALL3","EGR4","IKZF2","SMAD7","PGR","ESR2",
               "ETV1","TRPS1","ZNF521","L3MBTL3","ZFPM2","MECOM","GLIS3","THRB","ESR1","POU6F2","CREB5",
               "DACH2","SOX6","NR2F1","STAT4","BCL11A","TOX3","ZBTB7C","MYT1L","EBF2","TOX","NR1H4","TFEC",
               "TBX18","HMGA2","RORB","FOXP2","NFIB","NPAS3","SOX5","ST18","ESRRG","SIM1","TFAP2D","PKNOX2",
               "ZFP64","NR5A2","ZNF536","MEIS2","TRERF1","MAF","TSHZ2","ZNF217","MLLT10", "ZNF292","RHOXF1","CTCF",
               "TCF4","ZFX","SALL4"
)

#  p$tflist$gene[ !p$tflist$gene %in% new_order]
#  setdiff( p$tflist$gene , new_order)
#  setdiff(  new_order,p$tflist$gene)

mod_list <-data.frame(gene = new_order  , tf_group = 1,order = 1:length(new_order)) 

pmod<- plot_all_complexheatmap(
  plot_all = forPlotData[[spe]],
  Max_overlap = overlap_threshold_upper,
  Ranking_within = Ranking_within,
  common_tf = common_tf_split,
  tf_order_df = mod_list,
  kclust = 8,
  bubble_ratio = 12 ,
  top_ratio    = 1 ,
  tf_colratio = 2/3 ,
  textsize = 12,
  genetxtsize = 16,
  reg_col = reg_col,
  border_col = border_col ,
  flat_fill = F
)

output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/TF_Overlap_DotPLot_",spe ,"_reorder.pdf")
pdf( output.file , height = 20,width = 4)
plot(pmod$plot)
dev.off()




saveobj <- list(  tf_tgs_pair= pando_overlap_list  ,
  tf_summ = pando_overlap_summary_list 
 # tf_spe_summ = pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg
  )
output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/TF_Overlap_DotPLot.rds")
saveRDS(saveobj ,output.file )

### Modify Overlap


selectCol <- c(
  "tf" , "DegFlag","cluster","TotalTargets" , "N_targets_active","N_targets_negative",
  "N_UpTarget", "N_DownTarget","UpDEG", "DownDEG","Overlaprate_avtive", "Overlaprate_negative","EXP" )


modified_pandoOverlap <- pando_overlap_summary_list$human %>% 
  select(all_of(selectCol))
 colnames(modified_pandoOverlap) <- c(
  "TF", "TF_DEGflag" , "Cluster",
  "Total_target_predicted" ,
  "Actively_regulated_targets_predicted",
  "Negatively_regulated_targets_predicted",
  "Up_regulated_DEGs",
  "Down_regulated_DEGs",
  "Up_regulated_targets",
  "Down_regulated_targets",
  "Overlaprate_Up_regulated_targets",
  "Overlaprate_Down_regulated_targets",
  "Cluster_Average_Expression"
)



wb_tf <- createWorkbook()
customStyle <- createStyle(
  fontName = "Arial",
  fontSize = 11,halign = "center",valign = "center"
  #textDecoration = "bold"
)

# --- シート1: opness.bin ---
sheet <- paste0("DEGSummary")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, commonDEG_summary)
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, Branch_deg_deg_summary, startRow = nrow(commonDEG_summary) +3)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, rows = 1:100, cols = 1:20, gridExpand = TRUE)

sheet <- paste0("Human_SSCsDEG")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-BranchCluster_deg_list$human
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)


sheet <- paste0("Human_GRNoverlap")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<- modified_pandoOverlap
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

outfile  = paste0( param$outdir , "/SSC_DEGlist_modifed.xlsx" )
saveWorkbook(wb_tf, file =outfile, overwrite = TRUE)

```

### GO

```{r}


#############
# GO 
#############

forGO_branch_deg_list <- commonDEG_flag %>%
  unite("branch_spe", combination, spe,type, sep = "_", remove = FALSE) %>%
  group_by(branch_spe) %>%
  summarise(gene = list(gene)) %>%
  tibble::deframe()   # → 名前付きリストに変換

common_forGO_branch_deg_list<- commonDEG_flag %>%
  filter( common =="Common" & spe == "human") %>%
  unite("branch_common", combination , common,type, sep = "_", remove = FALSE) %>%
  group_by(branch_common) %>%
  summarise(gene = list(gene)) %>%
  tibble::deframe()   # → 名前付きリストに変換

forGO_branch_deg_list <- c(forGO_branch_deg_list , common_forGO_branch_deg_list)

go_dir = paste0( param$outdir ,"/roundDEG_GO_updown/" ) 
if (!dir.exists(go_dir)) {
  dir.create(go_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  message("ディレクトリを作成しました: ", go_dir)
} else {
  message("output ディレクトリは既に存在します: ", go_dir)
}

gores <- MakeGOenrich_DT( forGO_branch_deg_list, outdir = go_dir  )


pando_grn_comb <- rbind( pandores[["marmoset"]] %>% mutate(spe = "marmoset"),
                        pandores[["human"]] %>% mutate(spe = "human") ) %>% 
  mutate( type = if_else( estimate > 0 ,"up", "down" ) ) 

alldeg_list <- list()  # ここに各 gores を入れていく
i <- 1
merge_dt <- c()

for (module_name in names(forGO_branch_deg_list)) {
  module_name <- gsub("6_7","6-7",module_name)
  split_data  <- str_split(module_name, "_") %>% unlist()
  cluster_name  <- gsub( "6-7" ,"6_7" ,  paste0( split_data[1],"_vs_",split_data[3] ) )
  speces <- split_data[4]
  deg_type <- split_data[5]
  
  for (cate in c("BP", "MF", "CC")) {
    
    geo_name <- paste0(cluster_name, "_",speces,"_", deg_type ,"_", cate)
    go_file  <- file.path(go_dir, paste0("GO_list_GGMmodule_", geo_name, "_list.txt"))
    if (!file.exists(go_file)) next
    
    gores <- read.delim(go_file, sep = "\t")
    
    godt <- gores
    godt$sep = speces
    godt$category = cate
    godt$cluster = cluster_name
    godt$deg_type = deg_type
    
    merge_dt <- rbind(merge_dt ,godt)
    gores <- gores %>% 
      mutate(Genes = geneID) %>%
      separate_longer_delim(geneID, delim = "/") %>% 
      mutate(tf = if_else(geneID %in% TF_list, "TF", "Not")) %>%
      filter(tf == "TF") 
    
    if(nrow(gores) > 0 ){
      for ( pando_spe in c( "human","marmoset") ) {
        gores_spe <- gores %>%
          select(ID, Description, geneID, tf, Count,GeneRatio,BgRatio,Genes ) %>% # select( -gene_list)
          rowwise() %>%
          mutate(
            n_DEG_genes =unlist(str_split(GeneRatio, "/"))[2],
            GO_size = unlist(str_split(BgRatio, "/"))[1],
            tf_targets = intersect(
              unlist(str_split(Genes, "/")),
              (pando_grn_comb %>% 
                 filter(tf == geneID, type == "up", spe == pando_spe) %>% 
                 pull(target))
            ) %>% paste( . , collapse = ",") ,
            n_overlap = if_else( tf_targets == "", 
                                       0,
                                       unlist(str_split(tf_targets, ",")) %>% length()
                                       ),
            tf = paste0(geneID,"(",n_overlap,")"),
            targets = paste0(tf,"->",tf_targets)
          ) %>% 
          ungroup() %>%  # rowwise の解除（重要）
          filter(  n_overlap > 0) %>%
          #arrange(ID,desc(n_overlap)) %>%
          arrange(ID,desc(n_overlap)) %>%
          group_by(ID) %>%
          summarise(
            n_overlap = sum(n_overlap),
            TF_list =paste0( tf , collapse = "," ),
            TF_targets =paste0( targets , collapse = ";" ),
            across(everything(), first),
            .groups = "drop"
          ) %>% 
          select(ID, Description, n_overlap ,n_DEG_genes,GO_size,Genes,TF_list ,TF_targets , Count) %>%
          mutate(
            Overlap_ratio = as.integer(n_overlap) / as.integer(GO_size) ,
            Cluster = cluster_name,
            pando_species = pando_spe ,
            "Species" = speces,
            Deg_type = deg_type,
            Category = cate
          )
        # リストに保存
        alldeg_list[[i]] <- gores_spe
        i <- i + 1
      }
    }

  }
}

# 最後に一括で結合
alldeg.filt <- bind_rows(alldeg_list)
#alldeg.filt <- alldeg %>% filter( tf == "TF" ) %>%  filter( go_target_human >0 | go_target_marmoset  >0 ) 

output.file = paste0( go_dir , "/BranchCluster_DEG_GO_Tflist_filtered.txt" )
write.table( alldeg.filt , file =output.file , 
               quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)
output.file = paste0( go_dir , "/Merged_GO_list.txt" )
write.table( merge_dt , file =output.file , 
               quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)

wb_tf <- createWorkbook()
customStyle <- createStyle(
  fontName = "Arial",
  fontSize = 11,halign = "center",valign = "center"
  #textDecoration = "bold"
)

# --- シート1: opness.bin ---
sheet <- paste0("DEGSummary")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, commonDEG_summary)
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, Branch_deg_deg_summary, startRow = nrow(commonDEG_summary) +3)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, rows = 1:100, cols = 1:20, gridExpand = TRUE)

sheet <- paste0("Human_SSCsDEG")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-BranchCluster_deg_list$human
colnames(write_data) <-  colnames(write_data) %>% str_to_title()

writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

sheet <- paste0("Marmoset_SSCsDEG")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-BranchCluster_deg_list$marmoset
colnames(write_data) <-  colnames(write_data) %>% str_to_title()
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

sheet <- paste0("SharedDEG")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-commonDEG_list
colnames(write_data) <-  colnames(write_data) %>% str_to_title()
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

sheet <- paste0("Human_GRNoverlap")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg$human
colnames(write_data) <-  colnames(write_data) %>% str_to_title()
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

sheet <- paste0("Marmoset_GRNoverlap")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg$marmoset
colnames(write_data) <-  colnames(write_data) %>% str_to_title()
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

sheet <- paste0("HumanDEG_MarmosetGRNoverlap")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg$human_To_marmoset
colnames(write_data) <-  colnames(write_data) %>% str_to_title()

writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

 
sheet <- paste0("GOlist")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-merge_dt
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
colnames(write_data) <-  colnames(write_data) %>% str_to_title()
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

sheet <- paste0("GO_tf_Pando_overlap")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-alldeg.filt
colnames(write_data) <-  colnames(write_data) %>% str_to_title()
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

outfile  = paste0( param$outdir , "/SSC_DEGlist_GOlist.xlsx" )
saveWorkbook(wb_tf, file =outfile, overwrite = TRUE)


rm_list <- GetRmObjList (ls() , standardt_obj_list =  standardt_obj_list)
rm( list = rm_list)
gc()


```



## DEG.3 SSC roeund DEG Part2  Clsuter7

### DEG detection
```{r marmoet 7Cluster}


## function
#########################################################
# Load Data
#########################################################
total_day = param$Info$Prediction$total_day +1
bin_day= param$Info$Prediction$bin
fitting_result <-readRDS(paste0( param$outdir_list$Pseudotime ,
                                 "GAM_fittigGeneExp_addInfo.rds"))
                                 #"GAM_fittigGeneExp_addInfo_addATAC-TF_summary.rds"))
combinedOBJ <- readRDS(  paste0( param$directories$outdir , "/Updateded_CombinedOBJ.rds") )

param$outdir <- paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/roundDEG_marmoset_6_7split/")
if (!dir.exists(param$outdir)) {
  dir.create(param$outdir, recursive = TRUE)
  message("ディレクトリを作成しました: ", param$outdir)
} else {
  message("output ディレクトリは既に存在します: ", param$outdir)
}

pandodir = paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/Pando/")
#humanPandoRes <- read.table(  paste0(pandodir, "/human_pando_module.txt")   )
marmosetPandoRes <- read.table(  paste0(pandodir, "/marmoset_pando_module.txt")   )
pandores <- list(#human = humanPandoRes ,
                 marmoset = marmosetPandoRes )

pando_predictedTF <- list(#human =  pandores$human$tf %>% unique() ,
                          marmoset =  pandores$marmoset$tf %>% unique() )


##########################################################
# conserved cell type markers & DEG
###########################################################
commonGene <- fitting_result[["marmoset"]]$seuratobj %>% rownames()
Idents(combinedOBJ) <- "seurat_clusters"

data('motifs')
data('motif2tf')

TF_list <- motif2tf$tf %>% unique

combinedOBJ$round_cluster <- combinedOBJ$seurat_clusters %>% as.character()
# combinedOBJ$round_cluster[combinedOBJ$seurat_clusters%in% c(6,7)] <- "6_7"

round_cluster_pallet <-  cluster_pallete
# names(round_cluster_pallet)[7] <- "6_7"

combinedOBJ$round_cluster_foplot <- factor(combinedOBJ$round_cluster ,
                                           levels = c(1:12 ))
p<-DimPlot(combinedOBJ , split.by = "species", 
           group.by = "round_cluster_foplot",  cols = round_cluster_pallet)
output.file <- paste0(param$outdir,"/umap", sep = "")
wggplot( p  , output.file , height = 5,width = 12 ) 

combinedOBJ <- subset( combinedOBJ , species == "marmoset" )

ClusterAverageEXP <- AverageExpression( combinedOBJ,
                                        group.by = c("species","round_cluster"), 
                                        assays = "RNA"  )$RNA %>% as.data.frame

colnames(ClusterAverageEXP) <- gsub( "^g","marmoset_" ,colnames(ClusterAverageEXP) )

# 1 -> 5 -> 3 -> 6&7 -> 1
DEGtest_marmoset_pair_list <- list(
  c( "1","5") ,
  c( "5","3") ,
  c( "3","6") ,
  c( "6","7") ,
  c( "7","1") 
)

log2fc_limit = 0.5
log2fc_tf_limit = 0.5

# BranchCluster_deg_list <- list( human = NULL ,marmoset = NULL)
marmosetSSC_deg_list <- list()

spe = "marmoset"
tmp_deglist <- c()
extractOBJ <- subset(combinedOBJ , species == spe  )

for ( DEGtest_pair in DEGtest_marmoset_pair_list){
  tmp_deglist <- FindMarkers( extractOBJ,assay = "RNA", min.pct = 0.1,
                              logfc.threshold=0.1,
                              ident.1 = DEGtest_pair[2] ,
                              ident.2=DEGtest_pair[1],
                              group.by = "seurat_clusters" ) 
  
  tmp_deglist.filter <- tmp_deglist %>% 
    filter( p_val_adj  < 0.05 ) %>%
     mutate( diff_pct =  abs(pct.1-pct.2) ,
             gene = rownames(.),
             combination = paste0(DEGtest_pair[1] ,"_vs_",DEGtest_pair[2] ) ,
             type = if_else(avg_log2FC > 0,"up","down" )  ,
             spe = spe,
             TF = if_else(gene %in% TF_list , "TF", "Not") 
          ) %>% 
    filter(  (TF == "TF" &  abs(avg_log2FC) > log2fc_tf_limit) |  # TF fiter
         (TF == "Not" &  abs(avg_log2FC) > log2fc_limit )) %>% # Non -tf fiter
    left_join( . , rownames_to_column(ClusterAverageEXP,var="gene"  ),by="gene")
  marmosetSSC_deg_list <- rbind(marmosetSSC_deg_list , tmp_deglist.filter )
}


marmosetSSC_deg_list.mod <- marmosetSSC_deg_list %>%
  mutate( cluster = combination) %>%
  add_otheceClusterDEG() %>%
  make_gene_by_cluster_status()%>%
  mutate( cluster = gsub( "._vs_", "" , combination ) )


marmosetSSC_deg_list.c7_only <- marmosetSSC_deg_list.mod %>% 
  filter(combination == "6_vs_7" & 
           ( ( type == "up" & UpCluster == "6_vs_7") | 
             ( type =="down" & DownCluster ==  "6_vs_7" )
           ) 
         ) %>% mutate(
           combination = "7_onlyDEG",
         )

marmosetSSC_deg_list.c7up_c1down_otheIgnore <- marmosetSSC_deg_list.mod %>% 
  filter(combination == "6_vs_7" & 
           ( ( type == "up" & Cluster7_vs_1 == "DOWN") | 
             ( type =="down" & Cluster7_vs_1 ==  "UP" )
           ) 
         ) %>% mutate(
           combination = "c7chang_c1return",
         )

marmosetSSC_deg_list.c7up_c1down_c7only <- marmosetSSC_deg_list.mod %>% 
  filter(combination == "6_vs_7" & 
           ( ( type == "up" & UpCluster == "6_vs_7") | 
             ( type =="down" & DownCluster ==  "6_vs_7" )
           ) 
         ) %>%
  filter( ( type == "up" & Cluster7_vs_1 == "DOWN") | 
        ( type =="down" & Cluster7_vs_1 ==  "UP" ) 
        ) %>%
  mutate(
           combination = "c7chang_c1return_c7onlyDEG",
         )


c7deglist <- rbind(
  marmosetSSC_deg_list.mod %>% filter(combination == "6_vs_7"),
  marmosetSSC_deg_list.c7_only,
  marmosetSSC_deg_list.c7up_c1down_otheIgnore,
  marmosetSSC_deg_list.c7up_c1down_c7only
)

output.file = paste0( param$outdir, "/roundDEG_marmoset_6_7_1_",spe,".txt" )
write.table( marmosetSSC_deg_list.mod , file =output.file , 
             quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)


marmosetSSC_deg_summary <- marmosetSSC_deg_list.mod %>% 
  select(gene,combination,spe , TF ,type) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  group_by(combination ,spe , TF, type)  %>% 
  summarize( n = n()) %>%
  arrange( TF)%>% 
  unite( "TF_type" , TF,type ,sep = "_" )  %>% 
  pivot_wider( names_from = "TF_type",values_from = "n")%>%
  mutate( NotTF_down = Not_down + TF_down ,
          NotTF_up = Not_up + TF_up 
          ) %>% arrange(spe) %>%
  select( combination,spe, NotTF_up, NotTF_down , TF_up ,TF_down  )
  
output.file = paste0( param$outdir , "/marmosetSSC_deg_summary.txt" )
write.table( marmosetSSC_deg_summary  , file =output.file , 
               quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)

saveobj <- list(
  marmosetSSC_deg_list.mod = marmosetSSC_deg_list.mod,
  marmosetSSC_deg_summary = marmosetSSC_deg_summary,
  c7deglist = c7deglist ,
  ClusterAverageEXP = ClusterAverageEXP
  )
output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/DEGlist.rds")
saveRDS(saveobj ,output.file )

```
### Chromvar

```{r}
#motif_back
#paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/chromvar_obj/","motif_ix_", spe, ".rds")

cellLabel = paste0(combinedOBJ@meta.data$species, "_",
                   combinedOBJ@meta.data$round_cluster )
names(cellLabel) <- rownames(combinedOBJ@meta.data)

selecet_range <- 5000
deg_cluster_list <- unique( marmosetSSC_deg_list.mod$combination )
group_col="combination" 

chromvar_result <- c( human = NULL ,marmoset = NULL)

clusterLevle <- c(  "7_vs_1" ,"1_vs_5" ,  "5_vs_3"  , "3_vs_6", "6_vs_7" )
clusterNameChange <- setNames( c("1","5","3","6","7") ,clusterLevle )

for(species in c("marmoset")){
  chromvar_result_species <- setNames( vector("list", length(deg_cluster_list)) , deg_cluster_list)
  chormvar_obj_list <- readRDS(paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/chromvar_obj/","motif_ix_", species, ".rds"))
  annotations <- Annotation(chormvar_obj_list$seuratobj@data[["ATAC"]])
  peak_region <- rownames(chormvar_obj_list$seuratobj@data[["ATAC"]])
  transcript_annotation <- annotations[mcols(annotations)$type == "transcript", ]
  gr_resized <- resize_by_strand_with_region_string(transcript_annotation, up = selecet_range, down = selecet_range)
  gene_closest_peak <- get_peaks_per_gene(gr_resized ,peak_region  )
  
  select_col <- c( "p_val" ,"avg_log2FC","pct.1","pct.2","p_val_adj",
             "combination","gene","diff_pct","TF")

  tmp_deg_list <-  marmosetSSC_deg_list.mod%>%
  select( any_of(select_col)) %>%
  mutate( type = if_else(  avg_log2FC  >0, "up", "down" ),
            cluster = clusterNameChange[ combination ],
            spe = species)
  

  for(cluster_id in deg_cluster_list ){
    # ここで geneの情報を取得、転写開始点の周辺peakを抽出する
    cluster_gene <- tmp_deg_list %>% filter( .data[[group_col]] == cluster_id ) %>% select(gene , TF, type)
    TF_deg <- cluster_gene %>% filter( TF =="TF") %>% pull(gene)
    deg_gene_around_peak <- gene_closest_peak %>% filter( gene_name %in%  cluster_gene$gene ) %>% pull(query_region)
    
    # DEG around Peak 以外は FALSE にする
    motif_mat <- assays(chormvar_obj_list$motif_ix)[[1]]  # motif x peak
    motif_mat_deg <- motif_mat
    motif_mat_deg[,] <- FALSE
    motif_mat_deg[rownames(motif_mat_deg) %in% deg_gene_around_peak, ] <-
        motif_mat[rownames(motif_mat) %in% deg_gene_around_peak, ]
    
    # computing deviations
    chromvarobj_dev <- computeDeviations(object = chormvar_obj_list$obj, 
                                         background_peaks =  chormvar_obj_list$bg_peak ,
                                         annotations = motif_mat_deg)
    deviations_matrix = deviationScores(chromvarobj_dev) %>% 
      as.data.frame %>% 
      mutate( motif = rownames(.),) %>% 
      left_join( . , motif2tf %>% select(motif,tf)) %>% 
      select(motif,tf, everything())
    
    average_deviation <- deviations_matrix %>% 
      pivot_longer(cols = - c(motif,tf) ,names_to = "Cell",values_to = "score") %>%
      mutate( cluster = cellLabel[Cell] ) %>% 
      group_by(cluster,motif,tf) %>%
      summarise( average = mean(score,na.rm = TRUE) ) %>% 
      ungroup() %>%
      group_by(cluster,tf) %>%
      summarise( average_score = sum(average) ) %>% 
      ungroup() %>%
      mutate( speceis = gsub("_.*", "" , cluster),
              cluster_id = gsub("human_|marmoset_", "" , cluster)
              ) 
      
      #separate( cluster ,into =c("species","cluster_id") , sep = "_" )
    chromvar_result_species[[cluster_id]] = average_deviation
  }
  chromvar_result[[species]] = chromvar_result_species
}

output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/Chromvar_deviation_resultrds")
saveRDS(chromvar_result ,output.file )


merged_chromvar_data_list <- c( human = NULL ,marmoset = NULL)

for ( speceis in c("marmoset")){
  #forPlotData[[species]][,"chromvar"] = NA
  merged_chromvar_data = NULL
  for(select_cluster_id in deg_cluster_list ){
    chromvar_dev <- chromvar_result[[speceis]][[select_cluster_id]]
    cid = gsub(".*_vs_","",select_cluster_id)
    cluster_chromvar_dev <- chromvar_dev %>% 
      filter( cluster_id == cid ) %>% 
      mutate( cluster = select_cluster_id )
    merged_chromvar_data <- rbind(merged_chromvar_data , cluster_chromvar_dev)
  }
  merged_chromvar_data <- merged_chromvar_data %>% 
    select( tf ,average_score, cluster) %>%
    rename( "Chromvar_deviation" = "average_score" )
  merged_chromvar_data_list[[species]] = merged_chromvar_data
  #forPlotData[[species]] <- left_join(forPlotData[[species]] , merged_chromvar_data  )
  #forStatsdata[[speceis]] <- left_join(forStatsdata[[speceis]] , merged_chromvar_data  )
}


output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/merged_chromvar_data_list.rds")
saveRDS(merged_chromvar_data_list ,output.file )




```


### pando overlap

```{r}


# chromvar data
merged_chromvar_data_list <- readRDS( paste0(param$outdir  ,"/merged_chromvar_data_list.rds"))


#=========================
## Overlap Pando 
#===========================

cellLabel = paste0(combinedOBJ@meta.data$species, "_",
                   combinedOBJ@meta.data$round_cluster )
names(cellLabel) <- rownames(combinedOBJ@meta.data)
Cluster_exp_pct <- GetExpRate(combinedOBJ , assay="RNA" ,layer="counts", cellLabel  )


ClusterAverageEXP <- AverageExpression( combinedOBJ,
                                        group.by = c("species","round_cluster"), 
                                        assays = "RNA"  )$RNA %>% as.data.frame

colnames(ClusterAverageEXP) <- gsub( "^g","marmoset_" ,colnames(ClusterAverageEXP) )

  
long_ClusterAverageEXP <- ClusterAverageEXP[ intersect(TF_list,rownames(ClusterAverageEXP)) , ]%>%
  rownames_to_column(var="tf") %>% 
  pivot_longer( cols = -tf ,names_to = "group",values_to = "EXP") %>%
  separate_wider_delim( group ,delim = "_" ,names = c("species","clusterid")) %>% 
  filter( clusterid != 11 ) %>%
  mutate(clusterid = gsub("-","_",clusterid) )



allgeneset <- rownames(combinedOBJ )
deg_cluster_list <- unique( marmosetSSC_deg_list.mod$combination )
group_col="combination" 
#spe = "human"

clusterLevle <- c(  "7_vs_1" ,"1_vs_5" ,  "5_vs_3"  , "3_vs_6", "6_vs_7" )
clusterNameChange <- setNames( c("1","5","3","6","7") ,clusterLevle )

#clusterLevle <- c(  "7_vs_1" ,"1_vs_5" ,  "5_vs_3"  , "3_vs_6", "6_vs_7" ,
#                    "7_onlyDEG","c7chang_c1return","c7chang_c1return_c7onlyDEG"   )
#clusterNameChange <- setNames( c("1","5","3","6","7","c7only","c7c1return","c7onlyc1return") ,clusterLevle )
pando_overlap_list <- list( human = NULL ,marmoset = NULL , human_To_marmoset = NULL)
pando_overlap_summary_list <-list( human = NULL ,marmoset = NULL, human_To_marmoset = NULL)
#pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg <-list( human = NULL ,marmoset = NULL, human_To_marmoset = NULL)



#for ( species_type in c("human","marmoset","human_To_marmoset")){
for ( species_type in c("marmoset")){
  pando_spe <- if_else(species_type == "human_To_marmoset", "marmoset",species_type )
  species <- if_else(species_type == "human_To_marmoset", "human",species_type )
  
  pando_grn <- pandores[[pando_spe]]
  select_col <- c( "p_val" ,"avg_log2FC","pct.1","pct.2","p_val_adj",
             "combination","gene","diff_pct","TF","cluster")
  tmp_deg_list <-  marmosetSSC_deg_list.mod%>%
    select( any_of(select_col)) %>%
    mutate( type = if_else(  avg_log2FC  >0, "up", "down" ),
            cluster = clusterNameChange[ combination ],
            spe = species)
  
  pando_overlap_list_spe <- c()
  pando_overlap_summary_list_spe <-c()
  #pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg_spe <-c()
  
  for(cluster_id in deg_cluster_list ){
    c_id = clusterNameChange[ cluster_id ]
    gene_datasete  <-  prep_gene_list( allgeneset,species ,tmp_deg_list ,TF_list ,
                                       Cluster_exp_pct ,group_col= "cluster" ,c_id)
    gene_deg_type = gene_datasete$gene_deg_type
    gene_deg_summary =  gene_datasete$gene_deg_summary
    
    #gene_datasete  <-  prep_gene_list( allgeneset,species ,tmp_deg_list ,TF_list , 
    #                                   Cluster_exp_pct ,group_col= "cluster" , gsub( ".*_vs_", "", cluster_id ) )
    #gene_deg_type = gene_datasete$gene_deg_type
    #gene_deg_summary =  gene_datasete$gene_deg_summary
     
    pando_overlap <-check_tf_tgs_pair_deg(pando_grn ,gene_deg_type , species,cluster_id)
    pando_overlap_summary <- check_tf_overlap_stats (pando_overlap  ,gene_deg_summary  )
    pando_overlap_list_spe <- rbind(pando_overlap_list_spe,pando_overlap)
    pando_overlap_summary_list_spe <-rbind(pando_overlap_summary_list_spe,pando_overlap_summary) 
    
     
    #pando_overlap <-check_tf_tgs_pair_deg(pando_grn ,gene_deg_type , species,cluster_id)
    #pando_overlap_summary_pn <-  check_tf_summary_pos_neg(pando_overlap  ,gene_deg_summary  )
    #pando_overlap_summary <-check_tf_summary(pando_overlap  ,gene_deg_summary  )
    #pando_overlap_list_spe <- rbind(pando_overlap_list_spe,pando_overlap)
    #pando_overlap_summary_list_spe <-rbind(pando_overlap_summary_list_spe,pando_overlap_summary)
    #pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg_spe <- rbind(pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg_spe,pando_overlap_summary_pn)
  }
  
  output.file = paste0( param$outdir, "/roundCluster_DEG_GRNoverlap_TF-TargetPair",species_type,".txt" )
  write.table( pando_overlap_list_spe , file =output.file , 
                 quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)
  output.file = paste0( param$outdir, "/roundCluster_DEG_GRNoverlap_TFsummary",species_type,".txt" )
  write.table( pando_overlap_summary_list_spe , file =output.file , 
                 quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)

  #pando_overlap_summary_list_spe %>% mutate( cid = gsub( ".*_vs_", "", cluster ))
  pando_overlap_summary_list_spe$cid <- gsub( ".*_vs_", "", pando_overlap_summary_list_spe$cluster )
  pando_overlap_list[[species_type]] <- pando_overlap_list_spe
  pando_overlap_summary_list[[species_type]]  <- ADDexp_and_Rank( pando_overlap_summary_list_spe,
                                            long_ClusterAverageEXP,clusterLevle,addcol =c("cid"),
                                            c( "tf" ="tf" , "spe"="species","cid"="clusterid"  ))
  
  if(0){
  output.file = paste0( param$outdir, "/roundCluster_DEG_GRNoverlap_TF-TargetPair",species_type,".txt" )
  write.table( pando_overlap_list_spe , file =output.file , 
                 quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)
  output.file = paste0( param$outdir, "/roundCluster_DEG_GRNoverlap_TFsummary",species_type,".txt" )
  write.table( pando_overlap_summary_list_spe , file =output.file , 
                 quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)
  output.file = paste0( param$outdir, "/roundCluster_DEG_GRNoverlap_TF-summaly_splitPosNeg_",species_type,".txt" )
  write.table( pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg_spe,
              file =output.file ,  quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)
  
  #pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg_spe %>% mutate( cid = gsub( ".*_vs_", "", cluster ))
  pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg_spe$cid <- clusterNameChange[pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg_spe$cluster]
  pando_overlap_list[[species_type]] <- pando_overlap_list_spe
  pando_overlap_summary_list[[species_type]] <-pando_overlap_summary_list_spe
  pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg[[species_type]]  <- ADDexp( pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg_spe,
                                            long_ClusterAverageEXP,clusterLevle,addcol = c("cid"),
                                            c( "tf" ="tf" , "spe"="species","cid"="clusterid"  )
                                            )
  }
}






forPlotData <- pando_overlap_summary_list
forPlotData[["marmoset"]] <- left_join(forPlotData[["marmoset"]] ,
                                       merged_chromvar_data_list[["marmoset"]]  )%>% 
                            mutate(cluster = factor(cluster , levels = clusterLevle))

updeg_conditions <- TRUE
overlap_threshold_upper <- 20
Ranking_within <- 50

# human Result
human_oerlap <- readRDS(paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/roundDEG_pando/TF_Overlap_DotPLot.rds"))


common_tf1 <- intersect(human_oerlap$tf_summ[["human"]]  %>% 
                         filter( rank <= Ranking_within & Max_overlap >=overlap_threshold_upper) %>% pull(tf) %>% unique(), 
                       forPlotData[["marmoset"]] %>% 
                         filter( rank <= Ranking_within & Max_overlap >=overlap_threshold_upper) %>% pull(tf) %>% unique()
                       )


human_chromvar <- readRDS(paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/roundDEG_pando/merged_chromvar_data_list.rds"))
human_oerlap <- left_join(human_oerlap$tf_summ$human , human_chromvar[["human"]]  )


#++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
# TF rnakPlot
#++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
common_tf_data <- rankplot_commonGene( forPlotData[["marmoset"]] ,human_oerlap, selectnum = 10)


spe ="marmoset"
plot_data <- forPlotData[[spe]]
matmoset_plot  <- TFrankPlot_scatter(plot_data ,
                                  common_tf = common_tf_data$common_geme,
                                  plot_tf = common_tf_data[[spe]] ,
                                  overlaplimit = 10,
                                  textsize =15, plot_tf_Limit = 20,
                                  force_val =30,min_seg_length = 0.2 ,
                                  psize = 2 )


output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/TF_RankplotChromvar_",spe )
wggplot( p =   wrap_plots(matmoset_plot,ncol = 4) , file = output.file ,width = 20, height = 8)


#####################
reg_col = c( "active_uptf"  = "#FF0000","negative_uptf" = "#0000FF" ,
             "active_nondeg" ="#FF8700", "negative_nondeg" = "#008BFF" ,
             "active_downtf" ="#FF0082", "negative_downtf" = "#00FFFF" ,
             "notoverlap" = "white"
             )

border_col = c( "UpDEG" = "#000000" , "DownDEG" = "#6A5ACD", "NonDEG" ="#D3D3D3")



spe = "marmoset"
#plot_data <- Refining_Plot_Conditions_new(forPlotData[[spe]],TRUE)
p<- plot_all_complexheatmap(
  plot_all = forPlotData[[spe]],
  Max_overlap = overlap_threshold_upper,
  Ranking_within = Ranking_within,
  common_tf = NULL,
  kclust = 8,
  bubble_ratio = 12 ,
  top_ratio    = 1 ,
  tf_colratio = 2/3 ,
  textsize = 12,
  genetxtsize = 16,
  reg_col = reg_col,
  border_col = border_col ,
  flat_fill = F
)
output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/TF_Overlap_DotPLot_",spe ,".pdf")
pdf( output.file ,  height = 20,width = 5)
plot(p$plot)
dev.off()

p$tflist %>% as.data.frame()
new_order <- c("ESRRG","HIVEP3","ZNF521","BNC2","EBF1","IKZF2","SALL3","SMAD7",
               "EGR4","ETV1","ESR2","PGR","TRPS1","ID4","L3MBTL3",
               "TRERF1","SOX6","MECOM","ZFPM2","CREB5","DACH2",
               "ESR1","POU6F2","GLIS3","THRB","NR1H4",
               "TFEC","RORB","MYT1L","ST18","EBF2","TOX","STAT4","TBX18",
               "TOX3","ZBTB7C","NR2F1","HMGA2","SOX5",
               "NPAS3","FOXP2","NFIB","SIM1","TFAP2D","PKNOX2",
               "ZFP64","MAF","TSHZ2","ZNF536","NR5A2","MEIS2","BCL11A","SALL4","PBX3",
               "ZFX","EGR1","WT1","ZNF217","MLLT10","TCF4" )


#  p$tflist$gene[ !p$tflist$gene %in% new_order]
#  setdiff( p$tflist$gene , new_order)
#  setdiff( new_order , p$tflist$gene)

mod_list <-data.frame(gene = new_order  , tf_group = 1,order = 1:length(new_order))
  
pmod<- plot_all_complexheatmap(
  plot_all = forPlotData[[spe]],
  Max_overlap = overlap_threshold_upper,
  Ranking_within = Ranking_within,
  common_tf = common_tf1,
  tf_order_df = mod_list,
  kclust = 8,
  bubble_ratio = 12 ,
  top_ratio    = 1 ,
  tf_colratio = 2/3 ,
  textsize = 12,
  genetxtsize = 16,
  reg_col = reg_col,
  border_col = border_col ,
  flat_fill = F
)

output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/TF_Overlap_DotPLot_",spe ,"_reorder.pdf")
pdf( output.file , height = 20,width = 5)
plot(pmod$plot)
dev.off()

saveobj <- list(  tf_tgs_pair= pando_overlap_list[["marmoset"]] ,
  tf_summ = pando_overlap_summary_list[["marmoset"]]
  )
output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/TF_Overlap_DotPLot.rds")
saveRDS(saveobj ,output.file )



selectCol <- c(
  "tf" , "DegFlag","cluster","TotalTargets" , "N_targets_active","N_targets_negative",
  "N_UpTarget", "N_DownTarget","UpDEG", "DownDEG","Overlaprate_avtive", "Overlaprate_negative","EXP" )


modified_pandoOverlap <- pando_overlap_summary_list$marmoset %>% 
  select(all_of(selectCol))
 colnames(modified_pandoOverlap) <- c(
  "TF", "TF_DEGflag" , "Cluster",
  "Total_target_predicted" ,
  "Actively_regulated_targets_predicted",
  "Negatively_regulated_targets_predicted",
  "Up_regulated_DEGs",
  "Down_regulated_DEGs",
  "Up_regulated_targets",
  "Down_regulated_targets",
  "Overlaprate_Up_regulated_targets",
  "Overlaprate_Down_regulated_targets",
  "Cluster_Average_Expression"
)




wb_tf <- createWorkbook()
customStyle <- createStyle(
  fontName = "Arial",
  fontSize = 11,halign = "center",valign = "center"
  #textDecoration = "bold"
)

# --- シート1: opness.bin ---
sheet <- paste0("DEGSummary")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, marmosetSSC_deg_summary)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, rows = 1:100, cols = 1:20, gridExpand = TRUE)

sheet <- paste0("Marmoset_SSCsDEG")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-marmosetSSC_deg_list.mod
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

#sheet <- paste0("Marmoset_Cluster7DEG")
#addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
#write_data<- c7deglist
#writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
#addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
#          rows = 1, 
#          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
#freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
#addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
#         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
#         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
#         gridExpand = TRUE)

sheet <- paste0("Marmoset_GRNoverlap")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-modified_pandoOverlap
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

outfile  = paste0( param$outdir , "/Marmoset_SSC_Cluster7Split_DEGlist_modified.xlsx" )
saveWorkbook(wb_tf, file =outfile, overwrite = TRUE)

```


### GO

```{r}


#############
# GO 
#############

forGO_branch_deg_list <- marmosetSSC_deg_list.mod %>%
  unite("branch_spe", combination, spe,type, sep = "_", remove = FALSE) %>%
  group_by(branch_spe) %>%
  summarise(gene = list(gene)) %>%
  tibble::deframe()   # → 名前付きリストに変換


forGO_branch_deg_list <- c(forGO_branch_deg_list )

go_dir = paste0( param$outdir ,"/roundDEG6-7split_GO_updown/" ) 
if (!dir.exists(go_dir)) {
  dir.create(go_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  message("ディレクトリを作成しました: ", go_dir)
} else {
  message("output ディレクトリは既に存在します: ", go_dir)
}

gores <- MakeGOenrich_DT( forGO_branch_deg_list, outdir = go_dir  )


pando_grn_comb <- rbind( pandores[["marmoset"]] %>% mutate(spe = "marmoset")) %>% 
  mutate( type = if_else( estimate > 0 ,"up", "down" ) ) 

alldeg_list <- list()  # ここに各 gores を入れていく
i <- 1
merge_dt <- c()

for (module_name in names(forGO_branch_deg_list)) {
  module_name <- gsub("6_7","6-7",module_name)
  split_data  <- str_split(module_name, "_") %>% unlist()
  cluster_name  <- gsub( "6-7" ,"6_7" ,  paste0( split_data[1],"_vs_",split_data[3] ) )
  speces <- split_data[4]
  deg_type <- split_data[5]
  
  for (cate in c("BP", "MF", "CC")) {
    
    geo_name <- paste0(module_name, "_", cate)
    go_file  <- file.path(go_dir, paste0("GO_list_GGMmodule_", geo_name, "_list.txt"))
    if (!file.exists(go_file)) next
    
    gores <- read.delim(go_file, sep = "\t")
    
    godt <- gores
    godt$sep = speces
    godt$category = cate
    godt$cluster = cluster_name
    godt$deg_type = deg_type
    
    merge_dt <- rbind(merge_dt ,godt)

    gores <- gores %>% 
      mutate(Genes = geneID) %>%
      separate_longer_delim(geneID, delim = "/") %>% 
      mutate(tf = if_else(geneID %in% TF_list, "TF", "Not")) %>%
      filter(tf == "TF") 
    
    if(nrow(gores) > 0 ){
      for ( pando_spe in c( "human","marmoset") ) {
        gores_spe <- gores %>%
          select(ID, Description, geneID, tf, Count,GeneRatio,BgRatio,Genes ) %>% # select( -gene_list)
          rowwise() %>%
          mutate(
            n_DEG_genes =unlist(str_split(GeneRatio, "/"))[2],
            GO_size = unlist(str_split(BgRatio, "/"))[1],
            tf_targets = intersect(
              unlist(str_split(Genes, "/")),
              (pando_grn_comb %>% 
                 filter(tf == geneID, type == "up", spe == pando_spe) %>% 
                 pull(target))
            ) %>% paste( . , collapse = ",") ,
            n_overlap = if_else( tf_targets == "", 
                                       0,
                                       unlist(str_split(tf_targets, ",")) %>% length()
                                       ),
            tf = paste0(geneID,"(",n_overlap,")"),
            targets = paste0(tf,"->",tf_targets)
          ) %>% 
          ungroup() %>%  # rowwise の解除（重要）
          filter(  n_overlap > 0) %>%
          #arrange(ID,desc(n_overlap)) %>%
          arrange(ID,desc(n_overlap)) %>%
          group_by(ID) %>%
          summarise(
            n_overlap = sum(n_overlap),
            TF_list =paste0( tf , collapse = "," ),
            TF_targets =paste0( targets , collapse = ";" ),
            across(everything(), first),
            .groups = "drop"
          ) %>% 
          select(ID, Description, n_overlap ,n_DEG_genes,GO_size,Genes,TF_list ,TF_targets , Count) %>%
          mutate(
            Overlap_ratio = as.integer(n_overlap) / as.integer(GO_size) ,
            Cluster = cluster_name,
            pando_species = pando_spe ,
            "Species" = speces,
            Deg_type = deg_type,
            Category = cate
          )
        # リストに保存
        alldeg_list[[i]] <- gores_spe
        i <- i + 1
      }
    }
        
  }
}

# 最後に一括で結合
alldeg.filt <- bind_rows(alldeg_list)


output.file = paste0( go_dir , "/BranchCluster_DEG_GO_Tflist_filtered.txt" )
write.table( alldeg.filt , file =output.file , 
               quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)
output.file = paste0( go_dir , "/Merged_GO_list.txt" )
write.table( merge_dt , file =output.file , 
               quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)


wb_tf <- createWorkbook()
customStyle <- createStyle(
  fontName = "Arial",
  fontSize = 11,halign = "center",valign = "center"
  #textDecoration = "bold"
)

# --- シート1: opness.bin ---
sheet <- paste0("DEGSummary")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, marmosetSSC_deg_summary)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, rows = 1:100, cols = 1:20, gridExpand = TRUE)

sheet <- paste0("Marmoset_SSCsDEG")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
colnames(write_data) <-  colnames(write_data) %>% str_to_title()
write_data<-marmosetSSC_deg_list.mod
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)


sheet <- paste0("Marmoset_GRNoverlap")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-pando_overlap_summary_list_posneg$marmoset
colnames(write_data) <-  colnames(write_data) %>% str_to_title()
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)
 
sheet <- paste0("GOlist")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
colnames(write_data) <-  colnames(write_data) %>% str_to_title()
write_data<-merge_dt
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

sheet <- paste0("GO_tf_Pando_overlap")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
```
