```{r}
colnames(write_data) <-  colnames(write_data) %>% str_to_title()
write_data<-alldeg.filt
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)


outfile  = paste0( param$outdir , "/Marmoset_SSC_Cluster7Split_DEGlistGOlist.xlsx" )
saveWorkbook(wb_tf, file =outfile, overwrite = TRUE)


rm_list <- GetRmObjList (ls() , standardt_obj_list =  standardt_obj_list)
rm( list = rm_list)
gc()

```


# Comibed DEG Cluster6 &7
### Make DEG list
```{r}
## function
#########################################################
# Load Data
#########################################################
combinedOBJ <- readRDS(  paste0( param$directories$outdir , "/Updateded_CombinedOBJ.rds") )
combinedOBJ$plot_clsuter <- factor(combinedOBJ$seurat_clusters , 
                                   levels = c( 1,5,3,6,7,8,2,0,4,10,9,11,12 ))

param$outdir <- paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/SpeciesDEG_pando_C67_TF/")
if (!dir.exists(param$outdir)) {
  dir.create(param$outdir, recursive = TRUE)
  message("ディレクトリを作成しました: ", param$outdir)
} else {
  message("output ディレクトリは既に存在します: ", param$outdir)
}

# Pando_Data
pandodir = paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/Pando/")
humanPandoRes <- read.table(  paste0(pandodir, "/human_pando_module.txt")   )
marmosetPandoRes <- read.table(  paste0(pandodir, "/marmoset_pando_module.txt")   )
pandores <- list(human = humanPandoRes ,
                 marmoset = marmosetPandoRes )
pando_predictedTF <- list(human =  pandores$human$tf %>% unique() ,
                          marmoset =  pandores$marmoset$tf %>% unique() )

# Chromvar Data
merged_chromvar_data_list <- 
  readRDS( paste0(param$directories$outdir  ,"SpeciesDEG_pando//merged_chromvar_data_list.rds"))
merged_chromvar_data_list_old <- 
 readRDS( paste0(param$directories$outdir  ,
                 "/SpeciesDEG_pando/chromvar_old/merged_chromvar_data_list.rds"))


## DEG data
SpeceiseDEG <- readRDS( paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/SpeciesDEG_pando//DEGlist.rds")  )
Marmoset_SSC_deg_split <- readRDS(paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/roundDEG_marmoset_6_7split//DEGlist.rds"))

#AverageEXP
ClusterAverageEXP <- SpeceiseDEG$ClusterAverageEXP

##########################################################
# conserved cell type markers & DEG
###########################################################

data('motifs')
data('motif2tf')
TF_list <- motif2tf$tf %>% unique
clusterLevle <- c("1","5","3","6and7","8","2","4","0","10"  )

#------------------
# Motif Plot
#------------------
RHOXF1_YBX3_motif <- motif2tf %>% 
  filter(tf %in% c("RHOXF1", "YBX3") ) %>% 
  pull(motif)


mp_YBX3 <-ggseqlogo( Matrix(toICM( motifs[RHOXF1_YBX3_motif[1:4]])) , 
            ncol = 2, method = 'bits')+
   scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    A = "#00A651", C = "#0070C0", G = "#FFD700", T = "#FF0000"
    ))+
   facet_wrap(~seq_group, scales = "free_y")

output.file  = paste0( param$outdir , "/YBX3_motifLogo" )
wggplot( mp_YBX3  , output.file , height = 6,width = 12 ) 

mp_RHOXF1 <-ggseqlogo( Matrix(toICM( motifs[RHOXF1_YBX3_motif[5]])) , 
            ncol = 2, method = 'bits')+
   scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    A = "#00A651", C = "#0070C0", G = "#FFD700", T = "#FF0000"
    ))+
   facet_wrap(~seq_group, scales = "free_y")

output.file  = paste0( param$outdir , "/RHOXF1_motifLogo" )
wggplot( mp_RHOXF1  , output.file , height = 3,width = 6 ) 

#################################
# SetUP DEGlist 260610
#################################

GS.hallmark <- readRDS(　param$files$GSdata )
ChromBind_gene  <- GS.hallmark["GOMF-CHROMATIN-BINDING"]
# 328 gene
ChromBind_gene <- intersect( ChromBind_gene$`GOMF-CHROMATIN-BINDING` ,
                                          rownames(combinedOBJ@assays$RNA))

MarmosetUpdeg_6and7 <- SpeceiseDEG$deglist %>% 
  filter( cluster == "6and7" , State == "MarmosetHigh") %>%
  pull(gene)

SSCDEG_C6_7_Specific <- Marmoset_SSC_deg_split$marmosetSSC_deg_list.mod %>% 
  filter(  
           (TF =="TF" | gene %in% ChromBind_gene )  & 
           cluster =="7" & 
           avg_log2FC > 0 & 
           grepl( "7_vs_1" ,DownCluster )
         )%>%
  select(avg_log2FC,pct.1,pct.2,p_val_adj,gene,combination,TF,cluster,UpCluster,DownCluster) %>%
  mutate( SpeceiesDEG6and7 = if_else( gene %in% MarmosetUpdeg_6and7 , "DEG","NonDEG" ) ) %>%
  filter( SpeceiesDEG6and7  =="DEG") 

# EXP
ClusterEXPnonScale <- ClusterAverageEXP %>% select( starts_with("marmoset") )%>%
  rename_with( ~ gsub("^marmoset_","",.x) ) %>% as.matrix()
ClusterEXP <-ClusterEXPnonScale %>%
  t()　%>% scale( center = T) %>% t()

output.file  = paste0( param$outdir , "/MarmosetCLuster7DEG_List.rds" )
saveRDS( SSCDEG_C6_7_Specific , output.file )




#clusterLevle_split <- c("1","5","3","6","7","8","2","4","0","10"  )
clusterPlot <- c( "human_1","human_5","human_3","human_6and7","human_8",
                  "human_2","human_4","human_0","human_10",
                  "marmoset_1","marmoset_5","marmoset_3","marmoset_6","marmoset_7","marmoset_8",
                  "marmoset_2","marmoset_4","marmoset_0","marmoset_10"
                  )
scaleAveEXP <- ClusterAverageEXP[ SSCDEG_C6_7_Specific$gene ,clusterPlot ] %>%
  t %>% 
  scale() %>% 
  t() %>% 
  as.matrix()

clusterPlot_up <- clusterPlot %>% str_to_title()
colnames(scaleAveEXP ) <- clusterPlot_up

plotGene <- SSCDEG_C6_7_Specific$gene

ht_annno <-rowAnnotation( 
                         TF = factor(SSCDEG_C6_7_Specific$TF ,levels = c("TF","Not") ),
                         GOMF_CHROMATIN_BINDING = if_else(plotGene%in% ChromBind_gene,
                                                     "GOMF_CHROMATIN_BINDING","Not"),
                         col = list(TF = c("TF"="green","Not" = "gray" ),
                                    "GOMF_CHROMATIN_BINDING" = c("GOMF_CHROMATIN_BINDING"="blue",
                                                                 "Not" = "gray" )
                                    ),
                         annotation_name_rot = 45,
                         show_annotation_name = T
                        )

matmoset_ht <- Heatmap(scaleAveEXP[plotGene,clusterPlot_up[10:19]] %>% as.matrix() ,
                name = "Expression", 
                column_title =  "Marmoset Expression",
                column_names_rot = 45,
                right_annotation = ht_annno ,
                show_column_names = T,
                show_row_names =  T,
                cluster_columns = F,
                cluster_rows = T )

human_ht <- Heatmap(scaleAveEXP[plotGene,clusterPlot_up[1:9]] %>% as.matrix() ,
                name = "Human Expression", 
                column_title =  "Human Expression",
                #col = col_fun,
                column_names_rot = 45,
                show_heatmap_legend  = FALSE,
                show_column_names = T,
                show_row_names =  T,
                cluster_columns = F,
                cluster_rows = T )

output.file  = paste0( param$outdir , "/MarmosetCLuster7DEG_Expression_Heatmap.pdf" )
pdf( file = output.file , height = 8 ,width = 14)
draw(human_ht + matmoset_ht )
dev.off()


colorblind_vector <- viridis(10, option = "turbo")
subsetcombinedOBJ <- subset(combinedOBJ , species == "marmoset" )
p1 <- FeaturePlot_scCustom(subsetcombinedOBJ, features =plotGene ,
                     colors_use = colorblind_vector  ,num_columns = 5) 
p2 <- VlnPlot( subsetcombinedOBJ, features = plotGene ,
         group.by = "plot_clsuter",pt.size = 0,assay = "RNA",
         col = cluster_pallete ,ncol = 5 )

output.file  = paste0( param$outdir , "/MarmosetCLuster7DEG_featurePlot" )
wggplot( p1  , output.file , height = 15,width = 25 ) 

output.file  = paste0( param$outdir , "/MarmosetCLuster7DEG_VlnPlot" )
wggplot( p2  , output.file , height = 15,width = 25) 

###################
# escape ssGSEA
###################
spe ="marmoset"
pando_grn <- pandores[[spe]]

target_list <- pando_grn  %>% 
  filter( estimate > 0) %>%
  select(tf , target) %>%
  group_by(tf) %>%
  summarise(targets = list(target) %>% unique(), .groups = "drop") %>% 
  tibble::deframe()

spe_seurat <- subset( combinedOBJ , species == spe)
DefaultAssay(spe_seurat) <- "RNA"

ssGSEA <- runEscape( spe_seurat , 
                           method = "ssGSEA",
                           gene.sets = target_list, 
                           groups = 1000, 
                           min.size = 3,
                           new.assay.name = "escape.ssGSEA")

colorblind_vector <- viridis(10, option = "turbo")
DefaultAssay(ssGSEA) <- "escape.ssGSEA"

plotFeature <- plotGene[plotGene  %in% rownames(ssGSEA)]
p1 <- FeaturePlot_scCustom(ssGSEA, features =plotFeature ,
                     colors_use = colorblind_vector ,num_columns = 3) 
p2 <- VlnPlot( ssGSEA, features = plotFeature ,
         group.by = "plot_clsuter",pt.size = 0,assay = "escape.ssGSEA", 
         col = cluster_pallete ,ncol = 3 )

GSEA_score_high <- FindMarkers(ssGSEA ,ident.1 = 7 ,features =plotFeature,
            assay ="escape.ssGSEA" ,group.by = "seurat_clusters",only.pos =T) 
GSEA_score_high <- GSEA_score_high %>% rownames_to_column( var = "Gene")
colnames( GSEA_score_high ) <- c("Gene", "P_val","Avg_log2FC","Pct.1","Pct.2","P_val_adj")

output.file  = paste0( param$outdir , "/TFmodules_ssGSEAscore_C7DEG_featurePlot" )
wggplot( p1  , output.file , height = 15,width = 17 ) 

output.file  = paste0( param$outdir , "/TFmodules_ssGSEAscore_C7DEG_VlnPlot" )
wggplot( p2  , output.file , height = 15,width = 15) 


#----------------------------------------------------------

# heatmap

selectGRNset = target_list[ plotGene] %>% unlist %>% unique()
nolog_exp <- GetAssayData(spe_seurat, assay ="RNA", layer = "data" )[ selectGRNset, ] %>% exp()
nolog_exp <- as.matrix(nolog_exp -1)
nolog_exp_scaled <-nolog_exp %>% t%>% scale() %>% t()

select_TF_Target <- intersect( plotGene ,names(target_list) )
select_TF_Target <- select_TF_Target[select_TF_Target != "SOX9"]
average_GRNscore <- sapply( select_TF_Target , function(x, exp_data,target_list){
      tf_grn = target_list[x] %>% unlist
      tf_grn_exp = exp_data[tf_grn,]
      
      if( length(tf_grn) > 1){
        res <- apply(tf_grn_exp, 2, mean) 
      }else{
        res <- tf_grn_exp 
      }
      return( res )
    } ,exp_data = nolog_exp_scaled, target_list=target_list )
colnames(average_GRNscore) <- paste0( colnames(average_GRNscore) , "_GRN" )
spe_seurat <- AddMetaData(spe_seurat , average_GRNscore)

na_cutoff_val <- spe_seurat@meta.data[,colnames(average_GRNscore)] %>%
    apply(., 2, min)

p1 <- FeaturePlot_scCustom(spe_seurat, features =colnames(average_GRNscore) ,na_cutoff = -1 ,max.cutoff = "q99",
                     colors_use = colorblind_vector ,num_columns = 3) 
p2 <- VlnPlot( spe_seurat, features = colnames(average_GRNscore) ,
         group.by = "plot_clsuter",pt.size = 0,
         col = cluster_pallete ,ncol = 3 )

output.file  = paste0( param$outdir , "/TFmodules_scaledAverage_C7DEG_featurePlot" )
wggplot( p1  , output.file , height = 15,width = 17 ) 

output.file  = paste0( param$outdir , "/TFmodules_scaledAverage_C7DEG_VlnPlot" )
wggplot( p2  , output.file , height = 15,width = 15) 


#################################
# SetUP DEGlist
#################################

species_deg_list.mod <- SpeceiseDEG$deglist %>%
  filter( cluster  %in% clusterLevle ) %>%
  add_otheceClusterDEG %>%
  make_gene_by_cluster_status() %>%
  mutate(across(contains("Cluster"),
                ~ recode(.x,
                         "DOWN" = "MarmosetHigh",
                         "UP"   = "HumanHigh"))) %>% 
  left_join( . , rownames_to_column(ClusterAverageEXP,var="gene"  ),by="gene")

donw_cluster_list <- species_deg_list.mod$DownCluster %>% unique() 
donw_cluster_list[ grepl("6and7" ,donw_cluster_list) ]

Speceis_deg_C7_Specific <- species_deg_list.mod %>% 
  filter(  State  == "MarmosetHigh" & 
           cluster == "6and7" & 
           DownCluster %in% c ( "1,6and7", "6and7")  &
           TF =="TF") 

SSCDEG_C6_7_Specific <- Marmoset_SSC_deg_split$marmosetSSC_deg_list.mod %>% 
  filter(  TF =="TF" & 
           cluster =="7" & 
           avg_log2FC > 0 & 
           UpCluster %in% c( "3_vs_6,6_vs_7","6_vs_7","3_vs_6") &
           grepl( "7_vs_1" ,DownCluster )
         )%>%
  select(avg_log2FC,pct.1,pct.2,p_val_adj,gene,combination,TF,cluster,UpCluster,DownCluster)

intersect( Speceis_deg_C7_Specific$gene , SSCDEG_C6_7_Specific$gene)

SSCDEG_info <- Marmoset_SSC_deg_split$marmosetSSC_deg_list.mod %>% 
  filter(  TF =="TF" & 
           cluster %in% c(6,7) & 
           avg_log2FC > 0 
         )%>%
  select(gene ,UpCluster,DownCluster) %>%
  distinct()


#################################
# Gene Log2FC , EXP , ChromvarScore
#################################
spe ="marmoset"
# DEG
state =  if_else(spe == "marmoset", "MarmosetHigh","HumanHigh" )
select_col <- c( "p_val" ,"avg_log2FC","pct.1","pct.2","p_val_adj",
           "cluster","gene","State","diff_pct","OverallDEG","TF")
tmp_deg_list <- species_deg_list.mod %>%
  filter(State == state & TF == "TF" & cluster == "6and7") %>%
  select( cluster , gene ,avg_log2FC,UpCluster,DownCluster ) %>%
  mutate( avg_log2FC = abs(avg_log2FC))

# Chromvardata
spe ="marmoset"
chromvar_res <-  merged_chromvar_data_list[[spe]]

combined_TF_score <- 
  left_join(tmp_deg_list , chromvar_res ,by = c("gene" = "tf", "cluster" ="cluster"))  %>%
  #filter( cluster == "6and7") %>%
  left_join( . ,SSCDEG_info %>% 
               select(gene ,UpCluster,DownCluster) %>% 
               rename( "SSC_UP"="UpCluster","SSC_Down" = "DownCluster") ,
             by = c( "gene" = "gene") ) %>%
  left_join( . ,ClusterAverageEXP %>% rownames_to_column( var = "tf"),  by = c( "gene" = "tf"))
  
###################
# plot用のmatrix
###################

# log2fc mat
log2fc_mat <- combined_TF_score %>% 
  select( gene ,cluster ,avg_log2FC) %>%
  pivot_wider( names_from = "cluster",values_from = avg_log2FC ) %>%
  column_to_rownames(var = "gene")%>% as.matrix()

# chromvar
chromvar_mat <- chromvar_res %>% 
  pivot_wider( names_from = "cluster",values_from = Chromvar_deviation ) %>%
  column_to_rownames(var = "tf")%>% as.matrix() # %>%  t()　%>% scale( center = T) %>% t()

# chromvar
chromvar_res_old <-  merged_chromvar_data_list_old[[spe]]
chromvar_mat_old <- chromvar_res_old %>% 
  pivot_wider( names_from = "cluster",values_from = Chromvar_deviation ) %>%
  column_to_rownames(var = "tf")%>% as.matrix() # %>%  t()　%>% scale( center = T) %>% t()

# EXP
ClusterEXP <- ClusterAverageEXP %>% select( starts_with("marmoset") )%>%
  rename_with( ~ gsub("^marmoset_","",.x) ) %>% as.matrix() %>%
  t()　%>% scale( center = T) %>% t()



#----
wb_tf <- createWorkbook()
customStyle <- createStyle(
  fontName = "Arial",
  fontSize = 11,halign = "center",valign = "center"
  #textDecoration = "bold"
)

sheet <- paste0("combined_TF_score")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-combined_TF_score
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

sheet <- paste0("GSEA score DEG")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-GSEA_score_high
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

outfile  = paste0( param$outdir , "/TFmodule_ssGSEAscore.xlsx" )
saveWorkbook(wb_tf, file =outfile, overwrite = TRUE)



```



# [Intermediate Cell Subcluster Analysis]

##Funciton
```{r}

SetCellAnnotation  <- function(param,SeuratOBJ,Category_list, from_cname ="seurat_clusters"){
  
  from_val_list <- c()
  to_val_list <- c()
  for (i in c(1:length(Category_list)) ){
    for (l in c(1:length(Category_list[[i]]))){
      from_val_list <- c( from_val_list,Category_list[[i]][l] )
      to_val_list <- c(to_val_list,names(Category_list)[i] )
    }
  }
  category_change_list <- cbind( from =from_val_list , to =to_val_list )  %>% as.data.frame()
  # from val not unique or uique chek
  if( length(unique(category_change_list$from)) != nrow(category_change_list) ) {
    print( "ERR!! from val not uniq !!")
    return(0)
  }
  rownames(category_change_list) <- category_change_list$from
  print(category_change_list)
  
  # make New metadate 
  CellType_meta <- SeuratOBJ@meta.data %>% 
    as.data.frame() %>% 
    mutate( !!sym(from_cname) := as.character(!!sym(from_cname)) ) %>%
    mutate( CellType = category_change_list[ !!sym(from_cname), "to" ] ) %>%
    pull( CellType )
  return(CellType_meta)
}
```

## Pseudotime　-Dividing +Cluster5 with Pando

```{r}
#########################################################
# Load Data
#########################################################

fitting_result <-readRDS(paste0( param$outdir_list$Pseudotime ,
                                 "GAM_fittigGeneExp_addInfo.rds"))
param$outdir <- paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/SubCluster_Pando/")
if (!dir.exists(param$outdir)) {
  dir.create(param$outdir, recursive = TRUE)
  message("ディレクトリを作成しました: ", param$outdir)
} else {
  message("output ディレクトリは既に存在します: ", param$outdir)
}

outdir <- param$outdir
combinedOBJ <- readRDS(  paste0( param$directories$outdir , "/Updateded_CombinedOBJ.rds") )
Category_list <- param$Info$Combined$ClusterCategory

pandodir = paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/Pando/")
humanPandoRes <- read.table(  paste0(pandodir, "/human_pando_module.txt")   )
marmosetPandoRes <- read.table(  paste0(pandodir, "/marmoset_pando_module.txt")   )
pandores <- list(human = humanPandoRes ,
                 marmoset = marmosetPandoRes )

data('motifs')
data('motif2tf')

TF_list <- motif2tf$tf %>% unique


#########################################################
# Sub Cluster Pallet
#########################################################

#set.seed(1234)
#SubClusterDir <- paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/SubCluster_Monocle3_addC5_noDividingCell/")
#SubClusterPalette <- 

if( file.exists(paste0( param$directories$outdir,"SubClusterPalette.RDS")) ){
  ManualClusterPalette <-  readRDS(paste0( param$directories$outdir,"SubClusterPalette.RDS"))
}else{
  #ManualClusterPalette <- createPalette(17,　seedcolors=  c("#010101", "#ff0000"), M = 1000,prefix=NA)
  ManualClusterPalette <- createPalette(17, c("#5A5156", "#E4E1E3", "#F6222E"))
  names(ManualClusterPalette) <- c(0:16)
  #ManualClusterPalette <- green.army tage.colors(17)
  saveRDS(ManualClusterPalette, paste0( param$directories$outdir,"SubClusterPalette.RDS"))
}

#########################################################
# SubCluster Analysis
#########################################################
# RHOXF2B,
Diff_Marker <- c("KIT","NANOS3","ZEB2","DMRT1")

DefaultAssay(combinedOBJ) <- "integrated"
extractCluster <- c(1 , 2 ,0  ,5  )
extract_CellObj <- subset(combinedOBJ , seurat_clusters %in% extractCluster )
extract_CellObj$allCellCluster <- extract_CellObj$seurat_clusters
extract_CellObj$speceis_Cluster <- extract_CellObj$old.ident

# DimPlot(extract_CellObj , split.by = "species", group.by = "seurat_clusters",  cols = cluster_pallete)

dim = c(1:20)
res =1.3

DefaultAssay(extract_CellObj) <- "integrated"
extract_CellObj <- RunPCA(extract_CellObj)
extract_CellObj <- FindNeighbors(extract_CellObj, dims = dim ) 
extract_CellObj <- FindClusters(extract_CellObj, resolution = res )
extract_CellObj <- RunUMAP(extract_CellObj, dims = dim, reduction = "pca", reduction.name = "umap")

p1 <-DimPlot(extract_CellObj , split.by = "species", 
             group.by = "seurat_clusters",  
             cols = ManualClusterPalette)+ 
  facet_wrap(~species, labeller = labeller(species = c(
    "human" = "Humans",
    "marmoset" = "Marmosets"))) + ggtitle("Sub clusters")
p2 <- DimPlot(extract_CellObj , split.by = "species", 
              group.by = "allCellCluster",  cols = cluster_pallete)+ 
  facet_wrap(~species, labeller = labeller(species = c(
    "human" = "Humans",
    "marmoset" = "Marmosets"))) + ggtitle("All_Cell_Clusters")
p3 <- DimPlot(extract_CellObj , split.by = "species",
              group.by = "speceis_Cluster",  cols = cluster_pallete)+ 
  facet_wrap(~species, labeller = labeller(species = c(
    "human" = "Humans",
    "marmoset" = "Marmosets"))) + ggtitle("Speceis_clusters")
p4 <- DimPlot(extract_CellObj , split.by = "species",
              group.by = "bin" ,cols = viridis(44) )+ 
  facet_wrap(~species, labeller = labeller(species = c(
    "human" = "Humans",
    "marmoset" = "Marmosets"))) + ggtitle("Pseudotime bin")
# p1 / p2 / p3 /p4

output.file <- paste0(outdir,"/Subcluster_umap", sep = "")
wggplot( p1/p2/p3  , output.file , height = 12,width = 8 ) 

output.file <- paste0(outdir,"/Subcluster_umap_Subcluster", sep = "")
wggplot( p1  , output.file , height = 4,width = 8 )
output.file <- paste0(outdir,"/Subcluster_umap_AllcellCluster", sep = "")
wggplot( p2  , output.file , height = 4,width = 8 )
output.file <- paste0(outdir,"/Subcluster_umap_SpeciesCluster", sep = "")
wggplot( p3  , output.file , height = 4,width = 8 )
output.file <- paste0(outdir,"/Subcluster_umap_bin", sep = "")
wggplot( p4  , output.file , height = 4,width = 8 )

bin_table_data <- table(extract_CellObj$seurat_clusters , extract_CellObj$bin , extract_CellObj$species)%>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  rename( "Cluster"="Var1", "bin" = "Var2" ,"Species"="Var3" ) %>% 
  pivot_wider(  names_from = "bin" , values_from = "Freq")
output.file <-paste0(outdir, "/Subcluster_BinCount.txt", sep = "")
write.table(bin_table_data, file =output.file , quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = F )

cluster_table_data <- table(extract_CellObj$seurat_clusters , extract_CellObj$speceis_Cluster , extract_CellObj$species)%>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  rename( "Cluster"="Var1", "speceis_Cluster" = "Var2" ,"Species"="Var3" ) %>% 
  pivot_wider(  names_from = "speceis_Cluster" , values_from = "Freq")
output.file <-paste0(outdir, "/Subcluster_speceis_ClusterCount.txt", sep = "")
write.table(cluster_table_data , file =output.file , quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = F )


ClusterSum_table_data <- table(extract_CellObj$seurat_clusters ,extract_CellObj$species)%>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  rename( "Cluster"="Var1", "Species" = "Var2"  ) 
output.file <-paste0(outdir, "/Subcluster_Frequency.txt", sep = "")
write.table(ClusterSum_table_data, file =output.file , quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = F )


# 1) 2つのオブジェクトに共通するセル名を取る
common <- intersect(colnames(combinedOBJ), colnames(extract_CellObj))
# 2) extract のクラスタを CombinedOBJ の並びに合わせて取り出す
subcl <- extract_CellObj$seurat_clusters[common]
# 3) 必要なら明示的に factor レベルを指定（型を確認してから）
subcl <- factor(subcl, levels = as.character(0:length( unique(extract_CellObj$seurat_clusters))))  # 数値なら as.character を推奨
# 4) AddMetaData で追加（Seurat 的に安全）
combinedOBJ <- AddMetaData(combinedOBJ, metadata = setNames(list(subcl), "subcluster")[["subcluster"]], col.name = "subcluster")
# あるいは単純代入でもよい


p1 <-DimPlot(combinedOBJ , split.by = "species", group.by = "subcluster",  cols = ManualClusterPalette)

output.file <- paste0(outdir,"/Integrated_UMAP_Subcluster", sep = "")
wggplot( p1  , output.file , height = 5,width = 10 )

table(extract_CellObj$seurat_clusters)

#--------------------
# Correlation
#--------------------


PlotCorrelation_ht <- function(cormat,ht_metadata , 
                               ManualClusterPalette, 
                               branch_pallet, 
                               celltype_pallet,
                               name = name,
                               name2 = name2,
                               Celltypecol = "CellType" ,
                               BranchCol = "Branch") {

  
  colnames(cormat) <- gsub( ".*_","" ,colnames(cormat))
  rownames(cormat) <- gsub( ".*_","" ,rownames(cormat))
  ## col annotaion = bin
  rownames(ht_metadata ) <- 0:(nrow(ht_metadata)-1) %>% as.character()
  ha <- HeatmapAnnotation(
          Cluster =  ht_metadata[,"cluster"] ,
          CellType = ht_metadata[,Celltypecol],
          Branch = ht_metadata[,BranchCol],
          col = list(Cluster =ManualClusterPalette,
                     CellType = celltype_pallet,
                     Branch = branch_pallet)
        )
  # row annotation = Gene
  row_ha = rowAnnotation( 
          Cluster =  ht_metadata[,"cluster"],
          CellType = ht_metadata[,Celltypecol],
          Branch = ht_metadata[,BranchCol],
          col = list(Cluster =ManualClusterPalette,
                     CellType = celltype_pallet,
                     Branch = branch_pallet),
          show_legend = F   # ← topは出す
        )
              

  ht=Heatmap(cormat %>%as.matrix() ,
           col = viridis(n = 44, option = "turbo") ,
           column_title = paste0(name ," Correlation Heatmap") , 
           row_title =  name2,
           name = "Correlation" , 
           top_annotation = ha, 
           left_annotation = row_ha,
           show_column_names = T,
           show_row_names =  T,
           cluster_columns = T,
           cluster_rows = T)# , width = unit(20, "cm") , height = unit(8, "cm"))]
  return(ht)
}

extract_CellObj$RNA_cluster = extract_CellObj$seurat_clusters
# input
Compare_obj_list.org <- list( "Marmoset" = subset(extract_CellObj , species =="marmoset") ,
                          "Human" = subset(extract_CellObj , species =="human") , 
                          "Integrated" =  extract_CellObj )
#outdir <- param$outdir 
#cor_res_list <- list()
Compare_obj_list.org <- lapply(Compare_obj_list.org ,function(x){ DefaultAssay(x) <-"RNA"; return(x)} )
common_gene <- intersect( rownames(Compare_obj_list.org[[1]]) , rownames(Compare_obj_list.org[[2]]) )


ht_metadata <- data.frame(
   cluster = factor(0:16,levels = 0:16),
   CellType = c("SSC","SSC","Differentiated","InterMediate","Differentiated","Differentiated","Differentiated",
                "Differentiated","SSC","InterMediate","SSC","SSC", "Differentiated","SSC","SSC",
                "Differentiated","Differentiated"),
  Branch = c("bifurcation_point","Other","Other","InterMediate","Other","Other","Other",
                "Differentiation","NextDividing","InterMediate","NextDividing","Other", "Differentiation","Other","bifurcation_point",
                "Other","Other")
  )

branch_pallet <- c(cluster_pallete[0:5],"gray")
names(branch_pallet) <- c( "bifurcation_point","Differentiation","NextDividing","AfterDividing","InterMediate","Other"  )
celltype_pallet <- c( "SSC" = "green","InterMediate" ="#F80DB5","Differentiated"= "red" )


## Compare All cell RNA Cluster
outdir1 <- paste0(outdir ,"/Cluster_cor_commonGene_Integrated_",sep="" )
Compare_obj_list<- list( "Integrated1" = Compare_obj_list.org$Integrated,"Integrated2" = Compare_obj_list.org$Integrated  )
res_correlation<-MakeCorrelationPlot(Compare_obj_list , outdir1  ,common_gene = common_gene  , category = "RNA_cluster"  )
#cor_res_list[[length(cor_res_list)+1]]<- res_correlation
output.file <- paste0(outdir  , "/Bin_cor_commonGene_Integrated.txt")
write.table(res_correlation$cormat , output.file ,quote = F ,col.names = NA,sep = "\t" )

ht <- PlotCorrelation_ht(res_correlation$cormat ,ht_metadata , ManualClusterPalette, branch_pallet, celltype_pallet,
                               name = "IntegratedData", name2=NULL,Celltypecol = "CellType" , BranchCol = "Branch")
output.file = paste0( outdir,"/Subcluster_Cluster_correlationHeatmap_integrate.pdf" )
pdf( file = output.file , height = 6 ,width = 8)
draw(ht)
dev.off()

## CompareMarmoset_all_gene RNA_cluster
outdir1 <- paste0(outdir ,"/Cluster_cor_commonGene_marmoset_",sep="" )
Compare_obj_list<- list( "Marmoset1" = Compare_obj_list.org$Marmoset,"Marmoset2" = Compare_obj_list.org$Marmoset  )
res_correlation<-MakeCorrelationPlot(Compare_obj_list , outdir1  ,common_gene = common_gene  , category = "RNA_cluster"  )
#cor_res_list[[length(cor_res_list)+1]]<- res_correlation
output.file <- paste0(outdir  , "/Bin_cor_commonGene_marmoset.txt")
write.table(res_correlation$cormat , output.file ,quote = F ,col.names = NA,sep = "\t" )

ht <- PlotCorrelation_ht(res_correlation$cormat ,ht_metadata , ManualClusterPalette, branch_pallet, celltype_pallet,
                               name = "Marmoset", name2=NULL, Celltypecol = "CellType" , BranchCol = "Branch")
output.file = paste0( outdir,"/Subcluster_Cluster_correlationHeatmap_Marmoset.pdf" )
pdf( file = output.file , height = 6 ,width = 8)
draw(ht)
dev.off()


## CompareHuman_all_gene RNA_cluster
outdir1 <- paste0(outdir ,"/Cluster_cor_commonGene_human_",sep="" )
Compare_obj_list<- list( "Human1" = Compare_obj_list.org$Human ,"Human2" = Compare_obj_list.org$Human  )
res_correlation<-MakeCorrelationPlot(Compare_obj_list , outdir1  ,common_gene = common_gene  , category = "RNA_cluster"  )
#cor_res_list[[length(cor_res_list)+1]]<- res_correlation
output.file <- paste0(outdir  , "/Bin_cor_commonGene_human.txt")
write.table(res_correlation$cormat , output.file ,quote = F ,col.names = NA,sep = "\t" )

ht <- PlotCorrelation_ht(res_correlation$cormat ,ht_metadata , ManualClusterPalette, branch_pallet, celltype_pallet,
                               name = "Human", name2=NULL, Celltypecol = "CellType" , BranchCol = "Branch")
output.file = paste0( outdir,"/Subcluster_Cluster_correlationHeatmap_Human.pdf" )
pdf( file = output.file , height = 6 ,width = 8)
draw(ht)
dev.off()




## CompareSpecies_all_gene RNA_cluster
outdir1 <- paste0(outdir ,"/Cluster_cor_commonGene_Species_",sep="" )
Compare_obj_list<- list( "Marmoset" = Compare_obj_list.org$Marmoset ,"Human" = Compare_obj_list.org$Human  )
res_correlation<-MakeCorrelationPlot(Compare_obj_list.org , outdir1  ,common_gene = common_gene  , category = "RNA_cluster"  )
#cor_res_list[[length(cor_res_list)+1]]<- res_correlation
output.file <- paste0(outdir  , "/Bin_cor_commonGene_Species.txt")
write.table(res_correlation$cormat , output.file ,quote = F ,col.names = NA,sep = "\t" )

ht <- PlotCorrelation_ht(res_correlation$cormat ,ht_metadata , ManualClusterPalette, branch_pallet, celltype_pallet,
                               name2 = "Human", name="Marmoset", Celltypecol = "CellType" , BranchCol = "Branch")
output.file = paste0( outdir,"/Subcluster_Cluster_correlationHeatmap_HumanMarmoset.pdf" )
pdf( file = output.file , height = 6 ,width = 8)
draw(ht)
dev.off()


#------------------------------
# Subcluter bin Correlation 
#------------------------------

DefaultAssay(combinedOBJ) <- "RNA"
combinedOBJ$RNA_cluster = combinedOBJ$bin
bin_na_cell <- names(extract_CellObj$bin)[ is.na(extract_CellObj$bin) ]
combinedOBJ$RNA_cluster <- paste0("_bin",combinedOBJ$RNA_cluster)
combinedOBJ$RNA_cluster[ bin_na_cell ] <- paste0("_Cluster",extract_CellObj$RNA_cluster[ bin_na_cell])
combinedOBJ$RNA_cluster[combinedOBJ$RNA_cluster == "_bin"] <- "Other"

## 平均発現量での相関を評価
mean_category_exp = AverageExpression( combinedOBJ , assays = "RNA" ,group.by =  "RNA_cluster" )[["RNA"]]
colnames(mean_category_exp) <- gsub( "g-" ,"",colnames(mean_category_exp) )
paste0("Cluster",c(2:7,9,12,15,16) ) # 0,1,8,10,11,13,14, 
bin_cor_matrix <- cor(mean_category_exp[,paste0( "bin",c(0:43) )] %>% as.matrix() , 
                      mean_category_exp[,paste0("Cluster",c(2:7,9,12,15,16) )] %>% as.matrix() )

colnames(bin_cor_matrix) <- gsub("Cluster","",colnames(bin_cor_matrix))
rownames(ht_metadata ) <- 0:(nrow(ht_metadata)-1) %>% as.character()
ht_metadataselect<-  ht_metadata %>% filter(cluster %in%colnames(bin_cor_matrix))

# row annotation = Gene
row_ha = rowAnnotation( 
        Cluster =  ht_metadataselect[,"cluster"] ,
        CellType = ht_metadataselect[,"CellType"],
        Branch = ht_metadataselect[,"Branch"],
        col = list(Cluster =ManualClusterPalette,
                   CellType = celltype_pallet,
                   Branch = branch_pallet),
        show_legend = T   # ← topは出す
      )

# 転写因子の上位を作る必要あり
ht=Heatmap(bin_cor_matrix %>% t%>% as.matrix() ,
           col = viridis(n = 44, option = "turbo") ,
           name = "Correlation", 
           column_title = "Bin vs Cluster Corelation",
           #top_annotation = ha, 
           right_annotation = row_ha,
           show_column_names = T,
           show_row_names =  T,
           cluster_columns = F,
           cluster_rows = T , width = unit(20, "cm") , height = unit(8, "cm"))

output.file <- paste0(outdir  , "/SubClusterBin_cor_commonGene_Integrated.txt")
write.table(bin_cor_matrix , output.file ,quote = F ,col.names = NA,sep = "\t" )

output.file = paste0( outdir,"/Subcluste_BincorrelationHeatmap.pdf" )
pdf( file = output.file , height = 6 ,width = 13)
draw(ht)
dev.off()


bin_cor_matrix <- cor(mean_category_exp[,paste0( "bin",c(0:43) )] %>% as.matrix() , 
                      mean_category_exp[,paste0("Cluster",c(0:12,14:16) )] %>% as.matrix() )

colnames(bin_cor_matrix) <- gsub("Cluster","",colnames(bin_cor_matrix))
rownames(ht_metadata ) <- 0:(nrow(ht_metadata)-1) %>% as.character()

# row annotation = Gene
ht_metadataselect<-  ht_metadata %>% filter(cluster %in%colnames(bin_cor_matrix))

# row annotation = Gene
row_ha = rowAnnotation( 
        Cluster =  ht_metadataselect[,"cluster"] ,
        CellType = ht_metadataselect[,"CellType"],
        Branch = ht_metadataselect[,"Branch"],
        col = list(Cluster =ManualClusterPalette,
                   CellType = celltype_pallet,
                   Branch = branch_pallet),
        show_legend = T   # ← topは出す
      )


# 転写因子の上位を作る必要あり
ht=Heatmap(bin_cor_matrix %>% t%>% as.matrix() ,
           col = viridis(n = 44, option = "turbo") ,
           name = "Correlation", 
           column_title = "Bin vs Cluster Corelation",
           #top_annotation = ha, 
           right_annotation = row_ha,
           show_column_names = T,
           show_row_names =  T,
           cluster_columns = F,
           cluster_rows = T , width = unit(20, "cm") , height = unit(8, "cm"))

output.file = paste0( outdir,"/Subcluste_BincorrelationHeatmap_allSubcluster.pdf" )
pdf( file = output.file , height = 6 ,width = 13)
draw(ht)
dev.off()


#------------------------------
# Subcluter bin Correlation  Species
#------------------------------

DefaultAssay(combinedOBJ) <- "RNA"
combinedOBJ$RNA_cluster = combinedOBJ$bin
bin_na_cell <- names(extract_CellObj$bin)[ is.na(extract_CellObj$bin) ]
combinedOBJ$RNA_cluster <- paste0("_bin",combinedOBJ$RNA_cluster)
combinedOBJ$RNA_cluster[ bin_na_cell ] <- paste0("_Cluster",extract_CellObj$RNA_cluster[ bin_na_cell])
combinedOBJ$RNA_cluster[combinedOBJ$RNA_cluster == "_bin"] <- "Other"

combinedOBJ$subcluster %>% unique()

# table(combinedOBJ$RNA_cluster, combinedOBJ$species)
ave_exp_mat <- list(
  "human"    = list( bin = NULL , subcluster = NULL) ,
  "marmoset" = list( bin = NULL , subcluster = NULL) ,
  "combined" = list( bin = NULL , subcluster = NULL) 
  )

for (spe in c("combined","human","marmoset" )) {
  if( spe == "combined" ){
    subset_OBJ <- combinedOBJ
  }else {
    subset_OBJ <- subset( combinedOBJ, species == spe )
  }
  for(cate in c( "bin","subcluster") ) {
    if(cate == "bin"){
      use_col ="bin"
      select_col = 0:43
    } else{
      use_col = "subcluster"
      select_col = 0:17
    }
    mean_exp = AverageExpression( subset_OBJ , assays = "RNA" ,group.by = use_col )[["RNA"]]
    colnames(mean_exp) <- gsub( "g-" ,"",colnames(mean_exp) )
    ave_exp_mat[[spe]][[cate ]] = mean_exp[,select_col]
  }
}




for (spe in c("combined","human","marmoset" )) {
  if( spe == "combined" ){
    subset_OBJ <- combinedOBJ
  }else {
    subset_OBJ <- subset( combinedOBJ, species == spe )
  }
  
  ## 平均発現量での相関を評価
  mean_category_exp = AverageExpression( subset_OBJ , assays = "RNA" ,group.by =  "RNA_cluster" )[["RNA"]]
  colnames(mean_category_exp) <- gsub( "g-" ,"",colnames(mean_category_exp) )
  #paste0("Cluster",c(2:7,9,12,15,16) ) # 0,1,8,10,11,13,14, 
  bin_cor_matrix <- cor(mean_category_exp[,paste0( "bin",c(0:43) )] %>% as.matrix() , 
                        mean_category_exp[,paste0("Cluster",c(2:7,9,12,15,16) )] %>% as.matrix() )
  
  colnames(bin_cor_matrix) <- gsub("Cluster","",colnames(bin_cor_matrix))
  rownames(ht_metadata ) <- 0:(nrow(ht_metadata)-1) %>% as.character()
  ht_metadataselect<-  ht_metadata %>% filter(cluster %in%colnames(bin_cor_matrix))
  
  # row annotation = Gene
  row_ha = rowAnnotation( 
          Cluster =  ht_metadataselect[,"cluster"] ,
          CellType = ht_metadataselect[,"CellType"],
          Branch = ht_metadataselect[,"Branch"],
          col = list(Cluster =ManualClusterPalette,
                     CellType = celltype_pallet,
                     Branch = branch_pallet),
          show_legend = T   # ← topは出す
        )
  
  # 転写因子の上位を作る必要あり
  ht=Heatmap(bin_cor_matrix %>% t%>% as.matrix() ,
             col = viridis(n = 44, option = "turbo") ,
             name = "Correlation", 
             column_title = paste0( spe ," Bin vs Cluster Corelation" ),
             #top_annotation = ha, 
             right_annotation = row_ha,
             show_column_names = T,
             show_row_names =  T,
             cluster_columns = F,
             cluster_rows = T , width = unit(20, "cm") , height = unit(8, "cm"))
  
  output.file <- paste0(outdir  , "/SubClusterBin_cor_commonGene_Integrated_",spe,".txt")
  write.table(bin_cor_matrix , output.file ,quote = F ,col.names = NA,sep = "\t" )
  
  output.file = paste0( outdir,"/Subcluste_BincorrelationHeatmap_",spe,".pdf" )
  pdf( file = output.file , height = 6 ,width = 13)
  draw(ht)
  dev.off()
  
  bin_cor_matrix <- cor(mean_category_exp[,paste0( "bin",c(0:43) )] %>% as.matrix() , 
                        mean_category_exp[,paste0("Cluster",c(0:12,15:16) )] %>% as.matrix() )
  
  colnames(bin_cor_matrix) <- gsub("Cluster","",colnames(bin_cor_matrix))
  rownames(ht_metadata ) <- 0:(nrow(ht_metadata)-1) %>% as.character()
  
  # row annotation = Gene
  ht_metadataselect<-  ht_metadata %>% filter(cluster %in%colnames(bin_cor_matrix))
  
  # row annotation = Gene
  row_ha = rowAnnotation( 
          Cluster =  ht_metadataselect[,"cluster"] ,
          CellType = ht_metadataselect[,"CellType"],
          Branch = ht_metadataselect[,"Branch"],
          col = list(Cluster =ManualClusterPalette,
                     CellType = celltype_pallet,
                     Branch = branch_pallet),
          show_legend = T   # ← topは出す
        )
  
  
  # 転写因子の上位を作る必要あり
  ht=Heatmap(bin_cor_matrix %>% t%>% as.matrix() ,
             col = viridis(n = 44, option = "turbo") ,
             name = "Correlation", 
             column_title = paste0( spe ," Bin vs Cluster Corelation" ),
             #top_annotation = ha, 
             right_annotation = row_ha,
             show_column_names = T,
             show_row_names =  T,
             cluster_columns = F,
             cluster_rows = T , width = unit(20, "cm") , height = unit(8, "cm"))
  
  output.file = paste0( outdir,"/Subcluste_BincorrelationHeatmap_allSubcluster_",spe,".pdf" )
  pdf( file = output.file , height = 6 ,width = 13)
  draw(ht)
  dev.off()
}


rm(list = c( "Compare_obj_list" , "Compare_obj_list.org" ))
gc()


#------------------------------
# Subcluter bin Correlation  Species ver2
#------------------------------

DefaultAssay(combinedOBJ) <- "RNA"
combinedOBJ$RNA_cluster = combinedOBJ$bin
bin_na_cell <- names(extract_CellObj$bin)[ is.na(extract_CellObj$bin) ]
combinedOBJ$RNA_cluster <- paste0("_bin",combinedOBJ$RNA_cluster)
combinedOBJ$RNA_cluster[ bin_na_cell ] <- paste0("_Cluster",extract_CellObj$RNA_cluster[ bin_na_cell])
combinedOBJ$RNA_cluster[combinedOBJ$RNA_cluster == "_bin"] <- "Other"

combinedOBJ$subcluster %>% unique()

# table(combinedOBJ$RNA_cluster, combinedOBJ$species)
ave_exp_mat <- list(
  "human"    = list( bin = NULL , subcluster = NULL) ,
  "marmoset" = list( bin = NULL , subcluster = NULL) ,
  "combined" = list( bin = NULL , subcluster = NULL) 
  )

for (spe in c("combined","human","marmoset" )) {
  if( spe == "combined" ){
    subset_OBJ <- combinedOBJ
  }else {
    subset_OBJ <- subset( combinedOBJ, species == spe )
  }
  for(cate in c( "bin","subcluster") ) {
    if(cate == "bin"){
      use_col ="bin"
    } else{
      use_col = "subcluster"
    }
    mean_exp = AverageExpression( subset_OBJ , assays = "RNA" ,group.by = use_col )[["RNA"]]
    colnames(mean_exp) <- gsub( "^g" ,cate, colnames(mean_exp) )
    ave_exp_mat[[spe]][[cate ]] = mean_exp#[,select_col]
  }
}

for( spe1 in c("combined","human","marmoset" )){
  for( spe2 in c("combined","human","marmoset" )){
    bin_cor_matrix <- cor(ave_exp_mat[[spe1]][["bin"]] %>% as.matrix() , 
                          ave_exp_mat[[spe2]][["subcluster"]][,paste0("subcluster",c(2:7,9,12,15,16) )] %>% as.matrix() )
    colnames(bin_cor_matrix) <- gsub("subcluster","",colnames(bin_cor_matrix))
    #rownames(ht_metadata ) <- 0:(nrow(ht_metadata)-1) %>% as.character()
    ht_metadataselect<-  ht_metadata %>% filter(cluster %in% colnames(bin_cor_matrix) )
    
    # row annotation = Gene
    row_ha = rowAnnotation( 
            Cluster =  ht_metadataselect[,"cluster"] ,
            CellType = ht_metadataselect[,"CellType"],
            Branch = ht_metadataselect[,"Branch"],
            col = list(Cluster =ManualClusterPalette,
                       CellType = celltype_pallet,
                       Branch = branch_pallet),
            show_legend = T   # ← topは出す
          )
    
    # 転写因子の上位を作る必要あり
    ht=Heatmap(bin_cor_matrix %>% t%>% as.matrix() ,
               col = viridis(n = 44, option = "turbo") ,
               name = "Correlation", 
               column_title = paste0("Bin:" ,spe1 ," vs ","Cluster ",spe2  ,"Corelation" ),
               #top_annotation = ha, 
               right_annotation = row_ha,
               show_column_names = T,
               show_row_names =  T,
               cluster_columns = F,
               cluster_rows = T , width = unit(20, "cm") , height = unit(8, "cm"))
    
    output.file <- paste0(outdir  , "/SpeciecCompareSubClusterBin_cor_bin-",spe1,"_vs_cluster-",spe2,".txt")
    write.table(bin_cor_matrix , output.file ,quote = F ,col.names = NA,sep = "\t" )
    
    output.file = paste0( outdir,"/Subcluste_BincorrelationHeatmap__bin-",spe1,"_vs_cluster-",spe2,".pdf")
    pdf( file = output.file , height = 6 ,width = 13)
    draw(ht)
    dev.off()
    
    bin_cor_matrix <- cor(ave_exp_mat[[spe1]][["bin"]] %>% as.matrix() , 
                          ave_exp_mat[[spe2]][["subcluster"]][,paste0("subcluster",c(0:12,15:16))] %>% as.matrix() )
    colnames(bin_cor_matrix) <- gsub("subcluster","",colnames(bin_cor_matrix))
    #rownames(ht_metadata ) <- 0:(nrow(ht_metadata)-1) %>% as.character()
    ht_metadataselect<-  ht_metadata %>% filter(cluster %in% colnames(bin_cor_matrix) )
    
    # row annotation = Gene
    ht_metadataselect<-  ht_metadata %>% filter(cluster %in%colnames(bin_cor_matrix))
    
    # row annotation = Gene
    row_ha = rowAnnotation( 
            Cluster =  ht_metadataselect[,"cluster"] ,
            CellType = ht_metadataselect[,"CellType"],
            Branch = ht_metadataselect[,"Branch"],
            col = list(Cluster =ManualClusterPalette,
                       CellType = celltype_pallet,
                       Branch = branch_pallet),
            show_legend = T   # ← topは出す
          )
    
    
    # 転写因子の上位を作る必要あり
    ht=Heatmap(bin_cor_matrix %>% t%>% as.matrix() ,
               col = viridis(n = 44, option = "turbo") ,
               name = "Correlation", 
               column_title = paste0("Bin:" ,spe1 ," vs ","Cluster ",spe2  ,"Corelation" ),
               #top_annotation = ha, 
               right_annotation = row_ha,
               show_column_names = T,
               show_row_names =  T,
               cluster_columns = F,
               cluster_rows = T , width = unit(20, "cm") , height = unit(8, "cm"))
    
    output.file = paste0( outdir,"ALL_Subcluste_BincorrelationHeatmap__bin-",spe1,"_vs_cluster-",spe2,".pdf" )
    pdf( file = output.file , height = 6 ,width = 13)
    draw(ht)
    dev.off()
  }
}


#########################################################
# SubCluster Monocle3
#########################################################
library(monocle3)
library(ggrepel)
#-----------------
# Comkbined Prediction
#-----------------

#cds <- as.cell_data_set( extract_CellObj  
cds <- as.cell_data_set( extract_CellObj ) 
cds <- cluster_cells(cds)
p1 <- plot_cells(cds, color_cells_by = "seurat_clusters",show_trajectory_graph = FALSE) +
      scale_color_manual(values = ManualClusterPalette )
p2 <- plot_cells(cds, color_cells_by = "partition", show_trajectory_graph = FALSE)+
      scale_color_manual(values = ManualClusterPalette )
#p<-p1+ p2
#p
output.file = paste0( outdir ,"/Monocle3UMAP_cluster_partion" )
wggplot(p1 , output.file , height = 5 ,width = 15 )


cds <- learn_graph(cds , use_partition = F , close_loop =F)
p<-plot_cells(cds, 
           color_cells_by = "seurat_clusters",
           label_groups_by_cluster = FALSE, 
           label_leaves = T, 
           label_branch_points = T, 
           graph_label_size=3)+
      scale_color_manual(values = ManualClusterPalette )
#p
output.file = paste0( outdir ,"/Monocle3UMAP_Combined_trajectory" )
wggplot(p , output.file , height = 5 ,width = 5)


# 1) 主グラフ（igraph）を取得
#   UMAP を使っている前提。tSNE/PCA を使っているなら該当名に置き換え
g <- principal_graph(cds)[["UMAP"]]

# 2) ノード座標を取得
aux <- principal_graph_aux(cds)[["UMAP"]]

# 通常、座標は pr_graph_cell_proj_layout に保存されています
coords <- aux$pr_graph_cell_proj_tree

coords <- as.data.frame(aux$dp_mst) %>% t %>% as.data.frame()
colnames(coords) <- c("x", "y")
coords$node <- rownames(coords)

# 3) ノードの次数で分類（leaf: 1, branch: >=3, internal: 2）
deg <-igraph::degree(g)
coords$degree <- deg[coords$node]
coords$type <- dplyr::case_when(
  coords$degree == 1 ~ "leaf",
  coords$degree >= 3 ~ "branch",
  TRUE ~ "internal"
)

# 4) 辺の座標を作成（igraphのエッジを座標に展開）
edges <- igraph::as_data_frame(g, what = "edges") %>%
  left_join(coords %>% select(node, x, y), by = c("from" = "node")) %>%
  rename(x_from = x, y_from = y) %>%
  left_join(coords %>% select(node, x, y), by = c("to" = "node")) %>%
  rename(x_to = x, y_to = y)

# 5) セルの UMAP 座標を取得
cell_umap <- as.data.frame(reducedDims(cds)[["UMAP"]])
colnames(cell_umap) <- c("x", "y")
cell_umap$cell <- rownames(cell_umap)

# 6) もし色分けしたいメタデータがあれば追加
 cell_umap <- cell_umap %>%
   left_join(colData(cds) %>% as.data.frame() %>% tibble::rownames_to_column("cell"),
             by = "cell")

# 7) プロット：セル + 辺 + 全ノード（色で type 分類）
p<- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = cell_umap, aes(x = x, y = y ,col = seurat_clusters), size = 0.6) +
  scale_color_manual( values =ManualClusterPalette  )+
  geom_segment(
    data = edges,
    aes(x = x_from, y = y_from, xend = x_to, yend = y_to),
    color = "black", size = 0.6, alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = coords,
    aes(x = x, y = y, fill = type),
    shape = 21, color = "black", size = 2
  ) +
  geom_text_repel(data  = coords,
                  aes(x = x, y = y,label  = node),
                  max.overlaps = Inf)+ 
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(leaf = "#4CAF50", branch = "#E53935", internal = "#1E88E5")
  ) +
  coord_equal() +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    title = "Monocle3 Trajectory: All Graph Nodes",
    x = "UMAP1", y = "UMAP2", fill = "NodeType"
  )

output.file = paste0( outdir ,"/Monocle3UMAP_add_NodeInfo" )
wggplot(p , output.file , height = 7 ,width = 7 )



# --- 前提：learn_graph(cds) が済んでいる ---
reduction <- "UMAP"

# 主グラフと補助情報
g    <- principal_graph(cds)[[reduction]]
aux  <- principal_graph_aux(cds)[[reduction]]

# 各セルの「最も近いグラフ頂点」(cell -> node)
# 形式は named vector or list のことが多いので data.frame に
closest_vertex_raw <- aux$pr_graph_cell_proj_closest_vertex
closest_df <- enframe(closest_vertex_raw, name = "cell", value = "node") %>%
  mutate(node = paste0("Y_",as.character(node)))

# 1) ブランチポイント（次数 >= 3）の一覧
deg <- igraph::degree(g)
branch_points <- names(deg[deg >= 3])

bp <- branch_points[1]
# 3) 分岐点bpに隣接するノード（= 各ブランチの起点候補）
nbrs <- neighbors(g, bp) %>% names()

#分裂あり
closest_df$Annotation = "Other"
closest_df$Annotation[ closest_df$node %in% c("Y_5","Y_46" )] = "bifurcation_point"
closest_df$Annotation[ closest_df$node %in% c("Y_9","Y_32","Y_28","Y_12" )] = "Differentiation"
closest_df$Annotation[ closest_df$node %in% c("Y_45","Y_36", "Y_40","Y_19")] = "NextDividing"
closest_df$Annotation[ closest_df$node == "Y_15"] = "AfterDividing"
closest_df$Annotation[ closest_df$node %in% c("Y_10","Y_24","Y_4","Y_33" )] = "InterMediate"

branch_pallet <- c(cluster_pallete[0:5],"gray")
names(branch_pallet) <- c( "bifurcation_point","Differentiation","NextDividing","AfterDividing","InterMediate","Other"  )

colData(cds)$Branch <- "Other"
colData(cds)[closest_df$cell ,"Branch"] <-  closest_df$Annotation
p<-plot_cells(cds, 
           color_cells_by = "Branch",
           label_groups_by_cluster = FALSE, 
           label_leaves = T, 
           label_branch_points = T, 
           graph_label_size=3)+
      scale_color_manual(values = branch_pallet )
output.file = paste0( outdir ,"/Monocle3UMAP_Branched_Combined_trajectory" )
wggplot(p , output.file , height = 5 ,width = 5)


combinedOBJ$Branch= "Other"
combinedOBJ$Branch[closest_df$cell ] = closest_df$Annotation

names(Category_list)[2] <- "Differentiated"
combinedOBJ$CellType <-SetCellAnnotation(param,combinedOBJ,Category_list, from_cname ="seurat_clusters")
TruseSSC <- colnames(combinedOBJ)[combinedOBJ@reductions$umap@cell.embeddings[,1] < 2.6 &
                         combinedOBJ@reductions$umap@cell.embeddings[,2] > -10 ]
combinedOBJ$CellType[ combinedOBJ$CellType == "SSCs"  & !colnames(combinedOBJ) %in% TruseSSC ] <- "Differentiated"
combinedOBJ$Branch_CellType= combinedOBJ$CellType
combinedOBJ$Branch_CellType[closest_df %>% filter(Annotation != "Other" ) %>% pull(cell) ] = 
  closest_df %>% filter(Annotation != "Other" ) %>% pull(Annotation)

#DimPlot_scCustom(combinedOBJ , shuffle = F, group.by = "Branch_CellType" , pt.size = 0.05)

p <- DimPlot_scCustom(combinedOBJ , shuffle = F, group.by = "Branch" , colors_use = branch_pallet ,pt.size = 0.05)
p <- DimPlot(combinedOBJ ,group.by = "Branch" , cols = branch_pallet ,pt.size = 0.05) + 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20))
output.file = paste0( outdir ,"/Monocle3UMAP_Branch_CategoryPlot" )
wggplot(p , output.file , height = 10 ,width =11 )

zoom_cell = colnames(combinedOBJ)[combinedOBJ@reductions$umap@cell.embeddings[,1] > -4 & 
                                    combinedOBJ@reductions$umap@cell.embeddings[,1] < 2 &
                                    combinedOBJ@reductions$umap@cell.embeddings[,2] < -2 &
                                    combinedOBJ@reductions$umap@cell.embeddings[,2] > -6 ] 
p <- DimPlot( combinedOBJ[, zoom_cell ] ,group.by = "Branch" , cols = branch_pallet) + 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20))
output.file = paste0( outdir ,"/Monocle3UMAP_Branch_CategoryPlot_Zoom" )
wggplot(p , output.file , height = 5 ,width =7)

#table(combinedOBJ$Branch ,combinedOBJ$bin,combinedOBJ$species)
#table(combinedOBJ$subcluster ,combinedOBJ$bin,combinedOBJ$species,combinedOBJ$CellType)

summary_cellCount <- combinedOBJ@meta.data %>% 
  select(species, CellType , bin, subcluster  ) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(subcluster )) %>% group_by( species, CellType , bin, subcluster ) %>% summarise( n = n())
#is.na(summary_cellCount) <- 0
output.file = paste0( outdir , "/CellCount_subcluster_bin.txt" )
write.table( summary_cellCount , file =output.file , 
               quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)

summary_cellCount2 <- combinedOBJ@meta.data %>% 
  select(species, CellType , bin,  subcluster ,Branch,seurat_clusters   ) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(subcluster )) %>% group_by( species,Branch, seurat_clusters , bin ) %>% summarise( n = n())%>%
  pivot_wider( names_from =  "bin",values_from = "n")
summary_cellCount2[is.na(summary_cellCount2) ] = 0
output.file = paste0( outdir , "/CellCount_Branchr_bin.txt" )
write.table( summary_cellCount2 , file =output.file , 
               quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)

summary_cellCount2 <- combinedOBJ@meta.data %>% 
  select(species, CellType , bin,  subcluster ,Branch ,seurat_clusters  ) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(subcluster )) %>% group_by( species,seurat_clusters, subcluster) %>% summarise( n = n())%>%
  pivot_wider( names_from =  "subcluster",values_from = "n")
summary_cellCount2[is.na(summary_cellCount2) ] = 0
output.file = paste0( outdir , "/CellCount_combClsuter_subclusyer.txt" )
write.table( summary_cellCount2 , file =output.file , 
               quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)


summary_cellCount2 <- combinedOBJ@meta.data %>% 
  select(species, CellType , bin,  subcluster ,Branch  ) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(subcluster )) %>% group_by( species, CellType ,subcluster) %>% summarise( n = n()) %>%
  pivot_wider( names_from =  "subcluster",values_from = "n")
summary_cellCount2[is.na(summary_cellCount2) ] = 0
output.file = paste0( outdir , "/CellCount_Cluster_bin.txt" )
write.table( summary_cellCount2 , file =output.file , 
               quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)

summary_cellCount2 <-combinedOBJ@meta.data %>% 
  select(species, CellType , bin,  subcluster,seurat_clusters ,Branch  ) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(subcluster )) %>% group_by( species, seurat_clusters ,Branch) %>% summarise( n = n()) %>%
  pivot_wider( names_from =  "Branch",values_from = "n")
summary_cellCount2[is.na(summary_cellCount2) ] = 0
output.file = paste0( outdir , "/CellCount_Cluster_Branche.txt" )
write.table( summary_cellCount2 , file =output.file , 
               quote = F ,sep ="\t" ,row.names = T ,col.names = NA)

p <- DimPlot(combinedOBJ ,group.by = "Branch" , cols = branch_pallet ,pt.size = 0.05) + 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20))
output.file = paste0( outdir ,"/Monocle3UMAP_Branch_CategoryPlot" )
wggplot(p , output.file , height = 10 ,width =11 )


saveobj <- list( seuratext= extract_CellObj,
                 seurat_comb = combinedOBJ,
                 monocle =cds,
                 closest_df =closest_df
                )

output.file = paste0( param$outdir  ,"/intermediate_subcluster.rds")
saveRDS(saveobj ,output.file )

```



# DEG5. Intemediat Corrilation DEG

```{r}


subcluster_data <- readRDS("/Analysis/work//work_kuze/result/260331_CombinedTrajectory_P5/SubCluster_Pando/intermediate_subcluster.rds")

combinedOBJ <- subcluster_data$seurat_comb
combinedOBJ$newCellType <- combinedOBJ$Branch_CellType
combinedOBJ$newCellType[ combinedOBJ$newCellType %in% c("NextDividing","bifurcation_point","AfterDividing") ] <- "SSCs"

selectCluster2 <-subcluster_data$seurat_comb@meta.data %>% 
  dplyr::select( seurat_clusters ,subcluster ) %>% 
  mutate( Category = if_else(seurat_clusters == 2   , 
                            if_else( subcluster %in% c( 3,9) ,"Intermediata",
                                     if_else( subcluster %in% c( 7,12)  ,"Differentiation", "Other" )
                                    ),
                            paste0("cluster",seurat_clusters)
                            )
  )

c2_levels <-  c("cluster8","cluster1","cluster5","cluster3" ,  "cluster6",  "cluster7",
                "Intermediata" ,"Differentiation",
                "cluster0","cluster4","cluster10","cluster9" ,  "cluster11",  "cluster12","Other"
                )
combinedOBJ$c2_split <- factor(selectCluster2[colnames(combinedOBJ), "Category"],
                               levels =c2_levels)

c2split_pallete <- cluster_pallete
names(c2split_pallete)<- paste0("cluster",names(cluster_pallete))
names(c2split_pallete)[length(c2split_pallete)]  <- "Intermediata"
names(c2split_pallete)[3]  <- "Differentiation"
names(c2split_pallete)[length(c2split_pallete)-1]  <- "Other"

ClusterAverageEXP <- AverageExpression( combinedOBJ,group.by = c("species","c2_split"), assays = "RNA"  )$RNA %>% as.data.frame


forPlotCluster <- c( "cluster1" , "cluster0" , "Intermediata", "Differentiation") #c2_levels[ c(1:11 ) ]

AverageEXP <-list(
  human = ClusterAverageEXP %>% 
    select(starts_with("human")) %>% 
    rename_with( ~ gsub("^human_","",.x) ) %>% 
    select(forPlotCluster) %>% t %>% scale() %>% t,
  marmoset = ClusterAverageEXP %>% 
    select(starts_with("marmoset")) %>% 
    rename_with( ~ gsub("^marmoset_","",.x) )%>% 
    select(forPlotCluster) %>%t %>% scale() %>% t
)

AverageEXP_nonscale <-list(
  human = ClusterAverageEXP %>% 
    select(starts_with("human")) %>% 
    rename_with( ~ gsub("^human_","",.x) ) %>%
    select(forPlotCluster) ,
  marmoset = ClusterAverageEXP %>% 
    select(starts_with("marmoset")) %>% 
    rename_with( ~ gsub("^marmoset_","",.x) ) %>%
    select(forPlotCluster) 
)



#################################
# DEG Detection
#################################

subsetOBJ_list <- list("human" = NULL , "marmoset" =NULL)

for( spe in c("human","marmoset")){
  subsetOBJ_list[[spe]] <- subset( combinedOBJ , species == spe & newCellType != "rm" )
}

param$outdir <- paste0(param$directories$outdir,"/Compare_Subcluster_SSC_SPG/")
if (!dir.exists(param$outdir)) {
  dir.create(param$outdir, recursive = TRUE)
  message("ディレクトリを作成しました: ", param$outdir)
} else {
  message("output ディレクトリは既に存在します: ", param$outdir)
}

spe_deg_list <- list("human" = NULL , "marmoset" =NULL)

for( spe in c("human","marmoset")){
  subsetOBJ <- subsetOBJ_list[[spe]]
  Idents(subsetOBJ) <-"c2_split" #"newCellType"
  deg_list <- c()
  
  for (deg_cluster in c("cluster1","cluster0", "Differentiation")) {
    
    if( deg_cluster == "cluster1"  ){
      ctrl = "cluster0"
    } else if ( deg_cluster == "cluster0"  ) {
      ctrl ="cluster1"
    } else if ( deg_cluster == "Differentiation"  ) {
      ctrl = c("cluster0","cluster1" )
    } else{
      print("ERR!")
      print(deg_cluster)
      break
    }
    SSC_SPG_deg <- FindMarkers( subsetOBJ , ident.1 =deg_cluster, 
                              ident.2 = ctrl,assay = "RNA",min.pct =0.1, only.pos = T )
    SSC_SPG_deg$diff_pct =SSC_SPG_deg$pct.1 -SSC_SPG_deg$pct.2
    SSC_SPG_deg$gene = rownames(SSC_SPG_deg)
    SSC_SPG_deg$Cluster = deg_cluster
    SSC_SPG_deg$Ctrl = paste0(ctrl, collapse = "_")
    deg_list <-rbind(deg_list, SSC_SPG_deg)
  }
  spe_deg_list[[spe]] <- deg_list
}


#################################
# Plot
#################################

DimPlot( combinedOBJ , split.by = "species", group.by = "c2_split" ,cols=c2split_pallete)

#################################
# DEG filter
#################################

spe = "human"
#spe_deg_list[[spe]] %>% filter( p_val_adj <0.05 & avg_log2FC > 1 & pct.1 > 0.5) %>% 
#  group_by(Cluster) %>% summarize(num = n())

selected_MarkerGene_list <- list( human = NULL , marmoset = NULL)

average_marker_mat <- list(
  human = list( SSC  = NULL , Differentiated = NULL  ),
  marmoset = list( SSC  = NULL , Differentiated = NULL  )
)

for ( spe in c("human","marmoset")) {
  
  MarkerDEG <-  spe_deg_list[[spe]] %>% 
    filter( p_val_adj <0.05 & pct.1 > 0.5 ) %>%
    group_by(Cluster) %>%
    #slice_min(  order_by = p_val_adj  , n = 100 ) %>% 
    slice_max(  order_by = avg_log2FC , n = 50 ) %>%
    ungroup()
  selected_MarkerGene_list[[spe]] = MarkerDEG

  ssc_spg_MarkerSets <-  MarkerDEG %>% 
    select( gene , Cluster) %>%
    group_by(Cluster) %>% 
    summarise(Geene_sets = list(gene) %>% unique(), .groups = "drop") %>% 
    tibble::deframe()
  
  #######################
  # Human Plot
  #######################
  
  forPlotCluster <- c( "cluster1" ,  "Intermediata", "Differentiation","cluster0" ) #c2_levels[ c(1:11 ) ]

  top_anno <-columnAnnotation( CellType = c( "SSCs" ,
                                             "Differentiated",
                                            "Intermediata"  , 
                                            "Diferentiation" )  ,
                         col = list(CellType = c("SSCs" = "red" , 
                                                    "Intermediata" = "#C8E6BF"   ,
                                                    "Diferentiation"= "#51FF16" ,
                                                    "Differentiated" = "#624F56"
                                                    ))
                        )
  
  ssc_ht <- Heatmap(AverageEXP[[spe]][ssc_spg_MarkerSets$cluster1 ,forPlotCluster , drop = FALSE],
                  name = "AverageEXP", 
                  #col = col_fun,
                  column_title = "SSCs Genes",
                  #clustering_method_columns  = "ward.D2",
                  show_heatmap_legend = T,
                  top_annotation = top_anno,
                  show_column_names = T,
                  show_row_names =  F,
                  cluster_columns = F,
                  cluster_rows = T )
    
  spg_ht <-Heatmap(AverageEXP[[spe]][ssc_spg_MarkerSets$cluster0 ,forPlotCluster, drop = FALSE]  ,
                  name = "AverageEXP", 
                  #col = col_fun,
                  #clustering_method_columns  = "ward.D2",
                  column_title = "Differentiated Genes",
                  top_annotation = top_anno,
                  show_column_names = T,
                  show_row_names =  F,
                  cluster_columns = F,
                  cluster_rows = T )
  average_marker_mat[[spe]][["SSC"]] =
    AverageEXP_nonscale[[spe]][ssc_spg_MarkerSets$cluster1,forPlotCluster]
  average_marker_mat[[spe]][["Differentiated"]] =
    AverageEXP_nonscale[[spe]][ssc_spg_MarkerSets$cluster0,forPlotCluster]
  #ssc_ht
  #spg_ht
  
  output.file = paste0( param$outdir ,"/SSCMarkerHeatmap_", spe,".pdf" )
  pdf( file = output.file , height = 6 ,width = 8)
  draw(ssc_ht)
  dev.off()
  
  output.file = paste0( param$outdir ,"/DifferentiatedMarkerHeatmap_", spe,".pdf" )
  pdf( file = output.file , height = 6 ,width = 8)
  draw(spg_ht)
  dev.off()

}


wb_tf <- createWorkbook()
customStyle <- createStyle(
  fontName = "Arial",
  fontSize = 11,halign = "center",valign = "center"
  #textDecoration = "bold"
)

for( spe in c( "human","marmoset") ){
  for( type in c( "SSC","Differentiated" ) ) {
    sheet <- paste0( spe , "_" , type , "_Exp")
    addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
    write_data <- average_marker_mat[[spe]][[type]]
    colnames(write_data) <-  colnames(write_data) %>% str_to_title()
    writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data ,rowNames = T)
    
    for (i in 2:nrow(write_data)) {
      conditionalFormatting(
        wb_tf,sheet = sheet,
        cols = 2:(ncol(write_data)+1),rows = i,
        type = "colourScale",
        style = c("#FFFFFF", "#FF0000") 
      )
    }
    addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
              rows = 1, 
              cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1))
    freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
    addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
             rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
             cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
             gridExpand = TRUE)
  }
  
  sheet <- paste0( spe , "_Allgene_Exp")
  addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
  write_data<-AverageEXP_nonscale[[spe]][,forPlotCluster]
  colnames(write_data) <-  colnames(write_data) %>% str_to_title()
    writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data ,rowNames = T)
    addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
              rows = 1, 
              cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1))
    freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
    addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
             rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
             cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
             gridExpand = TRUE)
    
}



outfile  = paste0( param$outdir , "/Heatmap_Expdata.xlsx" )
saveWorkbook(wb_tf, file =outfile, overwrite = TRUE)

#################################
# DEG filter XLSX
#################################
wb_tf <- createWorkbook()
customStyle <- createStyle(
  fontName = "Arial",
  fontSize = 11,halign = "center",valign = "center"
  #textDecoration = "bold"
)

sheet <- paste0("Human_Selected_MarkerGene")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data <- selected_MarkerGene_list$human 
colnames(write_data) <-  colnames(write_data) %>% str_to_title()
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)


sheet <- paste0("Marmoset_Selected_MarkerGene")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-selected_MarkerGene_list$marmoset
colnames(write_data) <-  colnames(write_data) %>% str_to_title()
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)


plot_gene <- selected_MarkerGene_list$human$gene
sheet <- paste0("Human_AverageEXP")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-AverageEXP_nonscale[["human"]][ plot_gene ,forPlotCluster , drop = FALSE] %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column(var ="Gene") %>%
  left_join(. ,selected_MarkerGene_list$human %>% select(gene,Cluster) , by = c("Gene"="gene") ) %>%
  relocate(Cluster, .after = 1)

colnames(write_data) <-  colnames(write_data) %>% str_to_title()
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

plot_gene <- selected_MarkerGene_list$marmoset$gene
sheet <- paste0("Marmoset_AverageEXP")
addWorksheet(wb_tf,sheet)
write_data<-AverageEXP_nonscale[["marmoset"]][ plot_gene ,forPlotCluster , drop = FALSE] %>%
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column(var ="Gene") %>%
  left_join(. ,selected_MarkerGene_list$marmoset %>% select(gene,Cluster) , by = c("Gene"="gene") ) %>%
  relocate(Cluster, .after = 1)

colnames(write_data) <-  colnames(write_data) %>% str_to_title()
writeData(wb_tf, sheet, write_data)
addFilter(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, 
          rows = 1, 
          cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)))
freezePane(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 2)
addStyle(wb_tf, sheet = sheet, style = customStyle, 
         rows = 1:(nrow(write_data)+2) , 
         cols = 1:(ncol(write_data)+1),
         gridExpand = TRUE)

outfile  = paste0( param$outdir , "/SSCs_SPG_Marker.xlsx" )
saveWorkbook(wb_tf, file =outfile, overwrite = TRUE)




```
